title: Valencian Paella
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large paella pan.
Step 2: Add the chicken and rabbit pieces, and fry until golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add the chopped red peppers and minced garlic, and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the rice and stir so that it toasts a little.
Step 5: Add water or chicken broth to cover the rice, season with salt and pepper to taste and cook over medium-high heat.
Step 6: Once the rice is almost done, add the beaten eggs and stir to set.
Step 7: Let the paella rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Braised Lentils With Chorizo
steps: Step 1: Cook the lentils until they are soft.
Step 2: Fry the chorizo ​​in a pan until golden.
Step 3: Add the cooked lentils to the pan with the chorizo ​​and mix well.
Step 4: Cook everything together for a few more minutes so that the flavors mix.

title: Macaroni With Tomato And Cheese
steps: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions.
Meanwhile, make a homemade tomato sauce or use a prepared tomato sauce.
Once the macaroni is cooked and drained, mix it with the tomato sauce in a large pot.
Add the grated cheese to the macaroni and sauce mixture, stirring until the cheese is completely melted.

title: Roasted Chicken With Lemon And Herbs
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Place the chicken on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the chicken with lemon juice and water.
Add the fresh herbs around the chicken.
Bake for 30 minutes or until chicken is cooked.

title: Hake In Green Sauce
steps: Season the hake with salt and pepper.
Flour the hake and fry in hot oil until golden.
Remove the hake from the heat and set aside.
In the same oil, fry the chopped garlic until golden.
Add the white wine and reduce by half.
Add the chopped parsley and cook for a few more minutes.
Add the fried hake to the green sauce and serve.

title: Complete Madrid Stew
steps: Cook the beef bones in a pot with water for 1 hour.
Add the lamb and pork leg to the pot and cook for another 2 hours.
Add the potatoes, cabbages and beans to the pot and cook for another 30 minutes.
In a separate pan, fry the bacon until crispy.
Serve the stew on individual plates with a little rice on each one. Add the fried bacon on top.

title: Potato Omelet With Onion
steps: Cook the potatoes and onion until soft.
Beat the eggs in a large bowl.
Add the cooked potatoes and onion to the beaten eggs and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a hot pan with oil and cook until golden on both sides.

title: Meatballs In Spanish Sauce
steps: Step 1: Finely chop the onion and garlic. Mix them with the ground pork, breadcrumbs, egg and chopped parsley.
Step 2: Form the mixture into balls and lightly flour them.
Step 3: Fry the meatballs in a pan with hot oil until golden brown on all sides. Remove them and reserve them.
Step 4: In the same oil, sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent. Add the crushed tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add the red wine to the sauce and let it reduce until the alcohol evaporates.
Step 6: Add the fried meatballs to the sauce, stir so that they are well covered. Let cook for a few more minutes.
Step 7: Serve hot.

detailedIngredients.name: flour
detailedIngredients.quantity: to flour the meatballs, to taste

title: Baked Pork Loin With Apple
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Season the pork loin with salt and pepper.
Peel and cut the apples into small pieces.
Finely chop the garlic cloves and mix with the chopped parsley.
Place the pork loin in a baking dish, surround the loin with the apple pieces.
Sprinkle the garlic and parsley mixture over the tenderloin and apples.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the loin is cooked.

title: Complete Homemade Burger
steps: Cook the beef until medium rare or according to your preferences.
Toast the hamburger bun in a frying pan with a little butter.
Place the cooked meat on the toasted bread and add the cheese to melt.
Add chopped lettuce, tomato and onion over the meat and cheese.

title: Spaghetti Carbonara (With Egg)
steps: Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions.
In a bowl, mix the eggs and Parmesan cheese until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
In a frying pan, brown the bacon until crispy. Add the cooked spaghetti and the egg and cheese mixture. Mix well.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Grilled Salmon With Dill
steps: Step 1: Season the salmon with dill and pepper.
Step 2: Heat a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
Step 3: Add the salmon to the pan and cook for about 4-5 minutes on each side or until cooked.

title: Curry Chicken With Coconut Milk
steps: Heat the oil in a frying pan and sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for 1 more minute.
Add the chicken cut into pieces and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the curry powder and sweet paprika, mix well with the chicken.
Pour in the coconut milk and cook over medium heat for 15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked.
Serve hot and enjoy your delicious chicken curry with coconut milk.

title: Beef Stew With Potatoes
steps: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a pot and brown the meat on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and whole peeled garlic, cook until soft.
Add the potatoes cut into large pieces, the thyme and the bay leaf.
Pour red wine and enough water to cover the meat.
Cook over medium heat for approximately 1 hour and 30 minutes.
Remove the meat and potatoes from the pot, mix flour with a little water and add to the broth.
Let the stew thicken and serve the meat and potatoes on individual plates, accompanied by the broth as a sauce.

title: Barbecue Pork Ribs
steps: Step 1: Preheat the grill.
Step 2: Add the pork ribs to the grill and cook until well done.

title: Cod Pil-Pil
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for at least 24 hours to remove the salt.
Step 2: In a frying pan, heat olive oil and add the chopped garlic.
Step 3: Add the crumbled cod to the pan and cook until tender.
Step 4: Add sweet paprika to taste and mix well.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Homemade Margherita Pizza
steps: Prepare the dough: Mix the flour, water and yeast until it forms a ball.
Let the dough rest for 1 hour.
Spread the dough on a floured surface.
Add the tomato sauce and spread the mozzarella cheese on top.
Cook the pizza in a preheated oven at 200 degrees Celsius for about 15 minutes.

title: Cuban Style Rice With Fried Egg
steps: Cook the rice until cooked.
Fry the eggs in a pan with oil.
In the same pan, sauté the chopped garlic.
Add the chopped tomatoes and cook until soft.
Serve the rice on a plate, place the fried eggs on top and cover with the tomato sauce.

title: Roquefort Pork Tenderloin
steps: Salt and pepper the pork tenderloin.
Melt the butter in a frying pan and brown the sirloin pieces over high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant.
Add the red wine and reduce the liquid until it thickens.
Add the Roquefort cheese and stir until it melts and forms a creamy sauce.
Serve the pork tenderloin with the Roquefort sauce on top.

title: Chicken Fajitas With Peppers
steps: Cut the chicken into strips and season with salt and pepper.
In a hot frying pan, add a little oil and fry the chicken strips until golden brown. Remove from heat and reserve.
In the same pan, add the coarsely chopped peppers and onion. Sauté until soft.
Add the minced garlic to the pan with the peppers and onion. Cook for one more minute.
Return the chicken to the pan and mix everything to combine flavors. Cook for a few more minutes.
Serve the fajitas hot with wheat or corn tortillas.

title: Meat Lasagna (Bolognese)
steps: Cook the ground beef until golden.
Add the bolognese sauce and cook for a few more minutes.
Assemble the lasagna on a baking tray, alternating layers of pasta, meat with sauce and grated cheese.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 25 minutes or until the pasta is cooked and the cheese is golden.

title: Tuna And Tomato Cannelloni
steps: Cook the pasta according to the instructions on the package.
Mix the tuna and tomatoes to make a filling.
Fill the cannelloni with the tuna and tomato mixture.
Cover the cannelloni with bechamel sauce.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Chilindrón Chicken
steps: Cook the chicken in a pan with oil until golden.
Add the chopped peppers and tomatoes.
Add chopped garlic and vinegar.
Let it cook until the chicken is tender.

title: Grilled Emperor With Garlic And Parsley
steps: Step 1: Cut the emperor into fillets.
Step 2: Peel and chop the garlic cloves.
Step 3: Mix the chopped garlic with fresh chopped parsley.
Step 4: Spread the garlic and parsley mixture over the emperor fillets.
Step 5: Place the fillets on a hot griddle and cook until done.

title: Mushroom And Parmesan Risotto
steps: Heat the oil in a large pot and add the chopped onion. Cook until soft.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the rice and stir to coat it with oil. Cook for a few minutes until the rice is transparent.
Add the chopped mushrooms and cook for a few minutes until they release their juice.
Begin adding the vegetable broth little by little, stirring constantly.
Once the rice has absorbed all the broth, add more broth and continue cooking until the rice is cooked.
Add the grated parmesan and stir well. Let rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Rabbit With Garlic
steps: 1. Cut the rabbit into pieces and season them with salt and pepper.
2. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the rabbit pieces and brown them on all sides until they are well cooked.
4. Add the chopped garlic to the pan and cook for a few more minutes until soft.
5. Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Madrid-Style Tripe
steps: Cook the beef tripe in water for 30 minutes.
In a saucepan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic in oil until golden.
Add the cooked tripe and brown them with the onion and garlic.
Add the sweet and spicy paprika, stirring well so that it mixes with the sauce.
Add the crushed tomato and white wine. Cook for 1 and a half hours over medium heat.

title: Grilled Cuttlefish With Aioli
steps: Clean the cuttlefish and cut it into strips.
In a frying pan with hot olive oil, brown the cuttlefish pieces until they are cooked.
Grind the garlic cloves to make the aioli. Add olive oil little by little while mixing.

title: Garden-Style Veal
steps: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until golden brown on all sides. Remove the beef from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add the chopped peppers, carrots, garlic and onion. Cook until soft.
Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan and cook for a few more minutes.
Return the beef to the pan and stir to combine all the ingredients. Cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Manchego Ratatouille With Fried Egg
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and pepper in oil.
Step 2: Add the chopped tomatoes and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Step 4: Beat the eggs in a plate and fry them in a separate pan.
Step 5: Serve the ratatouille on a plate, accompanied by the fried egg.

title: Grilled Lamb Chops
steps: Season the chops with salt and pepper.
Place the chops on a preheated grill.
Cook until they are to your liking.

title: Baked Sea Bass On The Back
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Clean the sea bass and pat dry with kitchen paper.
Place it in a baking dish, add a splash of extra virgin olive oil, sweet paprika and salt to taste.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until cooked.

title: Villaroy Chicken Breasts
steps: Marinate the chicken with spices and oil for 30 minutes.
Cook the chicken breasts in a hot skillet until golden brown on all sides.

title: Seafood Fideuá
steps: Heat the oil in a paella pan and brown the onion and garlic.
Add the tomato and cook until soft.
Add the rice and toast it lightly.
Add water or seafood broth, season with salt and pepper and let it cook.
When the rice is almost done, add the pieces of fish and seafood.
Cook until they are done and serve the fideuá in the paella pan.

title: Baked Stuffed Chicken Thighs
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Step 2: Mix the chicken thighs with the chopped onion, chopped garlic and parsley.

title: Serrano Ham Croquettes
steps: Cut the serrano ham into small pieces.
Mix the ham with a beaten egg and the breadcrumbs until forming a compact dough.
Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil until golden.
Remove the croquettes from the oil and place them on kitchen paper to eliminate excess fat.

title: Roman-Style Squid
steps: Step 1: Clean and dry the squid.
Step 2: Beat the eggs in a deep plate.
Step 3: Dip the squid in the flour, shaking off the excess.
Step 4: Dip the squid in the beaten egg.
Step 5: Fry the squid in hot oil until golden.

title: Garlic Prawns
steps: Heat oil in a frying pan.
Add the chopped garlic and fry until golden.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Galician-Style Octopus
steps: Cook the octopus in a pot with water and salt for about 45 minutes.
Once cooked, let cool and cut into slices.
In a frying pan, heat extra virgin olive oil and add the octopus pieces.
Add the sweet paprika and coarse salt to taste.
Serve hot with a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil on top.

title: Bravas Potatoes
steps: Cut the potatoes into large pieces.
Fry the potatoes in hot oil until golden and crispy.
Mix the sweet paprika with vinegar to make the brava sauce.
Serve the potatoes hot with the brava sauce on top.

title: Eggs Stuffed With Tuna
steps: Cook the eggs until they are hard-boiled. Let them cool and then cut them in half.
Mix the tuna with the mayonnaise in a bowl.
Fill each egg half with the tuna and mayonnaise mixture.

title: Steamed Or Vinaigrette Mussels
steps: Step 1: Wash the mussels and throw them away if they do not close when you shake.
Step 2: Put the mussels in a pot with a little water and cover it. Cook until all the mussels are open.
Step 3 (optional): For the vinaigrette, mix olive oil, vinegar and a little salt in a small bowl.

title: Iberian Cheese And Sausage Board
steps: Cut the cheese and ham into appropriate portions.
Arrange the sausages on a plate in an attractive way.

title: Tuna And Tomato Dumplings
steps: Mix the flour with water until it forms a dough.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
Cut the tomato into small pieces and mix with the tuna.
Roll out the dough and cut circles for the dumplings.
Fill each circle with the tuna and tomato mixture.
Close the dumplings and bake for 20 minutes at 180 degrees.

title: Smoked Salmon And Cream Cheese Toast
steps: Toast the bread.
Spreading a thin layer of cream cheese on each toast.
Place a piece of smoked salmon on each toast.

title: Garlic Mushrooms
steps: Finely chop the garlic.
In a frying pan, heat the olive oil over medium-low heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until golden.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for a few more minutes.
Sprinkle with fresh chopped parsley before serving.

title: Anchovies In Vinegar
steps: Clean the anchovies and cut them into small pieces.
Mix the vinegar with a little water and salt.
Immerse the anchovies in the vinegar mixture for 1 hour.

title: Spring Rolls
steps: Finely chop the leek, garlic and ginger.
Mix the chopped ingredients with the soy sauce and a splash of oil.
Spread the mixture over the lettuce leaves and roll them to form rolls.
Fry the rolls in a pan with plenty of hot oil until golden.

title: Classic Hummus With Crudités
steps: Cook the chickpeas until soft.
Blend the cooked chickpeas with tahini, garlic and lemon juice in a food processor until smooth.
Add sweet paprika to the hummus and mix well.
Serve the hummus with various crudités.

title: Homemade Guacamole With Nachos
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the avocado.
Step 2: Chop the onion, cilantro and tomato.
Step 3: Mix everything in a bowl and squeeze the lemon.

title: Dates Wrapped In Bacon
steps: Cut the dates in half and wrap them in strips of bacon.
Place the bacon-wrapped dates on a baking tray and bake at 200°C for about 15 minutes or until the bacon is crispy.

title: Grilled Wild Asparagus
steps: Wash the wild asparagus and cut the lower part of the stem.
Heat the olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the wild asparagus to the pan and cook for 5-7 minutes or until tender.

title: Prawn And Garlic Scrambled Eggs
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a frying pan and add the chopped garlic.
Step 2: Add the shrimp and cook until pink.

title: Baked Provolone With Oregano
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Cut the provolone into slices and place them in a baking dish.
Sprinkle dried oregano over the provolone slices.
Bake for about 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden.

title: Chorizo ​​In Cider
steps: Step 1: Heat a frying pan with a little oil.
Step 2: Add the chorizo ​​and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add the cider to the pan and let it boil until reduced by half.
Step 4: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Cinnamon Rice Pudding
steps: Step 1: Wash the rice and place it in a pot with the milk. Cook over medium heat until the rice is soft.
Step 2: Add the sugar and cinnamon to the rice and milk mixture. Cook for a few more minutes until the sugar is completely dissolved.
Step 3: Remove from heat and let cool before serving.

title: Homemade Egg Custard
steps: Mix the eggs with half the sugar until you get a foamy mixture.
Add the milk little by little, mixing continuously.
Pour the caramel into a pan and pour it into a flan mold.
Pour the egg mixture into the mold and bake in a water bath for 45 minutes.

title: Chocolate And Walnut Brownie
steps: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler.
Mix the melted chocolate with the eggs and sugar until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add the flour and walnuts to the previous mixture and mix well.
Pour the batter into a brownie mold and bake for 20 minutes at 180 degrees.

title: Baked Cheesecake
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Mix the cream cheese, milk, flour, sugar and eggs in a bowl until you get a smooth mixture.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a cake tin and bake for 45 minutes or until firm in the centre.
Step 4: Let cool before serving.

title: Homemade Custard With Biscuit
steps: Step 1: Heat the milk in a saucepan until it boils.
Step 2: Beat the eggs with the sugar until they are foamy.
Step 3: Pour the hot milk over the beaten eggs, stirring continuously.
Step 4: Put the mixture back in the saucepan and cook over medium-low heat until it thickens.
Step 5: Remove from heat and add cinnamon to taste.
Step 6: Pour the custard into individual cups or glasses and let it cool.
Step 7: Once cold, decorate with crushed cookies.

title: Burnt Catalan Cream
steps: Cook the milk with the cinnamon until it starts to boil.
Beat the eggs with the sugar until they are foamy.
Add the hot milk little by little to the beaten eggs, stirring constantly.

title: Classic Apple Pie
steps: Prepare the pie dough according to the package instructions.
Peel and chop the apples.
Fill the dough with the apple mixture and bake.

title: Strawberries With Cream
steps: Wash the strawberries and cut them into pieces.
Whip the cream and serve over the strawberries.

title: Chocolate Mousse
steps: Melt the dark chocolate together with the vegetarian butter in a double boiler.
Add the granulated sugar and mix until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add water little by little while mixing to form a thick cream.
Remove from heat and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the chocolate mousse in individual glasses and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: Yogurt Sponge Cake (Glass Measurement)
steps: Mix all the ingredients in a bowl until you obtain a homogeneous mass.
Pour the dough into a buttered cake pan.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 25 minutes or until done.

title: Milk French Toast
steps: Soak the bread in milk for a few minutes.
Drain excess milk from the bread.
Pass the bread through beaten egg.
Fry the bread in a pan with hot oil until golden.
Remove the torrijas from the heat and sprinkle them with sugar.

title: Seasonal Fruit Salad
steps: Wash all the fruits.
Peel the apples, bananas and kiwis.
Cut the strawberries, grapes and tangerines into small pieces.
Mix all the fruits in a bowl.
Serve and enjoy your seasonal fruit salad.

title: Homemade Vanilla Ice Cream
steps: 1. Mix the milk and cream in a pot.
2. Add the vanilla and heat until it boils.
3. Remove from heat and let cool.
4. Place in a container suitable for ice cream and freeze for at least 6 hours.
5. Remove from the freezer and beat with a mixer before serving.

title: Tiramisu
steps: Separate the whites from the yolks and beat the whites until stiff.
Mix the yolks with the sugar until you obtain a clear and foamy mixture.
Add the mascarpone to the previous mixture and mix well until smooth.
Add the coffee dissolved in a little water and the cognac or rum.
Stir the ladyfingers type cookies into the coffee with liqueur.
In a baking dish, place a layer of the mascarpone mixture and then a layer of the soaked cookies.
Repeat the layers until the mascarpone and cookie mixture runs out.
Cover with plastic wrap and let it rest in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours before serving.

title: Curd With Honey And Walnuts
steps: Heat the milk until it boils.
Remove from heat and add honey.
Stir until completely dissolved.
Pour into individual molds and let cool.
Once cool, garnish with chopped walnuts.

title: Classic Mixed Salad (Lettuce, Tomato, Onion, Tuna)
steps: Cut the lettuce and tomatoes into small pieces.
Chop the onion finely.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Add tuna to taste.

title: Caesar Salad With Chicken
steps: Cook the chicken and cut it into small pieces.
Mix the romaine lettuce leaves with the breadcrumbs and garlic.
Add the chicken pieces to the lettuce mixture and serve.

title: Caprese Salad (Tomato And Fresh Mozzarella)
steps: Cut the tomatoes and fresh mozzarella into slices.
Alternate tomato and mozzarella slices on a plate, placing a basil leaf between each layer.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Tricolor Pasta Salad
steps: Cook the tricolor pasta according to the package instructions.
Cut the cherry tomatoes and onion into small pieces.
Wash and cut the various vegetables into small pieces.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil, vinegar and salt to taste.

title: Russian Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the potatoes and peas.
Step 2: Mix them in a bowl.

title: Chickpea And Spinach Salad
steps: Cook the chickpeas until they are tender.
Wash and chop the spinach, tomato and onion.
Mix the cooked chickpeas with the chopped spinach, tomato and onion.
Add olive oil to taste.

title: Quinoa, Avocado And Tomato Salad
steps: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Cut the avocado and tomato into pieces.
Mix the cooked quinoa with the avocado and tomato.
Add salt, pepper and olive oil to taste.

title: Country Salad (Cooked Potato)
steps: Cook the potatoes until soft.
Mix the chopped lettuce with the cut peppers and tomatoes.
Add the cooked potatoes cut into pieces.
Serve the salad cold.

title: Waldorf Salad (Celery, Apple, Walnuts)
steps: Cut the celery and apple into small pieces.
Mix the ingredients in a bowl.
Add the nuts and mix again.

title: Goat Cheese And Nuts Salad
steps: Wash and cut the lettuce.
Cut the goat cheese into small pieces.
Mix the lettuce, goat cheese and nuts in a bowl.

title: Homemade French Fries
steps: Peel the potatoes and cut them into strips.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan until it reaches 170 degrees Celsius.
Add the cut potatoes to the pan and fry until golden and crispy. Remove with a slotted spoon.

title: Creamy Mashed Potatoes
steps: Cook the potatoes until soft.
Add the milk and butter to a pot and heat until boiling.
Add the cooked potatoes to the pot with the milk and butter, and mix everything until smooth.

title: Steamed Vegetables (Broccoli, Carrot, Cauliflower)
steps: Step 1: Cut the vegetables into small pieces.
Step 2: Steam for 10 minutes until tender.

title: Loose White Rice
steps: Step 1: Wash the rice until the water runs clear.
Step 2: In a pot, heat water and add the rice. Cook over medium-low heat until the rice is soft and the water has been completely absorbed.

title: Sautéed Mushrooms
steps: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Fried Padrón Peppers
steps: Heat oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the padrón peppers and fry until golden on all sides.
Drain the peppers on kitchen paper to remove excess oil.

title: Provençal Roasted Tomatoes
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Cut the tomatoes in half and place them on a baking sheet.
Peel the garlic and place one inside each tomato half.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with rosemary.
Bake for 20 minutes or until soft.

title: Sautéed Green Beans With Ham
steps: Cook the green beans until tender.
In a pan, sauté the ham until golden.
Add the green beans to the pan and sauté everything together for a few minutes.

title: Battered Onion Rings
steps: Cut the onion into thick rings and separate the rings.
Mix the flour with a little water to make a thick mixture.
Dip each onion ring in the flour mixture and then in the beaten egg.
Toss them in breadcrumbs until completely coated.
Fry them in hot oil until golden. Remove them from the heat and drain them on kitchen paper.

title: Baked Bakery Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the potatoes into slices.
Step 2: Mix the flour with water until you obtain a thick dough.
Step 3: Coat the potatoes in the flour mixture and fry them in hot oil until golden.

title: Andalusian Gazpacho
steps: Step 1: Soak stale bread in water for a few minutes.
Step 2: Peel and chop the peppers, cucumbers, tomatoes and garlic.
Step 3: Place all the ingredients in a blender along with a little olive oil and salt to taste.
Step 4: Beat until you obtain a creamy texture.
Step 5: Pour the gazpacho into individual bowls or glasses and serve fresh.

title: Cordoban Salmorejo
steps: Peel the ripe tomatoes and cut them into pieces.
Soak stale bread in water for a few minutes.
Drain the bread and add it to the blender glass along with the tomatoes, a peeled clove of garlic and a pinch of salt.
Beat everything until you get a thick cream. If necessary, add a little water to achieve the desired texture.
Serve the salmorejo in bowls or individual plates and decorate with a splash of extra virgin olive oil.

title: Seafood And Fish Soup
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add chopped onion, garlic and celery. Cook until soft.
Step 3: Add chopped carrot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the fish cut into pieces and the seafood. Cook until almost done.
Step 5: Pour vegetable broth into the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer over medium-low heat for about 10 minutes.
Step 6: Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Zucchini Cream And Cheese
steps: Step 1: Cook the zucchini until soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked zucchini with the cheese until you get a cream.

title: Garlic Soup (Castilian Soup)
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and fry until golden.
Step 3: Add the hard bread cut into pieces.
Step 4: Pour the white wine and let it reduce by half.
Step 5: Add water to cover the ingredients, season with salt and pepper and let cook for 20 minutes.
Step 6: Add the sweet paprika at the end of cooking.

title: Traditional Spanish Sangria
steps: Peel the oranges and lemons and put the peels in a large jar.
Pour the red wine into the jug.
Add sugar to taste.
Cover with water and let it marinate for a few hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
Serve over ice.

title: Homemade Lemonade With Mint
steps: Squeeze the lemons to obtain their juice.
Add the water and mint to the lemon juice.
Mix all the ingredients well.
Serve over ice and enjoy your homemade lemonade with mint.

title: Natural Strawberry And Banana Smoothie
steps: Step 1: Wash and cut the strawberries.
Step 2: Peel and cut the banana.
Step 3: Place the ingredients in a blender and mix until smooth.

title: Homemade Mayonnaise Sauce
steps: Step 1: Beat the eggs in a bowl.
Step 2: Add the olive oil little by little while continuing to beat until you obtain a thick sauce.

title: Basic Homemade Bread (Loaf)
steps: Mix the flour and water until it forms a dough.
Knead the dough on a floured surface.
Let the dough rise for 1 hour.
Bake at 200 degrees Celsius for 30 minutes.

title: Asturian Fabada
steps: Soak the beans overnight.
In a large pot, fry the bacon and pancetta until golden brown.
Add the soaked beans to the pot along with enough water to cover them.
Add the chorizo ​​and blood sausage.
Cook everything for about 1 hour or until the beans are soft.
Serve hot.

title: Spaghetti Bolognese (Minced Meat And Tomato)
steps: Cook the minced meat in a pan until golden.
Add the crushed tomatoes and cook for a few minutes.
Add water and let it reduce by half.
Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions.
Mix the spaghetti with the bolognese sauce.

title: Sea Bream With Salt
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Wash the sea bream and dry it with kitchen paper.
Place the sea bream on an oven-safe tray.
Cover the sea bream completely with coarse salt.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the fish is cooked.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.

title: Garlic Chicken
steps: Cut the chicken into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a frying pan and add the chicken pieces. Cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for a few more minutes until soft.
Remove the pan from the heat and let the chicken rest in the garlic before serving.

title: Stewed Oxtail
steps: 1. Cut the onion and garlic into small pieces.
2. In a large pot, brown the oxtail over medium-high heat.
3. Add the onion and garlic, cook until they are transparent.
4. Add the crushed tomato, red wine, sweet paprika, bay leaf and cloves.
5. Bring to a boil and let cook for approximately 2 hours.
6. Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Eggplants Stuffed With Meat
steps: Cut the eggplants in half and empty the pulp. Cook the pulp in a pan until soft.
Mix the ground beef with the chopped onion, chopped garlic and crushed tomato. Cook over medium heat until the meat is cooked.
Fill the empty eggplants with the meat and breadcrumb mixture. Dip in beaten egg and fry in a pan until golden.

title: Cod With Tomato
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod overnight.
Step 2: Cook the tomatoes until soft.
Step 3: Add the cooked cod to the tomatoes and cook for a few more minutes.

title: Breaded Veal Schnitzel (Milanesa)
steps: Step 1: Season the beef with salt and pepper on both sides.
Step 2: Dip the beef fillets in beaten egg, then in breadcrumbs. Fry them in a hot pan until golden brown.

title: Marmitako De Bonito
steps: Step 1: Cut the onion and peppers into small pieces.
Step 2: In a large pot, heat the olive oil and add the onion and peppers. Cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the diced potatoes and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the crushed tomato and cook for about 10 more minutes.
Step 5: Add the tuna cut into large pieces and cook for about 20-25 minutes until the tuna meat is well cooked.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Spinach And Ricotta Cannelloni
steps: Cook the spinach and drain it well.
Mix the spinach with the ricotta until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Fill the cannelloni with the spinach and ricotta mixture.
Cook the cannelloni in boiling water for a few minutes.
Prepare the bechamel sauce and cover the cannelloni with it.
Bake the cannelloni at medium-low temperature until golden.

title: Grilled Swordfish
steps: Step 1: Cut the swordfish into fillets
Step 2: Sauté the swordfish fillets in a frying pan with oil for a few minutes on each side

title: Cracked Eggs With Ham
steps: Cut the ham into small pieces.
In a frying pan, heat a little oil and add the eggs. Stir until cooked.
Add the ham to the pan with the eggs and mix everything so that they are well integrated.
Serve hot and enjoy your dish.

title: Pork Cheeks In Red Wine
steps: 1. Season the pork cheeks with salt and pepper.
2. In a pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic until golden.
3. Add the salted cheeks to the pot and seal them on all sides.
4. Add the sweet paprika and red wine. Cook until the wine is reduced by half.
5. Add enough water to cover the cheeks, along with the bay leaves and thyme sprigs.
6. Cover the pot and let it cook over low heat for approximately 2 hours.
7. Remove the cheeks from the pot and reduce them over high heat until the liquid has thickened.

title: Black Rice With Squid
steps: Step 1: Cook the black rice until soft.
Step 2: Add the squid cut into pieces and cook until tender.

title: Baked Stuffed Turkey
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Clean and finely chop the onion and garlic.
In a frying pan, sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Mix the gluten-free breadcrumbs with the aromatic herbs.
Stuff the turkey with the breadcrumb and herb mixture.
Cook in the preheated oven for 1 hour or until the turkey is cooked.

title: Navarrese Trout (With Ham)
steps: Step 1: Season the trout with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Fry the trout in a pan with olive oil until golden on both sides.
Step 3: Add the ham to the pan and cook until crispy.
Step 4: Serve the trout with the ham on top.

title: Homemade Saint Jacobs (Ham And Cheese)
steps: Step 1: Take a slice of bread and place a slice of ham on it.
Step 2: Place a slice of cheese on the ham.
Step 3: Cover with another slice of bread to make a sandwich.
Step 4: Heat a frying pan over medium heat and add a little butter.
Step 5: Place the sandwich in the pan and let it brown on both sides until the cheese is melted.

title: Casserole Noodles With Ribs
steps: Cook the pork ribs until golden and soft.
Add the chopped onion and crushed garlic, cook until soft.
Add the sweet paprika and crushed tomato, cook for a few minutes.
Add the noodles and cover them with meat broth. Cook until the noodles are tender.
Serve hot.

title: Chicken In Pepitoria
steps: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Brown the chicken in a saucepan with olive oil.
Add chopped garlic and sauté until golden.
Add the sweet paprika and stir.
Add the crushed tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Add the white wine and let it reduce.
Cover the pot with water, add the salt and cook until the chicken is tender.

title: Donostiarra-Style Sea Bass
steps: Step 1: Season the sea bass with salt and sweet paprika.
Step 2: Heat olive oil in a pan and add the chopped garlic.
Step 3: Add the sea bass to the pan and cook for a few minutes on each side until golden and cooked through.

title: Greek Moussaka
steps: Cook the eggplants and potatoes in the oven until they are soft.
Make a sauce with the onion, garlic and lamb meat.
Mix the cooked meat with the milk and breadcrumbs.
Assemble the moussaka in a baking dish, alternating layers of eggplant, potatoes and meat with milk.
Bake at 180 degrees until golden on top.

title: Pickled Quail
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a frying pan and add the quail to brown them.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic, sweet paprika and bay leaf. Sauté everything for a few minutes.
Step 3: Add the vinegar and cook over medium heat until it reduces a little.

title: Four Cheese Pizza
steps: Preheat the oven to high temperature.
Spread the pizza dough on a pizza pan.
Cover the dough with tomato sauce.
Add the cheeses: mozzarella, gorgonzola and roquefort.
Sprinkle parmesan over the cheeses.
Bake for about 15 minutes or until the cheese is golden and bubbly.

title: Piquillo Peppers Stuffed With Cod
steps: Step 1: Soak the piquillo peppers in hot water for a few minutes.
Step 2: In a frying pan with oil, brown the shredded cod and add the chopped garlic.
Step 3: Mix the cod with breadcrumbs until you obtain a compact texture.
Step 4: Stuff the piquillo peppers with the cod and breadcrumb mixture.
Step 5: Fry the stuffed peppers in a pan with hot oil until golden.

title: Fish And Seafood Zarzuela
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic and pepper in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the tomatoes and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the fish and seafood to the sauce and cook until they are almost done.
Step 4: Add the white wine and let it reduce.
Step 5: Add water and let cook until the ingredients are well integrated.

title: Sirloin Wellington
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Step 2: Cover the sirloin with the puff pastry.

title: Grilled Iberian Pork
steps: Salt the Iberian pork and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Preheat the iron to high heat.
Place the Iberian pork on the grill and cook for about 4-5 minutes on each side.
Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Squid In Its Ink With Rice
steps: Step 1: Clean the squid and separate the ink.
Step 2: Cook the rice in salted water until al dente.
Step 3: In a frying pan, heat olive oil and add the squid. Fry until golden brown on both sides.
Step 4: Add the squid ink to the pan with the fried squid and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Mix the cooked rice with the squid and its ink. Add salt to taste and serve hot.

title: Zucchini Omelette
steps: Peel and cut the zucchini into thin slices.
Cook the zucchini slices for a few minutes until they are soft.
In a bowl, mix the beaten eggs with the chopped parsley.
Add the cooked zucchini slices and chopped onion to the bowl with the eggs.
Mix all the ingredients well.
Heat a nonstick frying pan over medium heat. Once hot, pour the zucchini and egg mixture into the skillet.
Cook the tortilla for a few minutes until the edge is golden brown and can be easily released from the pan.
Carefully flip the tortilla to cook the other side. Repeat until both sides are golden brown.
Remove the tortilla from the pan and let it cool before serving.

title: Roasted Suckling Pig
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Season the suckling pig with salt and pepper.
Place the suckling pig on a baking tray.
Bake for approximately 45 minutes or until cooked.

title: Ossobuco Milanese
steps: Cut the meat into large pieces and season with salt and pepper.
In a large pot, sauté the onion, leek and carrots until golden.
Add the meat to the pot and cook until it is sealed on all sides.
Add the chopped garlic, vinegar, red wine, tomato concentrate, bay leaf and meat broth. Cover the meat with the liquid.
Cook over medium heat for about 2 hours or until the meat is tender.
Serve the ossobuco with the reduced sauce.

title: Lomo Saltado (Peruvian Style)
steps: Cut the beef tenderloin into thin strips.
In a hot pan, add a little oil and fry the tenderloin pieces until golden brown. Remove from heat and reserve.
In the same pan, add the chopped onion and crushed garlic. Fry them until they are transparent.
Add the potatoes cut into large pieces and fry them together with the onion and garlic for a few minutes.
Return the tenderloin to the pan and mix everything well. Add a little water, salt and pepper to taste.
Cook everything over medium heat until the potatoes are soft.
Serve hot and accompany with rice.

title: Soupy Rice With Lobster
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion and garlic in oil until golden.
Step 2: Add the rice and stir to lightly toast.
Step 3: Add the sweet paprika and stir well.
Step 4: Pour the fish broth and let it boil. Then, cook over low heat until the rice is done.
Step 5: Add the lobster cut into pieces and cook for a few more minutes.

title: Oven Roast Lamb
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Season the lamb with salt, pepper, garlic and thyme.
Place the lamb in a baking dish and add a little water.
Bake for about 45 minutes or until the lamb is cooked.
Remove from the oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
Add fresh chopped parsley as a garnish.

title: Meatloaf And Mashed Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Peel and chop the onion and garlic. Fry them in a pan with a little oil until golden.
Step 3: Add the ground beef to the pan and cook until cooked through. Remove from heat and let cool.
Step 4: Peel and chop the potatoes. Cook them in a pot with water until they are soft. Drain them and mash them until you obtain a puree.
Step 5: Mix the meat, mashed potatoes, breadcrumbs, egg and milk in a bowl. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Step 6: Pour the mixture into a cake pan. Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden and cooked through.

title: Seafood Salpicón
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the garlic, onion and pepper.
Step 2: In a frying pan with hot oil, sauté the garlic, onion and pepper until soft.
Step 3: Add the seafood cut into small pieces and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the chopped tomatoes and cook everything together for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve the seafood salpicón hot or cold.

title: Baby Beans With Ham
steps: Step 1: Cook the baby beans according to the package instructions.
Step 2: Cut the ham into small pieces.
Step 3: Mix the cooked beans with the ham and serve.

title: Garlic And Parsley Bread
steps: Step 1: Mix the ingredients.
Step 2: Knead the mixture.

title: Goat Cheese And Caramelized Onion Toast
steps: Caramelize the onion in oil until golden.
Cut the goat cheese into slices.
Toast the bread.
Place the cheese slices on the toasted bread.
Heat in the oven until the cheese melts.
Serve hot.

title: Crispy Fried Chicken Wings
steps: Step 1: Cut the chicken wings into pieces.
Step 2: Mix the flour with salt and pepper.
Step 3: Dip the chicken pieces in the flour mixture.
Step 4: Fry the chicken pieces in hot oil until golden and crispy.

title: Cheese Fingers (Tequeños Or Mozzarella Sticks)
steps: Cut the mozzarella cheese into sticks.
Dip the cheese sticks into the tequeños dough, making sure they are completely covered.
Fry the cheese fingers in hot oil until golden and crispy.
Drain excess oil on absorbent paper.
Serve hot with sauce of your choice.

title: Beef Carpaccio With Parmesan
steps: Freeze the beef for a few hours before cutting it.
Finely cut the beef and arrange it on a plate.
Grate the parmesan over the meat.
Add salt, pepper and olive oil to taste.

title: Tuna Tartare With Avocado
steps: Cut the tuna into small pieces and put it in a bowl.
Add the chopped onion, chopped cilantro, lemon juice and mix everything.
Cut the avocado into cubes and add it to the bowl.
Carefully mix all the ingredients.
Serves Immediately.

title: Baked Scallops Au Gratin
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Clean the scallops and place them in a baking dish.
Mix breadcrumbs, parmesan and melted butter.
Add minced garlic to the breadcrumb mixture.
Coat each scallop with the breadcrumb mixture.
Bake for 10 minutes or until golden.

title: Grilled Razor Clams
steps: Clean the razors.
Place in a hot pan without oil.
Cook until they open and are golden on both sides.

title: Eels With Garlic
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a frying pan.
Step 2: Add chopped garlic and peas, cook until tender.

title: Fried Blood Sausage From Burgos
steps: Heat oil in a frying pan.
Add the blood sausage and fry until golden brown on all sides.

title: Tumaca Bread With Serrano Ham
steps: Grate the tomato and garlic in a bowl.
Add salt to taste and mix with the breadcrumbs.
Finely cut the serrano ham.
Assemble the pieces of bread with the tomato and garlic mixture.
Garnish with slices of serrano ham.

title: Ham And Cheese Quesadillas
steps: Step 1: Heat a frying pan over medium heat.
Step 2: Place a wheat tortilla in the pan.
Step 3: Add ham and cheese to half of the tortilla.
Step 4: Fold the tortilla in half to cover the filling.
Step 5: Cook until both sides are golden brown and the cheese is melted.

title: Shrimp Pancakes
steps: Step 1: Mix shrimp and flour
Step 2: Fry the mixture

title: Grilled Provoleta
steps: Turn on the grill and wait for it to be hot.
Place the provolone cheese on a special cheese grate or on aluminum foil with holes.
Season the cheese with salt to taste.
Place the grill or paper on the grill and cook until the cheese is melted and golden.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Nachos With Melted Cheese
steps: Heat the cheese in a microwave-safe container until melted.
Place the nachos on a plate.
Pour the melted cheese over the nachos.

title: Chistorra With Cider
steps: Step 1: Heat the chistorra in a frying pan without oil until crispy.
Step 2: Add the cider and cook until reduced by half.

title: Cod Fritters
steps: Step 1: Soak the desalted cod for a few hours.
Step 2: Drain and dry the cod well. Grind it in a food processor until you get a fine paste.
Step 3: Mix the flour with the eggs and add the cod paste. Knead until you obtain a homogeneous dough.
Step 4: Form the dough into balls and fry them in hot oil until golden brown on all sides.

title: Mushroom And Shrimp Scramble
steps: Step 1: Fry the mushrooms in a pan with oil until golden.
Step 2: Add the shrimp and cook until pink. Add the beaten eggs and stir until set.

title: Santiago Tart (Almond)
steps: Mix the eggs and icing sugar until you get a foamy mixture.
Add the almond flour little by little and mix until a homogeneous dough is formed.
Pour the dough into a buttered mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 25 minutes or until golden.

title: Tocino De Cielo
steps: Beat the eggs with the sugar until they are well integrated.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and cook in a water bath for 45 minutes over low heat.

title: Fried Milk
steps: Step 1: Mix the milk with the flour until you obtain a thick dough.
Step 2: Add the eggs one by one, mixing well after each addition.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 45 minutes.
Step 4: Once cooked, cool the fried milk before serving it.

title: Quesada Pasiega
steps: Mix the cheese dough with the milk until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add the egg and continue mixing.
Add sugar and cinnamon to taste.
Pour the mixture into a baking mold and cook at 180 degrees Celsius for about 30 minutes or until golden.

title: Three Chocolate Cake
steps: Melt the dark, milk and white chocolate separately in a bain-marie.
Add the melted butter to each chocolate and mix until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Mix the rice flour with the sugar in a bowl.
Add the melted chocolates to the flour and sugar mixture, alternating between the three types of chocolate.
Pour the mixture into a cake pan and bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes.
Let cool before serving.

title: Chocolate Coulant
steps: Melt the butter together with the chocolate in a double boiler.
Add the eggs and mix until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add the flour and sugar, mix well.
Pour the mixture into individual molds and bake at 200 degrees for 12 minutes.

title: Pears In Red Wine
steps: Peel the pears and cut them into pieces.
In a pot, heat the red wine over medium heat until it begins to boil.
Add the pears to the red wine and cook for about 15 minutes or until soft.
Serve the pears hot with a little of the red wine from the pot.

title: Panna Cotta With Red Berries
steps: Mix the heavy cream, milk and sugar in a saucepan.
Heat the mixture over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat and add the unflavored gelatin soaked in cold water.
Mix well until the gelatin is completely dissolved.
Pour the mixture into individual molds and let cool in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours.
Unmold the panna cotta and serve with a garnish of red fruits.

title: Crepes With Chocolate
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with the eggs and milk.
Step 2: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler.
Step 3: Add the melted chocolate to the crepe mixture.
Step 4: Cook the crepes in a hot pan until golden brown on both sides.

title: Apple Compote
steps: Peel and cut the apples into pieces.
Cook the apple pieces in a pot with a little water until they are soft.
Grind the applesauce until obtaining a smooth texture.

title: Yemas De Santa Teresa
steps: Separate the yolks from the whites.
Mix the yolks with the sugar until you obtain a thick and yellow mixture.
Cook the mixture in a double boiler, stirring constantly until it thickens.
Let cool and serve.

title: Cream Profiteroles
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with the water until it forms a paste.
Step 2: Add the cream and knead until you obtain a homogeneous dough.

title: Carrot Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Grate the carrots and set aside.
Mix the softened butter with the sugar until you get a creamy mixture.
Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Add the sifted flour along with the baking powder and mix until well integrated.
Add the grated carrots and mix to distribute them evenly.
Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Let cool before serving.

title: Miguelitos De Crema
steps: Mix the flour, sugar and eggs until it forms a dough.
Add the cream to the mixture and stir until smooth.
Make balls with the dough and place them in a cookie mold.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 20 minutes or until golden.

title: Lemon Sorbet With Cava
steps: Squeeze the juice from the lemons.
Add the cava and mix well.
Freeze in a container suitable for sorbets.

title: Roasted Pepper And Belly Salad
steps: Step 1: Roast the peppers and let them cool.
Step 2: Peel and cut the peppers into strips. Mix them with the crumbled belly.

title: Greek Salad (Feta, Olives, Cucumber)
steps: Cut the cucumber into thin slices.
Mix the salad, olives and feta in a bowl.
Dress with olive oil and vinegar.

title: Coleslaw
steps: Cut the cabbage into thin strips.
Mix mayonnaise and yogurt to make a creamy sauce.
Add the chopped onion to the sauce.
Mix the cabbage with the mayonnaise and yogurt sauce.

title: Rice Salad With Corn And Peas
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Boil the peas until tender.
Mix the cooked rice, corn and peas in a bowl.
Add an olive oil and lemon vinaigrette to taste.

title: Malaga Salad (Cod And Orange)
steps: Step 1: Cook the cod.
Step 2: Mix the cod with the orange in a bowl.

title: Pipirrana From Jaén
steps: Cut all the ingredients into small pieces.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil and vinegar to taste.

title: White Bean And Tomato Salad
steps: Cook the white beans until soft.
Cut the tomatoes into pieces and mix them with the white beans.

title: Smoked Salad (Salmon, Cod)
steps: Cut the lettuce and tomatoes into small pieces.
Peel and finely chop the onion.
Place the lettuce, tomatoes and onion in a bowl.
Add the smoked salmon and smoked cod cut into pieces.
Mix all the ingredients and serve.

title: Tabbouleh (Couscous Salad)
steps: Cook the couscous according to the package instructions.
Cut the red pepper, onion and tomatoes into small pieces.
Wash and finely chop the mint.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil and lemon juice. Mix well.

title: Raf Tomato Salad With Coarse Salt
steps: Cut the raf tomato into pieces.
Place the tomato pieces on a plate.
Season with coarse salt to taste.

title: Poor Style Potatoes
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Heat the oil in a frying pan and add the potatoes.
Cook over medium heat until golden brown on all sides.
Serve hot.

title: Vegetable Escalivada
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Peel and cut the eggplants into thick slices.
Cut the peppers in half, remove the seeds and cut them into large pieces.
Peel the onion and cut it into quarters.
Place the eggplants, peppers and onion on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil and salt.
Bake for 25 minutes or until soft and lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool.

title: Rice Three Delicacies
steps: Step 1: Wash and drain the rice.
Step 2: In a pot, sauté the chopped leek with a little oil until it is transparent.
Step 3: Add the minced pork to the pot and cook until golden.
Step 4: Add the washed rice to the pot, stir well so that it is coated with the sauce.
Step 5: Add water to cover the rice, season with salt and pepper to taste and cook over medium heat until the rice is done.
Step 6: Turn off the heat and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Creamed Spinach
steps: Step 1: Cook the spinach until soft.
Step 2: Add the cream and mix well.
Step 3: Serve hot.

title: Grilled Corn On The Cob
steps: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Place the corn on the cob on the grill and cook for about 10-15 minutes, turning every few minutes until lightly browned.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.

title: Vegetable Stew
steps: Chop the cauliflower and carrot into small pieces.
Sauté the peppers in a pan with a little oil until soft.
Add the cauliflower and carrot to the pan and cook for a few minutes.
Add the peas and cook everything together until the vegetables are tender.

title: Roasted Sweet Potato
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Wash and dry the sweet potatoes.
Cut the sweet potatoes into large pieces.
Place the sweet potato pieces on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden and soft.

title: Fried Yuca
steps: Peel the cassava and cut it into pieces.
Fry the cassava pieces in hot oil until golden.
Drain excess oil and serve hot.

title: Zucchini And Eggplant Ratatouille
steps: Step 1: Cut the zucchini and eggplant into small pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the chopped onion and chopped garlic in a pan with oil until golden.
Step 3: Add the peppers cut into pieces and fry for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the zucchini and eggplant to the pan and cook until tender.
Step 5: Add the crushed tomatoes and let them cook along with the vegetables for a few more minutes.
Step 6: Adjust the salt and serve hot as a garnish.

title: Peas With Ham
steps: Step 1: Cook the peas until tender.
Step 2: Add the ham and cook for a few more minutes.

title: Mince Soup (Ham And Egg)
steps: Cook the ham until golden.
Add the eggs and cook until set.

title: Vichyssoise (Cold Leek Cream)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the leeks in butter until soft.
Step 2: Add the potatoes cut into pieces and cook until soft.
Step 3: Blend the leek and potato mixture until you obtain a smooth cream.
Step 4: Let cool before serving.

title: Pumpkin And Carrot Cream
steps: Step 1: Cook the pumpkin and carrots until soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked pumpkin and carrots in a blender until you obtain a smooth cream.
Step 3: Add water or vegetable broth to adjust the desired consistency.
Step 4: Season with salt, pepper and any other spices you prefer.
Step 5: Heat the cream over low heat before serving.

title: Meat Broth
steps: Cook the meat until golden brown on all sides.
Add the vegetables and cook until soft.
Add water and cook over low heat for a few hours to obtain a tasty broth.
Serve hot

title: Cabellín Noodle Soup
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the chopped onion and garlic, cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the chicken cut into small pieces and cook until golden.
Step 4: Add the chopped peppers and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Step 6: Add the noodles and cook until tender.
Step 7: Serve hot.

title: Tiger Nut Horchata
steps: Soak the tiger nuts overnight.
Peel and dry the soaked tiger nuts.
Grind the tiger nuts in a grinder or food processor.
Add water and sugar to the tigernut puree and mix well.
Strain the mixture to obtain a homogeneous horchata.

title: Tinto De Verano
steps: Mix red wine and orangeade in a 1:1 ratio.
Serve over ice cubes.

title: Lemon Granita
steps: Squeeze the lemons to obtain their juice.
Mix the lemon juice with sugar until it is completely dissolved.
Add water and mix all the ingredients well.
Freeze the mixture in an ice cream mold or flat tray, stirring every hour until a slushie forms.

title: Pink Sauce (Cocktail)
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the garlic.
Step 2: Sauté the garlic in a pan with olive oil until golden.
Step 3: Add the chopped peppers to the pan and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the chopped tomatoes and cook over medium heat until soft.
Step 5: Blend all the ingredients together until you obtain a smooth sauce.

title: Homemade Strawberry Jam
steps: Wash the strawberries and cut them into pieces.
Mix the strawberries with the sugar in a pot and cook over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
Add the strawberry and sugar mixture to a larger pot and cook over low heat for about 20 minutes or until thickened.
Let the jam cool before storing it in an airtight container.

title: Chicken In Beer
steps: Step 1: Season the chicken.
Step 2: Brown the chicken in a pan with olive oil.
Step 3: Add the beer and cook over medium heat until half of the liquid is reduced.
Step 4: Cover the pan and let it cook for a few minutes until the chicken is cooked.

title: Chinese-Style Sweet And Sour Pork
steps: Cut the pork into small pieces and marinate with sweet and sour sauce, minced garlic and grated ginger.
Heat oil in a frying pan and fry the pork pieces until golden brown on all sides.
Add the marinade to the pan and cook for a few more minutes until the pork is cooked.

title: Beef With Bamboo And Mushrooms
steps: Step 1: Cut the beef into pieces and season it with salt and pepper.
Step 2: In a hot pan, add a little oil and brown the meat on all sides.
Step 3: Add the bamboo and mushrooms to the pan and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add water or beef broth and let it boil until the meat is tender.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Meat Cannelloni (Rostit)
steps: Cook the ground beef with chopped onion until golden.
Fill the cannelloni with the meat mixture and cook them in boiling water for a few minutes.
Prepare the bechamel sauce and cover the cannelloni with it.
Sprinkle grated cheese on top and bake in the oven until golden brown.

title: Fried Whiting Andalusian Style
steps: Season the whiting with salt and pepper.
Dip the whiting in flour and beaten eggs.
Fry the whiting in hot oil until golden.
Add chopped garlic and sweet paprika during frying.
Serve hot with lemon and parsley.

title: Roasted Sardines (Espeto)
steps: Preheat the grill to high heat.
Season the sardines with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the grill with aluminum foil.
Place the sardines on the grill and cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Serve the sardines hot and enjoy.

title: Wake-Up Stew (Chickpeas, Spinach And Cod)
steps: Step 1: Soak the chickpeas overnight.
Step 2: Cook the chickpeas until they are tender.
Step 3: In a separate pot, cook the spinach until soft.
Step 4: Add the crumbled cod to the pot with the chickpeas and cook for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add the cooked spinach to the stew and let everything mix well.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: White Beans With Clams
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the white beans and sauté them.
Step 3: Add the sweet paprika, bay leaf and crushed tomato.
Step 4: Cover with water and cook until soft.
Step 5: Add the clams and cook until they open.

title: Rioja Style Potatoes (With Chorizo)
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Step 2: Fry the chorizo ​​in a pan until golden.
Step 3: Add the potatoes to the pan with the chorizo ​​and fry until soft and golden.

title: Paisana Omelette (Vegetables And Chorizo)
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the potatoes into small pieces.
Step 2: In a frying pan with hot oil, fry the potato pieces until golden. Remove them and reserve them.
Step 3: Finely chop the onion and green pepper.
Step 4: In the same pan where the potatoes were fried, add the onion and chopped green pepper. Fry until soft.
Step 5: Add the beaten eggs to the pan with the vegetables and mix well.
Step 6: Add the chorizo ​​cut into thin slices and mix everything again.
Step 7: Add the reserved French fries and mix so that all the ingredients are well integrated.
Step 8: Pour the mixture into a round mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes or until set.

title: Spaghetti With Prawns And Chilli
steps: Step 1: Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions.
Step 2: In a frying pan, heat the olive oil and add the chopped garlic and chilli.
Step 3: Add the shrimp to the pan and cook until pink.
Step 4: Add the cooked spaghetti to the pan and mix everything together.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Barbecue Pizza
steps: Prepare the pizza dough.
Add the tomato sauce to the dough.
Add the cooked chicken in pieces.
Add chopped onion and pepper.
Add grated cheese.

title: Baked Chicken With Bakery Potatoes
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Clean and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Season the chicken with salt and sweet paprika.
Place the potatoes on a baking tray, drizzle them with olive oil and season with salt.
Place the chicken on another baking sheet and bake for 30 minutes.
Add the potatoes to the chicken tray and bake for another 20 minutes or until golden and cooked.

title: German-Style Roasted Knuckle
steps: Preheat the oven to 220 degrees Celsius.
Season the knuckle with salt and pepper.
Add the chopped garlic to the knuckle.
Place the knuckle in a baking dish and bake for about 45 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Lacón With Turnip Tops
steps: Step 1: Cook the lacán in a pot with water and salt until it is tender.
Step 2: In another pot, cook the whole potatoes until soft.
Step 3: In a large frying pan, brown the turnip greens with a little olive oil.
Step 4: Add the cooked lacan and the cooked potatoes to the pan with the turnip tops. Mix everything well.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Tuna With Onions
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large frying pan.
Step 2: Add chopped onion and cook until transparent.

title: Baked Salmon With Honey And Mustard
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
In a bowl, mix the honey and mustard until you get a paste.
Spread the honey-mustard mixture over the salmon fillets.
Place the fillets on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes or until the salmon is cooked.

title: Eggplants With Parmesan (Melanzane)
steps: Cut the eggplants into thick slices.
Pass the slices through corn flour and breadcrumbs.
Fry the eggplants until golden.
Place a layer of fried eggplants in a baking dish, cover with grated Parmesan cheese.
Repeat the process until there are no more eggplants left.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden.

title: Peppers Stuffed With Minced Meat
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Cut the top of the peppers and empty them.
Step 3: Mix the minced meat with spices to taste.
Step 4: Stuff the peppers with the meat mixture.

title: Rabbit With Rosemary
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Season the rabbit and coat it with olive oil.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic cloves and rosemary branches to the rabbit.
Step 4: Place the rabbit in a baking dish and bake for about 45 minutes or until cooked.

title: Duck Magret With Red Berries
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Grilled Beef Steak
steps: Season the meat with salt and pepper.
Cook the meat on a hot grill for a few minutes on each side until cooked to your liking.

title: Lamb Stew
steps: Sauté the onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add the chopped lamb and brown it.
Add the tomato, pepper and potatoes.
Cook everything together with the meat broth until tender.

title: Baked Turbot With Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Step 2: Wash and cut the potatoes into slices.
Step 3: Season the turbot loins with salt and pepper and place them on a baking tray.
Step 4: Add the potatoes around the turbot.
Step 5: Drizzle with olive oil and bake for 20 minutes or until the turbot is cooked.

title: Madrid-Style Sea Bream
steps: Season the sea bream with salt and sweet paprika.
Heat oil in a frying pan and add the chopped garlic.
Add the seasoned sea bream to the pan and fry on both sides until golden brown.
Add white wine to the pan and let the liquid reduce.
Serve the sea bream with the cooking juices.

title: Trout With Almonds
steps: Step 1: Season the trout with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Mix the ground almonds with a little olive oil.
Step 3: Coat the trout in the almond mixture.
Step 4: Cook the trout in a preheated skillet over medium heat until golden brown and cooked through.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
steps: Mix the chicken with yogurt, garlic and ginger. Marinate for an hour.
Cook the chicken until golden brown on all sides.
Add sweet paprika and curry powder to the chicken. Cook for a few minutes.
Add crushed tomato and let cook over medium-low heat for 20 minutes.
Add coconut cream and cook for a few more minutes until the sauce thickens.
Serve hot with rice.

title: Minced Meat And Bean Burritos
steps: Cook the ground beef with onion and garlic until cooked through.
Add the beans and cook for a few more minutes.
Heat the tortillas in a frying pan.
Fill each tortilla with the meat and bean mixture.
Roll up the burritos and serve hot.

title: Tacos Al Pastor (Pork And Pineapple)
steps: Step 1: Cut the pork into small pieces.
Step 2: Grill the pineapple.

title: Quiche Lorraine (Bacon And Cheese)
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Plated Eggs With Chorizo ​​And Tomato
steps: Heat a frying pan with a little oil.
Add the chorizo ​​and fry until golden.
Add the chopped tomatoes and cook until soft.
Beat the eggs in a plate and add salt and pepper to taste.
Pour the eggs into the pan with the chorizo ​​and tomatoes. Cook until they are ready.
Serve hot.

title: Ropa Vieja (Cooked Leftovers)
steps: Cook the beef until tender.
In a frying pan, sauté the chopped onion and pepper.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the crushed tomato and spices.
Add the cooked and shredded meat to the pan.
Cook everything together for a few minutes.
Add vinegar and olive oil, let it reduce a little.

title: Veal Fricandó With Mushrooms
steps: Salt and pepper the meat. Pass it through flour.
Fry the meat in a pan with hot oil until golden brown on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and crushed garlic to the pan, cook until soft.
Add the chopped mushrooms and parsley. Cook until the mushrooms are soft.
Add water or meat broth to cover the meat, let it simmer for about two hours.
Remove the meat and reduce the broth so that it thickens.
Serve the meat with the reduced broth and the mushrooms on top.

title: Soupy Rice With Chicken
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot. Add the chicken and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Step 2: Remove the chicken from the pot and add the onion, garlic and pepper. Cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the rice to the pot and cook for a few minutes until lightly toasted.
Step 4: Add the chicken broth and carrot to the pot. Bring to a boil.
Step 5: Add the cooked chicken to the pot. Reduce the heat and let the rice cook until tender.
Step 6: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Asturian Beef Cachopo
steps: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
Dip the beef pieces in beaten egg and breadcrumbs.
Fry the cachopos in a pan with hot oil until they are golden brown.
Serve with chips or salad.

title: Scorpionfish Cake
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Step 2: Cut the scorpionfish into pieces and season it with salt and pepper.
Step 3: Sauté the chopped garlic in olive oil until golden.
Step 4: Add the scorpionfish to the pan and cook until well done on all sides.
Step 5: Add the chopped parsley and breadcrumbs to the scorpionfish, mix well.
Step 6: Place the mixture in a cake pan and bake for 20 minutes.

title: Cod Brandade
steps: Soak the desalted cod for 24 hours.
Drain the water from the cod and put it in a pot with a little oil.
Add the peeled and crushed garlic cloves, cook until golden.
Remove the pot from the heat and add the chopped parsley.
Mash everything with a fork until you get a paste.

title: Dogfish In Marinade (Bienmesabe)
steps: Step 1: Cut the dogfish into pieces.
Step 2: Crush the garlic cloves and mix with vinegar, paprika and cumin.
Step 3: Add the bay leaf to the marinade.
Step 4: Soak the dogfish pieces in the marinade for at least 2 hours.
Step 5: Heat a frying pan with oil and fry the dogfish pieces until golden.

title: Candied Piquillo Peppers
steps: Preheat the oven to medium-low temperature (150ºC).
Clean the piquillo peppers and dry them with a kitchen towel.
Place the peppers on a baking sheet and drizzle with olive oil.
Bake for about 30 minutes or until soft.
Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.

title: Fried Cheese With Jam
steps: Cut the cheese into slices.
Heat a frying pan with oil and fry the cheese slices until golden on both sides.
Remove the fried cheese slices from the pan and place them on kitchen paper to drain the excess oil.
Serve the fried cheese slices hot accompanied by jam.

title: Sobrasada With Honey On Toast
steps: 1. Spread the sobrasada on toast.
2. Add a little honey on top.

title: Prawn Carpaccio
steps: Freeze the shrimp for 2 hours before preparing them.
Finely cut the frozen shrimp.
Arrange the cut prawns on individual plates.
Dress with lemon and olive oil.

title: Avocado Stuffed Eggs
steps: Cook the eggs until they are hard-boiled. Let them cool and then cut them in half.
Mix the avocado flesh with the chopped onion, sweet paprika and cilantro.
Fill each egg half with the avocado mixture.
Garnish with a little fresh cilantro and lime before serving.

title: Steamed Cockles
steps: Put the cockles in a pot with a little water and chopped garlic.
Cook over high heat until the shells open.
Add chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Cooked Prawns With Mayonnaise
steps: Step 1: Cook the prawns in boiling water for a few minutes.
Step 2: Once cooked, cool them and peel them.

title: Grilled Crayfish
steps: Clean the crayfish and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the crayfish and cook until golden on both sides.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Cod Omelettes
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for several hours and then drain it well.
Step 2: Mix the soaked cod with the flour until it forms a thick dough.
Step 3: Heat oil in a frying pan and fry portions of the dough until golden and crispy.
Step 4: Drain the tortillas on kitchen paper to remove excess oil.

title: Mushrooms Stuffed With Ham
steps: Step 1: Clean the mushrooms and cut the top.
Step 2: Fill each mushroom with a little chopped ham.
Step 3: Place the mushrooms on a baking tray and bake at 180 degrees for 15 minutes.

title: Boletus Croquettes
steps: Step 1: Cook the boletus until they are soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked boletus with the breadcrumbs and an egg.
Step 3: Form the mixture into croquettes.
Step 4: Fry the croquettes in a pan with hot oil until golden.

title: Chicken Croquettes
steps: Step 1: Shred the chicken and mix it with the breadcrumbs.
Step 2: Add an egg and mix all the ingredients well.
Step 3: Form the croquettes and fry them in a pan with hot oil until golden.

title: Moorish Pork Skewer
steps: Cut the pork into small pieces.
Mix sweet and spicy paprika with garlic and oil.
Marinate the pork skewers in the mixture for 2 hours.
Skewer the pork pieces.
Grill the skewers until golden brown.

title: Morteruelo Cuenca
steps: Step 1: Soak stale bread in water for a few hours.
Step 2: Place the game meat in a mortar and add the peeled garlic.
Step 3: Add the soaked bread to the mortar and mix everything with a pestle.
Step 4: Add sweet and spicy paprika to taste and continue mixing until you obtain a homogeneous paste.
Step 5: Taste the morteruelo and adjust the seasonings if necessary.

title: Homemade Liver Pate
steps: Step 1: Cook the pork liver until cooked.
Step 2: In a pan, melt the butter and add the chopped onion. Cook until golden.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic to the pan and cook for another minute.
Step 4: Add the cooked pork liver to the pan and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Add the breadcrumbs and mix everything well. Let cool before serving.

title: Grilled Mushrooms With Parsley
steps: Wash the mushrooms and cut them into slices
Heat a frying pan with a little oil
Add the mushrooms to the pan and cook until golden on both sides
Remove from heat and sprinkle with chopped parsley

title: Snails In Spicy Sauce
steps: Cook the snails in salted water for 5 minutes.
In a frying pan, sauté the minced garlic until golden.
Add the sweet and spicy peppers, and sauté for one minute.
Add the cooked and drained snails to the pan, and mix well.
Add the red wine and cook everything together until the sauce reduces.

title: Sobao Pasiego
steps: Mix the milk, flour and sugar in a saucepan.
Add the eggs and mix well.
Heat over medium heat until thick.
Pour into a mold and bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Ensaimada De Mallorca
steps: Dilute the yeast in a little warm water with a teaspoon of sugar.
Mix the flour with the rest of the sugar, salt and lard.
Add the yeast mixture to the center of the dry ingredients and knead until you obtain a smooth dough.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for a few hours.
Once the dough has doubled in size, spread it on a floured surface and form the ensaimadas.
Let the ensaimadas rise again for about 20 minutes.
Bake at a temperature of 180 degrees Celsius for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Anise Donuts
steps: Grind the anise grains in a mortar or food processor.
Beat the eggs with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the flour and baking powder to the previous mixture.
Add the ground anise grains.
Make small balls with the dough obtained and fry them in hot oil.
Drain the donuts on absorbent paper to remove excess oil.

title: Pestiños With Honey
steps: Mix the flour with the water until it forms a dough.
Stretch the dough on a floured surface.
Cut the dough into triangles.
Paint the triangles with honey and roll them to form the pestiños.
Fry the pestiños in hot oil until golden.

title: Cornstarch Alfajores
steps: Mix the cornstarch with the sugar.
Add the melted butter and milk.
Beat until you obtain a homogeneous mass.
Make balls with the dough and fry in hot oil until golden.
Fill the balls with dulce de leche and join them to form the alfajores.

title: Lemon Pie
steps: Step 1: Mix milk, sugar and flour in a bowl.
Step 2: Add the butter and mix well.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a cake pan and bake at 180 degrees for 30 minutes.

title: Apple Strudel
steps: Peel the apples and cut them into pieces.
Spread the puff pastry on a flat surface.
Place the apple pieces on the dough.
Cover the apples with the remaining part of the dough.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 30 minutes.

title: Baked Apples
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Wash the apples and dry them with a clean cloth.
Place the apples on a baking sheet, cut each apple in half and remove the core.
Spray the apples with lemon juice to prevent them from oxidizing.
Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar over the apples.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until soft.

title: Lemon Mousse
steps: Squeeze the lemons to obtain their juice.
Mix the sugar with the egg yolks until they are fluffy.
Add the lemon juice to the previous mixture and stir well.
Whip the egg whites until stiff and mix them carefully with the heavy cream.
Combine both mixtures (the sugar, lemon and yolks with the egg whites and cream) and mix until you obtain a smooth consistency.
Pour the preparation into individual molds and let cool in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: Chocolate Volcano
steps: Melt the chocolate with the butter in a double boiler.
Mix the flour with the sugar and add it to the chocolate mixture.
Beat the eggs and mix them with the previous preparation.
Pour the dough into a buttered mold and bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Puff Pastry Palmitas
steps: Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface.
Brush the dough with water and sprinkle icing sugar.
Cut the dough into triangles and roll each one to form a palm tree.

title: Cream Gypsy Arm
steps: Step 1: Beat the eggs with the sugar until fluffy.
Step 2: Add the flour little by little, mixing carefully.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a buttered rectangular mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 15 minutes.
Step 4: Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack. Once cool, unmold and roll the gypsy arm using baking paper.
Step 5: Whip the cream until it is consistent and spread it on the gypsy arm. Roll it up carefully and place in the refrigerator for a few hours before serving.

title: Grandma'S Cake (Cookies And Chocolate)
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Mix the cookie dough until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a cake tin and bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Melt the chocolate in a bain-marie or in the microwave.
Once the cookie base is cold, spread the melted chocolate over it.
Let cool in the refrigerator before serving.

title: Calatrava Bread
steps: Dissolve the fresh yeast in a little warm water.
Mix the flour with the sugar and form a volcano in the center.
Add the yeast mixture to the center of the flour volcano and mix well until you obtain a soft dough.
Let the dough rise for 1 hour in a warm place.
Knead the dough again and shape it into a round loaf.
Let the bread rise for 30 more minutes.
Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius and bake the bread for 25-30 minutes or until golden.

title: Wind Fritters
steps: Mix the flour with the water until you obtain a soft dough.
Add the salt to the mixture.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan.
Make balls with the dough and fry them in the hot oil until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on kitchen paper to drain excess fat.

title: Spinach, Strawberry And Goat Cheese Salad
steps: Wash the spinach and place it in a bowl.
Cut the strawberries into small pieces.
Grate the goat cheese and add to the mixture.

title: Lentil Salad With Vegetables
steps: Cook the lentils according to the package instructions.
Cut the carrots, onion and celery into small pieces.
Peel the garlic and chop it finely.
In a hot pan with a little oil, add the onion, carrots and celery. Cook until soft.
Add the chopped garlic to the pan and cook for another minute.
In a large bowl, mix the cooked lentils with the vegetables from the pan.
Add any other desired ingredient (eg tomato, cucumber) and season to taste.

title: Rice Salad With Tuna And Mayonnaise
steps: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Mix the cooked rice with tuna and mayonnaise until well combined.
Serve the salad on a plate and enjoy.

title: Asadillo Manchego (Roasted Peppers)
steps: Step 1: Grill the peppers on a grill or directly over the flame until charred all over.
Step 2: Remove the peppers from the heat and place them in a tupperware to seal the container for a few minutes.

title: Xató (Endive, Cod And Romesco Sauce)
steps: Step 1: Cook the cod until tender.
Step 2: Mix the romesco sauce ingredients and add to the cooked cod.

title: Endive Salad With Roquefort And Walnuts
steps: Wash and cut the endives.
Grate the roquefort.
Toast the nuts.

title: Granada Soak (Orange And Cod)
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the oranges into small pieces.
Step 2: Soak the cod in water for 24 hours, changing the water every 6 hours.

title: Esqueixada Of Cod
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for several hours.
Step 2: Chop the onion and red peppers.
Step 3: Crumble the soaked cod.
Step 4: Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Tzatziki (Cucumber And Yogurt Salad)
steps: Chop the peppers and garlic finely.
Grate the cucumber and mix with yogurt.
