Add the chopped peppers and garlic to the yogurt and cucumber mixture.
Mix all the ingredients well.

title: Beet And Apple Salad
steps: Peel and grate the beet and carrot.
Cut the apple into small pieces.
Wash the spinach and dry it.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Add olive oil to taste and mix well.

title: Duchess Potatoes
steps: Peel and mash the potatoes until you obtain a puree.
Add the corn flour to the mashed potatoes and mix well.
Shape the duchess potatoes with your hands or with a special mold.
Fry the duchess potatoes in hot oil until golden brown on all sides.
Drain on kitchen paper and serve hot.

title: Baked Potato Wedges (Deluxe)
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Wash and dry the potatoes. Cut into wedges.
Place the potato wedges in a large bowl, add olive oil and mix so that they are well coated.
Spread the potato wedges on a baking tray lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden and crispy.

title: Sauerkraut (Fermented Cabbage)
steps: Step 1: Cut the cabbage into small pieces.
Step 2: Add salt and vinegar to the cabbage pieces. Mix well.
Step 3: Let it rest for at least an hour before serving.

title: Pumpkin Puree
steps: Cook the pumpkin until soft.
Pass the cooked pumpkin through a blender or blender until you obtain a smooth puree.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as an accompaniment.

title: Rice Pilaf
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a frying pan, sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Add the chopped carrot and cook for a few more minutes.
Add the vegetable broth and let it boil.
Add the cooked rice to the pan and stir to combine the flavors.
Cook for a few minutes until the rice is well infused with flavor.

title: Couscous With Vegetables
steps: Cook the couscous according to the package instructions.
In a frying pan, heat olive oil and fry the chopped onion until transparent.
Add the red peppers, carrots and chopped zucchini. Cook until soft.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
Mix the cooked couscous with the sautéed vegetables. Season to taste.

title: Glazed Carrots
steps: Peel and cut the carrots into pieces.
In a saucepan, heat the sugar and honey until it melts and forms a caramel.
Add the carrots to the pan and cook until soft and covered in caramel.
Season with pepper to taste.

title: Leeks In Vinaigrette
steps: Clean the leeks and cut them into thin slices.
In a frying pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the leeks and cook until soft and golden.
Remove the pan from the heat and add the red wine vinegar and mustard. Mix well.
Season with salt to taste.

title: Cauliflower Gratin With Bechamel
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Cook the cauliflower in salted water until soft.
Make a bechamel: melt the butter, add the flour and cook for one minute. Add the milk little by little, stirring constantly.
Mix the cooked cauliflower with the bechamel and the grated cheese.
Put the mixture in a baking dish and bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes or until golden.

title: Sautéed Broccoli With Garlic
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a frying pan.
Step 2: Add the minced garlic and sauté until golden.
Step 3: Add the broccoli cut into pieces and sauté for a few minutes until tender.

title: Gratin Onion Soup
steps: Cut the onion into small pieces.
Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until soft and transparent.
Add the meat broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat and let the soup boil for about 20 minutes.
Serve the soup in individual bowls and sprinkle with breadcrumbs.

title: White Asparagus Cream
steps: Step 1: Cook the white asparagus until soft.
Step 2: Add the potatoes cut into pieces and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the vegetable broth, chopped garlic and pepper to taste. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Mix everything with a mixer until you obtain a smooth and thick cream.

title: Vegetable Minestrone Soup
steps: Cook the vegetables until they are soft.
Add the beans and rice, cook until cooked.
Serve hot.

title: Cream Of Mushroom Soup
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot. Add chopped onion and minced garlic, cook until soft.
Step 2: Add chopped mushrooms to the pot and cook until they release their water.
Step 3: Add vegetable broth and let it boil for a few minutes. Then, add chopped parsley.
Step 4: Use a hand blender to blend the mixture until smooth and creamy.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy!

title: Chinese Noodle Soup (Basic Ramen)
steps: Cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large pot, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the lean pork and cook until golden. Add the green onion and paprika, cook for a few more minutes.
Add the chicken broth powder and 4 cups of water to the pot. Bring to a boil.
Stir the cooked noodles in the water and add to the broth. Cook for a few minutes until the noodles are heated through.
Serve the hot soup in bowls.

title: Galician Queimada
steps: Heat the ingredients in a large pot.
Once the sugar has dissolved and the mixture is hot, but not boiling, pour it into glasses or glasses.
You can flame it with a little alcohol to give it a special touch.

title: Meringue Milk
steps: Heat the milk until it is hot but not boiling.
Beat the milk with a mixer until a foamy layer forms on the surface.
Serve hot.

title: Fresh Orange Juice
steps: Peel the oranges.
Place the peeled oranges in a blender or juicer.
Blend until you obtain a homogeneous juice.
Serve immediately.

title: Homemade Bechamel Sauce
steps: Melt the butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
Add the flour and stir constantly until a roux is formed.
Add the milk little by little while continuing to stir to avoid lumps.
Continue cooking until the sauce thickens.

title: Romesco Sauce
steps: Step 1: Soak the dried tomatoes in hot water for 20 minutes.
Step 2: In a frying pan, toast the almonds until golden.
Step 3: Peel and finely chop the garlic.
Step 4: In a food processor, combine the drained sundried tomatoes, toasted almonds, minced garlic and dried peppers. Process until you obtain a thick paste.
Step 5: Add the vinegar and olive oil to the processor and process until the sauce is smooth and well integrated.
Step 6: Taste and adjust flavors if necessary. Serve the romesco sauce hot or cold.

title: Orange Duck
steps: 1. Preheat the oven to 200°C.
2. Wash and dry the ducks, season them with salt and pepper.
3. Heat a large frying pan over medium-high heat, add a little oil and sear the ducks on all sides until golden brown.
4. Remove the ducks from the pan and set them aside on a plate.
5. Add the chopped onion to the same pan and cook until transparent.
6. Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
7. Add the orange juice, red wine vinegar and honey to the pan, stir well to combine.
8. Place the ducks back in the pan, cover with the orange mixture and cook for about 10 more minutes.
9. Transfer the ducks and orange mixture to a baking dish, cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
10. Remove the aluminum foil, increase the oven temperature to 220°C and cook for another 15 minutes until the ducks are golden brown.

title: Beef Round In Sauce
steps: 1. Cut the beef into large pieces.
2. In a large skillet, sear the meat over medium-high heat until golden brown on all sides.
3. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan and cook until soft.
4. Add the paprika, tomato paste and vinegar to the pan and stir well to combine the flavors.
5. Add enough water to cover the meat and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to low and cook meat for about 1 hour or until tender.
7. Remove the meat from the sauce and boil it to thicken it a little.
8. Serve the meat with the sauce on top.

title: Golden Cod (Bacalhau À Brás)
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for several hours.
Step 2: Peel and chop the potatoes and onion.
Step 3: Fry the cod, potatoes and onion in hot oil until golden.

title: Peppers Stuffed With Rice And Vegetables
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Cut the peppers in half and remove the seeds.
Finely chop the onion, garlic and carrots.
Sauté the onion, garlic and carrots in a pan with oil until soft.
Add the rice and sauté for a few more minutes.
Add the crushed tomato and cook for about 15 minutes.
Stuff the peppers with the rice and vegetable mixture.
Place the peppers on a baking tray and bake for 20 minutes.

title: Sirloin With Whiskey
steps: Season the sirloin with salt and pepper.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil and when it is hot, add the sirloin. Cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add minced garlic to the pan and cook for another minute.
Add whiskey to the pan and cook until reduced by half.
Remove the tenderloin from the pan and let it rest on a plate for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the whiskey sirloin with its sauce.

title: Centerboard Loin
steps: Step 1: Season the pork loin with salt and pepper and fry it in a pan with olive oil.
Step 2: Add the rice to the same pan and cook until golden.
Step 3: Add enough water or meat broth to cover the ingredients, salt and cook over medium-low heat until the rice is cooked.

title: Murcian Meatloaf
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped leeks and onion until they are soft.
Step 2: Add the ground beef and cook until golden. Add the chopped garlic.
Step 3: Add the flour and stir well. Add the milk and let the mixture thicken.
Step 4: Beat the eggs and mix them with the meat. Add the breadcrumbs and mix everything.
Step 5: Pour the mixture into an oiled mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 30 minutes.

title: Caldero Del Mar Menor (Rice And Fish)
steps: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Add the chopped onion and fry until transparent.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the chopped tomatoes and let them cook for a few minutes.
Add the sweet and spicy paprika to taste, stirring well.
Add the rice and stir so that it is covered in the tomato and paprika mixture.
Cover the rice with water or fish broth until it is completely submerged.
Add the fish cut into large pieces, making sure they are submerged in the liquid.
Bring the pot to a boil and then reduce the heat to low.
Cover the pot with a tight-fitting lid and let it cook for 20 minutes without lifting the lid.
Remove from heat and let sit for another 10 minutes before serving.

title: Atascaburras (Cod And Potato)
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for several hours.
Step 2: Peel and cut the potatoes into large pieces.
Step 3: Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
Step 4: In a pan, fry the soaked cod until golden.
Step 5: Add the cooked potatoes to the pan and stir everything together.
Step 6: Cook for a few more minutes until well integrated.

title: Duels And Losses (Eggs, Chorizo, Bacon)
steps: Step 1: Cut the chorizo ​​and bacon into small pieces.
Step 2: In a pan, fry the chorizo ​​and bacon pieces until golden. Remove them from the pan and reserve them.
Step 3: Beat the eggs in a bowl.
Step 4: Pour the beaten eggs into the same pan where the chorizo ​​and bacon were fried. Cook until set.
Step 5: Add the reserved chorizo ​​and bacon pieces to the pan with the cooked eggs. Mix everything well.
Step 6: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Cod Omelette
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod overnight.
Step 2: Drain and desalt the cod. Crumble it into a bowl.
Step 3: Beat the eggs and add the shredded cod.
Step 4: Mix well until a homogeneous mass remains.
Step 5: Heat oil in a frying pan and pour the egg and cod mixture.
Step 6: Cook over medium-low heat until the tortilla is set on both sides.

title: Monkfish In American Sauce
steps: Step 1: cut the monkfish into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Step 2: sauté the chopped onion in a pan with olive oil.
Step 3: add the chopped garlic to the pan and sauté it with the onion.
Step 4: add the crushed tomato and sweet paprika, cook for a few minutes.
Step 5: add the salted monkfish to the American sauce and cook until done.
Step 6: add vinegar to taste and adjust the seasoning.

title: Braised Partridge
steps: 1. Cut the partridge into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. In a pot, brown the partridge pieces in olive oil.
3. Add the chopped onion and crushed garlic. Cook until soft.
4. Add the chopped red peppers and crushed tomato. Cook for a few minutes.
5. Add the red wine and let it reduce by half.
6. Add the corn flour and stir well so that it mixes with the wine.
7. Add water to cover the partridge pieces and cook over medium-low heat for about 45 minutes or until the partridge is tender.
8. Adjust the seasoning and serve hot.

title: Rabbit With Rice
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Cuttlefish With Peas
steps: Step 1: Clean and cut the cuttlefish into small pieces.
Step 2: Cook the peas until tender.
Step 3: In a frying pan, lightly brown the cuttlefish with a little oil.
Step 4: Add the cooked peas and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Step 5: Mix everything well and serve hot.

title: Choco Meatballs (Cuttlefish)
steps: Finely chop the cuttlefish and mix with chopped garlic.
Add eggs and breadcrumbs until a compact dough is formed.
Make balls of the desired size and fry them in hot oil until golden brown on all sides.

title: Navarre-Style Pochas
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the beans and fry until golden.
Step 3: Add chopped leek and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add the chopped garlic and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Add the sweet and spicy paprika to taste, stirring well.
Step 6: Add enough water to cover the beans and bring to a boil.
Step 7: Cook until the beans are soft. If necessary, add more water during cooking.
Step 8: Adjust the salt and serve hot.

title: Beef Ragout
steps: Heat oil in a large pot.
Add the beef and cook until golden.
Add the chopped onion, garlic and pepper and cook until softened.
Add the crushed tomato and minced lamb.
Cover with meat broth and simmer for 2 hours.
Adjust seasoning and serve.

title: Braised Beef Shank
steps: Cut the beef into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
In a saucepan, sauté the chopped onion and crushed garlic until golden.
Add the beef pieces and fry until seared on all sides.
Add the crushed tomato, paprika, bay leaf and red wine. Cook over medium heat for approximately 1 hour and 30 minutes, until the meat is tender.
Serve hot and enjoy your braised beef shank.

title: Pork Ribs With Honey And Mustard
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix honey and mustard in a bowl.
Season the pork ribs with salt and pepper.
Place the ribs on a baking sheet.
Paint the ribs with the honey and mustard mixture.
Bake for 45 minutes or until golden.

title: Coca-Cola Chicken
steps: Marinate the chicken in Coca-Cola for 2 hours.
Take out the chicken and mix the Coca-Cola with garlic, sweet paprika and sugar.
Cook the chicken in a skillet until golden brown on all sides.
Add the Coca-Cola mixture to the pan and cook until reduced.
Serve the chicken with the reduced sauce.

title: Spinach Omelette
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion in a frying pan with a little oil.
Step 2: Add the chopped spinach and cook until soft.
Step 3: Beat the eggs and add the sautéed spinach and onion, mix well.
Step 4: Pour the mixture into a hot non-stick pan and let it cook until set on both sides.

title: Fried Eggs With Potatoes And Peppers
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into small pieces.
Heat oil in a frying pan and sauté the peppers until soft.
Add the potatoes to the pan and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the potatoes from the pan and set aside.
Add a little more oil to the pan if necessary and fry the eggs until they are cooked to your liking.
Serve the eggs with the fried potatoes.

title: Galician-Style Lacón (Paprika And Oil)
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the pork shoulder and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add water to cover the lacón, then add the paprika.
Step 4: Cook over medium-low heat for about two hours or until the pork shoulder is tender.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Squid Stuffed With Meat
steps: Step 1: Clean and cut the squid into rings.
Step 2: Mix the ground beef with minced garlic and parsley.
Step 3: Fill each squid ring with the meat mixture.
Step 4: Pass the stuffed squid through breadcrumbs.
Step 5: Fry them in hot oil until golden.

title: Spaghetti With Clams (Vongole)
steps: Step 1: Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions.
Step 2: In a large skillet, brown the minced garlic in olive oil over medium heat.
Step 3: Add the clams and cook them until they open. Remove the clams from the pan and reserve the cooking liquid.
Step 4: Add the cooked spaghetti to the pan with the clam cooking liquid. Mix well.
Step 5: Add chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Vegetable Pizza
steps: Preheat the oven to 220 degrees Celsius.
Spread the pizza dough on a pizza pan.
Add the tomato sauce over the dough and spread it evenly.
Cut the vegetables into small pieces and distribute them over the sauce.
Grate the mozzarella cheese over the vegetables.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until pizza is golden and crispy.

title: Chicken Burger
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is well done.
Step 2: Place the chicken meat on a burger and add lettuce, tomato and onion.

title: Mushroom Cachopo
steps: Step 1: Clean the mushrooms.
Step 2: Beat the eggs in a deep plate.
Step 3: Dip the mushrooms in the beaten egg and then in breadcrumbs.
Step 4: Fry in a pan with hot oil until golden brown on both sides.

title: Three Delicacies Noodles
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until golden.
Step 2: Add the carrots and cook them until soft.
Step 3: Add the noodles and cook them until al dente.

title: Varied Fried Fish
steps: Step 1: Dry the fish with kitchen paper.
Step 2: Mix the flour with salt and pepper in a deep plate.
Step 3: Dredge the fish pieces in the flour mixture, making sure they are well coated.
Step 4: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Step 5: Add the fish pieces to the pan and fry them until golden and crispy. Remove from heat.
Step 6: Serve hot with lemon and a green salad.

title: Grilled Turkey Breast
steps: Preheat the griddle or non-stick frying pan over medium-high heat.
Season the turkey breasts with salt and pepper to taste.
Add oil to the hot griddle and place the turkey breasts.
Cook for approximately 6 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Pork Steak
steps: 1. Season the pork with salt and pepper.
2. Cook the pork on a hot grill or pan until cooked through.

title: Little Pork Loin With Cheese
steps: Step 1: Cut the tenderloin into thin steaks.
Step 2: Place a layer of cheese on each fillet and roll them up.

title: Foie Cannelloni
steps: Cook the cannelloni pasta according to the instructions on the package.
Salt and sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Fill the cannelloni with the cooked foie gras.
Cover the cannelloni with bechamel sauce and bake at high temperature for 15 minutes.

title: Fried Nettles
steps: Wash the nettles and dry them.
Dredge them in flour and fry them in hot oil.

title: Manchego Cheese In Oil
steps: Cut the Manchego cheese into cubes.
Place the cheese cubes in a glass jar.
Cover the cheese with oil until it is completely submerged.
Cover the jar and let it marinate for at least 24 hours in the refrigerator before serving.

title: Mojama With Almonds
steps: Step 1: Cut the mojama into thin slices.
Step 2: Peel and chop the almonds.
Step 3: Arrange the mojama slices on a plate.
Step 4: Sprinkle the chopped almonds over the mojama.
Step 5: Serve immediately.

title: Quail Eggs With Ham
steps: Step 1: Beat the quail eggs in a bowl.
Step 2: Heat a non-stick frying pan over medium heat and add the beaten eggs.
Step 3: Cook until set but still moist.
Step 4: Remove from the heat and add the chopped serrano ham.
Step 5: Mix well and serve hot.

title: Avocado And Salmon Toast
steps: Step 1: Cut the avocado into slices and place it on a slice of toast.
Step 2: Add the smoked salmon on top of the avocado.

title: Serrano Ham Tacos
steps: Cut the serrano ham into thin strips.
Heat the corn tortillas in a frying pan without oil.
Place the serrano ham strips on each tortilla and fold the tortilla in half.
Serve the tacos hot with your favorite accompaniment.

title: Dressed Olives
steps: Chop the garlic and mix it with the sweet paprika.
Add the olives to the garlic and paprika mixture.

title: Chicharrones De Cádiz
steps: Cut the bacon into small pieces.
Fry the chopped garlic in oil until golden.
Add the bacon pieces and fry until crispy.
Sprinkle with sweet paprika at the end of the frying process.

title: Torreznos De Soria
steps: Cut the bacon into small pieces.
Fry the bacon pieces until golden and crispy.
Add the chopped garlic and sweet paprika to the heat, stirring constantly until fragrant.
Add the vinegar and let it reduce until the sauce thickens.
Serve hot

title: Cordoba Flamenquines
steps: Cut the pork into thin slices.
Season the slices with salt and pepper.
Dip the slices in beaten egg and then in breadcrumbs.
Fry in hot oil until golden.
Add chopped garlic and white wine during frying.

title: Marriage (Anchovy And Boquerón)
steps: Step 1: Clean and fillet the anchovies and anchovies.
Step 2: Present them on a plate with a lemon garnish.

title: Gildas (Spincho)
steps: Prick a green pepper with a pitted olive and an anchovy.
Repeat until you have the desired number of skewers.

title: Fried Eggplants With Honey
steps: Cut the eggplants into thick slices.
Dip the slices in beaten egg and then in flour.
Fry them in hot olive oil until golden. Remove them from the heat and place them on kitchen paper to drain excess fat.
Heat the honey in a saucepan over low heat for 2 minutes.
Dip the fried eggplants in the hot honey and place them on a serving plate.

title: Artichokes With Ham
steps: Step 1: Clean the artichokes and cut them into quarters.
Step 2: Cook the artichokes in salted water until tender.

title: Toledo Carcamusas
steps: Mix the chickpea flour with water until you obtain a homogeneous mass.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
Cook the carcamusas in a non-stick frying pan without oil for about 5 minutes on each side.

title: Potato Aioli
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Peel the garlic and crush it with olive oil until you obtain an aioli.

title: Fried Goat Cheese
steps: Cut the goat cheese into slices
Fry the slices in a pan with oil until golden on both sides

title: Potato And Meat Bombs
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Mussel Pate
steps: Step 1: Cook the mussels until they open.
Step 2: Mix the mussels with the chopped garlic and parsley.

title: Homemade Chicken Fingers
steps: Cut the chicken into strips and season with salt and pepper.
Coat the chicken strips in flour, beaten egg and breadcrumbs.
Fry the chicken fingers in hot oil until golden and crispy.
Drain excess oil on kitchen paper before serving.

title: Goxua
steps: Step 1: Mix the milk, eggs and flour.
Step 2: Add the sugar and bake.

title: Intxaursalsa (Walnut Cream)
steps: Step 1: Beat the nuts with the milk until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Step 2: Add the sugar and cinnamon, mix well and let it cool in the refrigerator before serving.

title: Fartons (For Horchata)
steps: Dissolve the yeast in warm water.
Add the flour little by little until forming a homogeneous dough.
Let rise for one hour.
Form the dough into balls and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes.

title: Casadielles (Walnut Puff Pastry)
steps: Step 1: Mix flour, sugar and butter until forming a dough.
Step 2: Add chopped walnuts to the dough.
Step 3: Roll out the dough and cut it into the shape of casadielles.
Step 4: Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Biscuit And Mocha Cake
steps: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler.
Add the heavy cream and sugar to the melted chocolate.
Mix until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Let the mixture cool for a few minutes.
Place the cookies in a baking dish, covering the bottom completely.
Pour the chocolate mixture over the cookies and distribute it evenly.
Cover the cake with plastic wrap and let it cool in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: Piononos De Santa Fe
steps: Step 1: Mix flour, sugar and butter until forming a dough.
Step 2: Add eggs and milk. Mix well until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.

title: Astorga Puff Pastries
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with the water to form a dough.
Step 2: Add the butter to the dough and knead until you obtain a uniform mixture.
Step 3: Spread the dough on a floured surface and cut it into puff pastry shapes.
Step 4: Bake the puff pastries at 180 degrees Celsius for about 20 minutes or until golden.

title: Lemon Sponge Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the eggs and sugar until well combined.
Add the lemon zest and lemon juice.
Add the flour and baking powder, mixing carefully until a soft dough is formed.
Pour the mixture into a greased cake pan.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown on top and an inserted toothpick comes out clean.

title: Murcian Paparajotes
steps: Mix eggs and sugar until you get a foamy mixture.
Add flour little by little while continuing to mix.
Add orange water and mix well.
Heat a frying pan with oil and pour the mixture to form paparajotes.
Once golden, remove them from the pan and sprinkle them with sugar.

title: Peach In Syrup
steps: Peel the peaches and cut them into pieces.
In a pot, bring the water to a boil. Add the peaches and boil until soft.
Remove the peaches from the heat and let them cool before serving.

title: Cheese With Quince
steps: Step 1: Cut the cheese into slices.
Step 2: Peel and cut the quince into pieces.

title: Bartolillos From Madrid
steps: Step 1: Spread the bartolillo dough on a floured surface.
Step 2: Cut the dough into circles of the desired size.
Step 3: Fill each circle with pastry cream and close them to form the little bars.
Step 4: Fry the bartolillos in hot oil until golden.
Step 5: Remove the bartolillos from the heat and drain them on kitchen paper.

title: Coca De San Juan (Candied Fruit)
steps: Mix the flour, sugar and baking powder.
Add the eggs and water to form a dough.
Spread the dough in a rectangular mold.
Garnish with candied fruits.
Bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes.

title: Almond Cordials
steps: Chop the almonds into small pieces.
Mix the sugar with the rice flour until forming a uniform mixture.
Add the chopped almonds to the mixture and mix well.
Form small balls with the mixture and place them on a baking sheet.

title: Sighs Of A Lover
steps: Beat the eggs and sugar until fluffy.
Add the flour little by little, mixing well.
Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil.
Remove them from the oil and let them cool before sprinkling them with powdered sugar.

title: Heart Salad With Anchovies
steps: Wash the florets and cut them into pieces
Place the buds on a salad plate
Add the anchovies

title: Pasta Salad With Pesto
steps: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Mix the cooked pasta with the pesto in a large bowl.
Add the cherry tomatoes cut in half and the green leaves.
Mix everything carefully so that the ingredients are well combined.

title: Burrata And Dried Tomato Salad
steps: Step 1: Cut the burrata into pieces.
Step 2: Mix with dried tomato and season to taste.

title: Arugula, Parmesan And Walnut Salad
steps: Wash and dry the arugula.
Toast the walnuts in a pan without oil until golden.
Grate the parmesan cheese.
In a bowl, mix the arugula, toasted walnuts and grated Parmesan cheese.

title: Octopus And Potato Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the potatoes and octopus separately.
Step 2: Mix both ingredients in a bowl.
Step 3: Add olive oil, vinegar and salt to taste.

title: Moje Manchego (Tomato And Tuna)
steps: Step 1: Cut the tomatoes into pieces.
Step 2: Mix the tuna with the tomatoes.

title: Turkey And Apple Salad
steps: Cut the turkey into small pieces.
Peel and cut the apples into small pieces.
Wash the lettuce and cut it into small pieces.
Peel and cut the carrots into slices.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Surimi And Pineapple Salad
steps: Cut the surimi into small pieces and the pineapple into medium pieces.
Mix both ingredients in a large bowl.
Add a vinaigrette of your choice and toss everything until the ingredients are well coated.
Serve immediately.

title: Tomato And Tuna Salad
steps: Step 1: Cut the tomatoes into pieces and place them on a plate.
Step 2: Add the smoked northern tuna to the dish with the tomatoes.
Step 3: Add olive oil, salt and pepper to taste. Mix well.

title: Chinese Salad (Lettuce, Ham, White Sauce)
steps: Step 1: Wash and chop the lettuce.
Step 2: Cut the ham into thin strips.

title: Potatoes Revolconas
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
Drain the potatoes and mash them with a fork.
Add the chopped garlic, sweet paprika and chopped parsley to the mashed potatoes.
Mix everything well and serve hot.

title: Garlic Rice
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the rice and stir until lightly golden.
Step 3: Add water and salt to taste, then cook over medium heat until the rice is cooked.

title: Ratatouille
steps: Step 1: Cut the eggplants, zucchini and peppers into small pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the chopped onion in olive oil until transparent.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic cloves and cook for another minute.
Step 4: Add the crushed tomatoes and cut vegetables. Cook until soft.

title: Sautéed Turnip Greens
steps: Step 1: Wash the turnip greens and cut them into small pieces.
Step 2: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet.
Step 3: Add the turnip greens to the pan and sauté for a few minutes until tender.

title: Lombarda With Apple
steps: Step 1: Cut the red cabbage into thin strips.
Step 2: Peel and chop the apples.

title: Chestnut Puree
steps: Peel and cook the chestnuts until soft.
Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
Mix the cooked chestnuts with the cooked potatoes and mash them until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Add milk little by little while stirring the mixture until the desired consistency is reached.
Serve hot.

title: Caramelized Onion
steps: Peel and cut the onion into small pieces.
Heat a frying pan with a little oil over medium heat.
Add the onion to the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until soft and golden.
If you want to sweeten the onion more, add a little sugar or honey at the end of cooking.
Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Straw Potatoes
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into thin strips.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan.
Add the potatoes and fry until golden and crispy.
Drain on kitchen paper to remove excess oil.

title: Homemade Fried Tomato
steps: Heat the oil in a frying pan.
Add the ripe tomatoes and fry until soft.
Remove the tomatoes from the pan and set aside.

title: Trigueros With Bacon
steps: Cook the bacon until crispy.
Add the Wildflowers and cook until tender.

title: Ajoblanco
steps: Peel the garlic and put it in a mortar with the stale bread soaked in water.
Add olive oil little by little while mashing everything until you obtain a paste.
Add water until you achieve the desired texture. Season to taste.

title: Cooked Soup With Noodles
steps: Step 1: Place the beef, pork leg and lamb bones in a large pot. Add enough water to cover the ingredients and bring to a boil.
Step 2: Add the onion, garlic, leek, carrot and celery to the pot. Let it cook for a few hours until the meat is soft.
Step 3: Remove the meat from the pot and set it aside. Strain the broth and put it back in the pot. Add the potatoes cut into pieces and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add the meat back to the pot and add the noodles. Cook until the noodles are al dente.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Cream Of Peas
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot. Add the chopped leek and cook until soft.
Step 2: Add the chopped potatoes and peas to the pot. Cover with vegetable broth and boil until the potatoes are soft.
Step 3: Using a mixer, mix all the ingredients until you obtain a smooth cream. If necessary, add more broth to reach the desired consistency.
Step 4: Serve hot and enjoy your delicious Cream of Peas.

title: Porra Antequerana
steps: Mix the flour with the water until it forms a thick dough.
Heat the olive oil in a frying pan.
Pour the flour and water mixture into the pan and cook over medium heat until a golden brown batter forms.

title: Seafood Bisque
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, leek and garlic until golden.
Step 2: Add the seafood and cook until pink.
Step 3: Add the tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the white wine and let it reduce.
Step 5: Add the fish broth and let it boil for about 20 minutes.
Step 6: Blend the mixture until you obtain a cream.

detailedIngredients.name: seafood (preferably a mix of shrimp and shrimp)

title: Agua De Valencia
steps: Squeeze the oranges and lemons.
Mix the orange and lemon juice with sugar until it dissolves.
Add vodka and cava to the concoction.
Stir well to mix all the ingredients.

title: Rebujito
steps: 1. Mix rum and lemonade in a shaker with ice.
2. Shake well for a few seconds.
3. Strain the mixture into a tall glass filled with ice.

title: Asian Coffee
steps: Grind the coffee beans.
Place the ground coffee in a coffee filter.
Pour hot water over the coffee and wait until it has completely filtered.

title: Brava Sauce
steps: Heat oil in a frying pan.
Add the chopped garlic and fry until golden.
Add the chopped tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Add the sweet paprika and stir well.
Add vinegar and let the sauce reduce for a few more minutes.

title: Mojo Picón
steps: Step 1: Grill the red peppers on a grill until lightly charred.
Step 2: Peel and chop the garlic.
Step 3: Place the roasted peppers, minced garlic, red wine vinegar and olive oil in a food processor and blend until you have a smooth sauce.

title: Valencian Baked Rice
steps: Heat the oven to 180°C.
In an oven-safe container, mix the rice with the whole tomatoes, the peeled but unbroken garlic, the sweet paprika and the extra virgin olive oil.
Bake for about 45 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the tomato has lost its skin.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.

title: Noodles A La Banda
steps: Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
In a pot, sauté the onion, leek and garlic in hot oil until golden.
Add the pork to the pot and cook until cooked through.
Add the chicken broth to the pot and let it boil for a few minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the broth and mix everything together with the soy sauce.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Duck And Foie Cannelloni
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Vegetable Lasagna
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Cut the eggplants into thin slices and sauté them in a frying pan with a little oil until golden. Reserve.
Do the same with the cauliflower, cutting it into florets and sautéing it in the same pan used for the eggplants.
In a bowl, mix the crushed tomato with a little oregano and salt.

Assemble the lasagna in a baking dish. First put a layer of lasagna dough, then a layer of eggplant, another of cauliflower, another of red pepper cut into thin strips and finally a layer of crushed tomato.
Repeat the process until you finish with the lasagna dough. Sprinkle mozzarella and parmesan cheese on top.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until the cheese is golden and bubbly.

title: Chicken With Old Mustard
steps: Step 1: Marinate the chicken with old mustard and garlic for at least an hour.
Step 2: Cook the chicken in a hot skillet until golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add black pepper to taste.

title: Turkey Stew With Vegetables
steps: Cut the turkey into pieces and salt it.
Brown the turkey pieces in a pot with a little oil until golden brown. Remove the turkey from the pot and set aside.
In the same pot, sauté the chopped onion, chopped garlic, chopped carrot and chopped celery until soft.
Add the chopped tomato to the mixture and cook for a few minutes until the tomatoes soften.
Add the golden turkey to the pot. Add enough beef broth to cover the turkey and vegetables.
Add the corn flour and stir well to avoid lumps.
Cover the pot with a lid and let the stew cook over medium heat for about 45 minutes or until the turkey is tender.
Serve hot.

title: Trout To The Miller
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large frying pan.
Step 2: Add the trout fillets and cook for a few minutes until golden.
Step 3: Add minced garlic and fresh parsley to the pan.
Step 4: Pour the white wine into the pan and let it reduce.
Step 5: Squeeze the lemon juice over the trout fillets and serve hot.

title: Squid In Its Ink (Classic)
steps: Clean the squid and separate the tentacles from the body.
Cut the tentacles into small pieces.
Mix the squid ink with a little water and boil it for a few minutes.
Add the squid pieces to the ink mixture and cook for about 10 more minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Sirloin With Green Pepper
steps: Season the sirloin with green pepper and salt.
Heat a frying pan with oil and add the sirloin. Cook until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the tenderloin from the pan and set aside.

title: Elche Crusted Rice
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the rice and sauté until transparent.
Step 3: Add the crushed tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the sweet paprika and stir well.
Step 5: Add the meat broth little by little, while the rice is cooking.
Step 6: Once the rice is cooked, let it rest covered for a few minutes.
Step 7: Finish the recipe with a crispy crust in a pan.

title: Add Paprika
steps: Step 1: Clean the stingray and cut it into pieces.
Step 2: In a pan with olive oil, brown the chopped garlic.
Step 3: Add the stingray pieces and fry until golden.
Step 4: Sprinkle with sweet paprika and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Fish Stew
steps: Step 1: In a large saucepan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic until golden.
Step 2: Add the chopped tomato and pepper and cook until they release the vegetation water.
Step 3: Add the fish cut into large pieces, the vinegar, the paprika and the bay leaves. Cover with water and cook over medium heat for about 20 minutes.
Step 4: Adjust the salt and serve hot.

title: Vegetable And Chicken Yakisoba
steps: Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
Sauté the chicken until golden and cooked. Add the vegetables and cook until soft.
Add the yakisoba sauce to the wok and mix with the chicken and vegetables. Add the cooked noodles and mix everything well.
Serve hot and enjoy your Vegetable and Chicken Yakisoba.

title: Garlic And Shrimp Omelet
steps: Finely chop the garlic and fry it in a pan with olive oil.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink.
Beat the eggs in a bowl, add salt to taste and mix with the garlic and shrimp mixture.
Pour the mixture into a hot non-stick pan and cook until set on both sides.

title: Flamenco Style Eggs
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a frying pan and add the chopped garlic.
Step 2: Add the red peppers cut into pieces and fry until soft.
Step 3: Add the chopped tomatoes and cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Make a hole in the center of the pan and crack the eggs directly into it.
Step 5: Cover the pan with a lid or aluminum foil and let the eggs cook until they are to your liking.

title: Biscayan-Style Cod
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for at least 24 hours to remove the salt.
Step 2: In a pot, sauté the chopped onion and crushed garlic with olive oil.
Step 3: Add the chopped red peppers and crushed tomato to the pot.
Step 4: Cook everything for a few minutes until soft.
Step 5: Add the soaked and crumbled cod to the vegetable mixture.
Step 6: Cook over medium-low heat for about 10-15 minutes, adding water if necessary.
Step 7: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Peppers Stuffed With Tortilla
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
Mix the beaten eggs with the cooked potatoes and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Stuff the peppers with the potato and egg mixture.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes.

title: Hawaiian Pizza (Ham And Pineapple)
steps: Preheat the oven to 230 degrees Celsius.
Spread the pizza dough on a pizza pan and add the tomato sauce.
Add the mozzarella cheese, cooked ham and pineapple.
Bake for approximately 15 minutes or until the pizza is golden brown.

title: Quail In Spanish Sauce
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and crushed garlic in a pan with olive oil.
Step 2: Add the red peppers cut into small pieces and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the quail cut into pieces, season them with salt and pepper and brown them on all sides.
Step 4: Add the grated tomato and let everything cook together for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy this delicious Spanish sauce with the quail.

title: Rabbit With Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cut the rabbit into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Sauté the garlic in olive oil until golden.
Step 3: Add the rabbit pieces and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Step 4: Add the tomatoes and let cook until the sauce thickens.
Step 5: Add the chopped parsley and serve.

title: Fried Marinated Pork Ribs
steps: Mix sweet and spicy paprika, garlic and white vinegar to make a marinade.
Fry the pork ribs in a pan until golden brown.
Add the marinade to the pan with the ribs and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Lean Pork With Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cut the lean pork into small pieces.
Step 2: Fry the pork pieces in a pan with olive oil until golden.

title: Dogfish With Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cut the dogfish into small pieces.
Step 2: Fry the dogfish pieces in a pan with olive oil.
Step 3: Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add salt, pepper and cumin to taste.
Step 5: Cook for a few more minutes until the dogfish is well done.

title: Fried Mullets
steps: Step 1: Season the mullets with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Dredge the mullets in corn flour until they are completely covered.
Step 3: Fry the mullet in a pan with hot oil for about 5 minutes on each side or until golden and crispy.

title: Fried Anchovies
steps: Step 1: Season the anchovies with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Dredge the anchovies in flour.
Step 3: Fry the anchovies in hot oil until golden.

title: Grilled Grouper
steps: Clean the grouper and season with salt and pepper.
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil and wait until it is hot.
Add the grouper to the pan and cook for about 4 minutes on each side or until cooked through.

title: Russian Fillet In Sauce
steps: Sauté the chopped onion and garlic until golden.
Add the crushed tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Add the sweet paprika and vinegar, mix well.
Add the beef fillet cut into pieces and cook over medium heat until done.

title: Fish Balls
steps: Step 1: Mix the minced fish with eggs and breadcrumbs.
Step 2: Make meatballs with the mixture.

title: Eggplants Stuffed With Tuna
steps: Cut the eggplant in half and empty the pulp.
Mix the tuna with the eggplant pulp.
Stuff the eggplant halves with the mixture.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Black Seppia Spaghetti With Shrimp
steps: Cook the black cuttlefish spaghetti according to the package instructions.
In a frying pan, heat olive oil and add the shrimp. Cook until pink.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the pan with the prawns and mix well.
Serve hot.

title: Gnocchi With Four Cheeses
steps: Cook the gnocchi according to the package instructions.
Melt the butter in a pan and add the cooked gnocchi.
Add the parmesan, mozzarella and gorgonzola cheeses to the pan and stir until melted and creamy.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Meat Ravioli With Tomato
steps: Cook the ground beef until well cooked. Remove from heat and reserve.
Prepare the pasta according to the package instructions.
Fill the ravioli with the ground meat.
Cook the tomatoes in a sauce until they are soft.
Cook the stuffed ravioli in boiling water for a few minutes.
Serve the ravioli hot with the tomato sauce on top.

title: Club Sandwich
steps: Cut the sliced ​​bread in half.
Place a layer of lean pork on one half of the bread.
Add a layer of cheese in half with the meat.
Add lettuce leaves and tomato slices on top of the cheese.
Cover with the other half of the bread.

title: Eggs Benedict
steps: Cook the eggs in boiling water for 3 minutes.
Toast the brioche bread.

title: Cochinita Pibil Tacos
steps: Step 1: Cook the cochinita pibil.
Step 2: Heat the corn tortillas.
Step 3: Chop the onion, garlic and cilantro.
Step 4: Cut the pepper into small pieces.
Step 5: Assemble the tacos with the cochinita pibil meat, onion, garlic, cilantro and pepper.

title: Black Pudding And Pine Nuts Toast
steps: Step 1: Cut the blood sausage into thin slices.
Step 2: Toast the bread and place the blood sausage slices on each slice.
Step 3: Sprinkle the pine nuts over the blood sausage and serve hot.

title: Breaded Brie Cheese With Jam
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with a little water to make a dough.
Step 2: Cover the brie cheese with the prepared dough.
Step 3: Dip the breaded cheese pieces in beaten egg and fry them in hot oil until golden.
Step 4: Serve the breaded cheese hot accompanied by jam.

title: Nachos With Minced Meat And Cheese
steps: Cook the minced meat until it is well done.
Mix the meat with the grated cheese and place on the nachos.
Heat in the oven for a few minutes until the cheese is melted.

title: Artichoke Chips
steps: Peel the artichokes and cut them into thin slices.
Heat the oil in a deep skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the artichoke slices to the pan and fry until golden brown on both sides.
Remove the artichoke chips from the pan with a slotted spoon and place them on kitchen paper to drain excess oil.
Serve hot.

title: Asparagus And Ham Puff Pastry
steps: Roll out the puff pastry and cut it into rectangles.
Place the cooked asparagus on the dough, along with the serrano ham.
Close the dough around the filling and paint with beaten egg.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes or until golden.

title: Various Salmon And Pâté Canapes
steps: Step 1: Prepare the salmon canapes...
Step 2: Prepare the pâté canapés...

title: Salmon And Mango Tartar
steps: Step 1: Cut the salmon and mango into small pieces.
Step 2: Mix both ingredients.

title: Zucchini And Parmesan Carpaccio
steps: Finely slice the zucchini with a vegetable peeler or mandolin.
Arrange it on individual plates in a circle.
Grate the parmesan over the zucchini.
Dress with olive oil and salt to taste.

title: Tiger Mussels (Stuffed And Fried)
steps: Step 1: Open the mussels and separate the meat from the shells.
Step 2: In a bowl, mix the mussel meat with chopped garlic and fresh chopped parsley.
Step 3: Add the lemon juice and breadcrumbs to the previous mixture. Mix everything well.
Step 4: Fill the mussel shells with the prepared mixture.
Step 5: Dip the stuffed mussels in breadcrumbs and fry in a pan with hot oil until golden brown.

title: Leek And Prawn Pie
steps: Step 1: Cook the leeks until they are soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked leeks with the shrimp and other ingredients.

title: Prawn Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the shrimp and let them cool.
Step 2: Chop the onion and peppers.
Step 3: Mix the shrimp, onion, peppers and mayonnaise in a bowl.
Step 4: Serve the cold salad.

title: Garlic Florets
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet.
Step 2: Add the whole florets and fry until golden.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic cloves and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Mimosa Eggs (Stuffed With Yolk And Mayonnaise)
steps: Cook the eggs until they are ready for codons.
Separate the yolks from the whites and reserve the yolks.
Mix the yolks with the mayonnaise until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Fill each boiled egg with the yolk and mayonnaise mixture.

title: Cheese Fondue (Savoyarde)
steps: Melt the cheese in a pan with white wine.
Serve hot with pieces of bread.

title: Glass Bread With Tomato And Oil
steps: Cut the glass bread into slices.
Rub the slices with fresh tomato and olive oil.

title: Duck Rillettes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Step 2: Season the duck with salt and pepper.

title: Homemade Foie Gras Mi-Cuit
steps: Step 1: Freeze the duck liver for 2 hours.
Step 2: Cook at low temperature in a preheated oven at 65°C for 45 minutes.

title: Breaded Mushrooms With Aioli
steps: Step 1: Clean the mushrooms and chop them finely.
Step 2: Mix flour with water to make a dough.
Step 3: Knead the dough until you obtain a smooth texture.
Step 4: Add the chopped garlic to the dough.
Step 5: Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil until golden.
Step 6: For the aioli, mix the chopped garlic clove with olive oil until you obtain a smooth paste.

title: Whiskey Prawns
steps: Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the prawns and sauté until pink.
Add the whiskey and cook until reduced by half.
Serve hot.

title: Melon Skewer With Ham
steps: Cut the melon into small pieces.
Thread the melon and ham pieces on a skewer.

title: Sacher Cake
steps: Melt the dark chocolate together with the butter in a double boiler.
Add the sugar and eggs, mix until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add the flour and mix well.
Pour the dough into a buttered mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 40 minutes.

title: Homemade Chocolate Truffles
steps: Melt the dark chocolate together with the unsalted butter in a saucepan over a bain-marie.
Once melted, remove it from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
Using a spoon or a small pastry bag, form chocolate balls and place them on a baking tray lined with baking paper.
Let the truffles cool in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.

title: Chocolate And Almond Rocks
steps: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler.
Mix the melted chocolate with the chopped almonds.
Form the mixture into balls and let it cool.

title: Soplillos De La Alpujarra
steps: Step 1: Mix flour with water until forming a dough.
Step 2: Add sugar to the mixture and knead for a few minutes.

title: Almond Mantecados
steps: Step 1: In a rectangular mold, mix the ground almonds with the sugar until you obtain a homogeneous dough.
Step 2: With your hands in the shape of a ball, take portions of the dough and shape it into a round shape. Place the shortbreads on a baking sheet.
Step 3: Bake at medium-low temperature (150°C) for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Homemade Polvorones
steps: Mix the flour with the icing sugar.
Add the butter and mix until you obtain a homogeneous dough.
Make balls with the dough and place them on a baking tray.
Bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes or until golden.

title: Crunchy Chocolate Nougat
steps: Melt the butter over medium heat in a skillet.
Add the chopped dark chocolate and stir until completely melted.
Remove from the heat and add the rice flour, mixing well.
Pour the mixture into a rectangular mold and level it with a spatula.
Let cool at room temperature for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: Roscón De Reyes
steps: Dilute the yeast in a little warm water with a pinch of sugar.
Mix the flour with the rest of the sugar, eggs and butter until you obtain a soft dough.
Add the dissolved yeast and knead for a few minutes.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for about two hours.
Prepare the dough to form the roscón, and let it rise again for half an hour.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 25 minutes or until golden.

detailedIngredients.name: orange
detailedIngredients.quantity: the zest and juice of 1 unit

title: Homemade Village Muffins
steps: Mix the eggs with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the flour and baking powder, mixing well.
Add the water little by little while continuing to mix.
Fill the muffin molds with the dough obtained.
Bake for 20 minutes at 180 degrees.

title: Orange Sponge Cake
steps: Mix the eggs with the sugar until they are fluffy.
Add the flour and baking powder, mix well.
Add the orange juice and mix until there are no lumps.
Add the melted butter and mix until well incorporated.
Pour the mixture into a buttered and floured cake pan.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 30 minutes or until golden.

title: Upside-Down Pineapple Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Melt the butter in a saucepan over heat.
Mix the flour with the baking powder.
In a bowl, beat the eggs and add the sugar until you get a foamy mixture.
Add the flour mixture to the eggs and sugar mixture.
Add the melted butter to the previous mixture.
Place the pineapple slices in a cake pan.
Pour the mixture over the pineapple slices.
Bake for 45 minutes or until golden.

title: Nougat Mousse
steps: Mix the grated nougat with the whipping cream until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Pour the mixture into individual molds and let it cool in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Unmold and serve.

title: Mango Sorbet
steps: Freeze peeled and chopped mangoes for at least 2 hours.
Process the frozen mangoes with sugar until obtaining a smooth texture.
Add water little by little while continuing to process until the desired consistency is reached.
Serve Immediately

title: Crepes Suzette (Orange)
steps: Beat the eggs and milk together.
Add the flour little by little until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Let the mixture rest for 30 minutes.
Cook the crepes in a pan greased with butter.

title: Cup Of Chocolate And Cream (Homemade Dalky)
steps: Melt the chocolate in a bain-marie.
Whip the cream and mix it with the melted chocolate.
Pour the mixture into individual glasses and let cool before serving.

title: Lettuce Salad, Bacon And Goat Cheese
steps: Step 1: Wash and drain the lamb's lettuce.
Step 2: Cut the bacon into small pieces and fry until crispy. Drain them on kitchen paper to remove excess fat.
Step 3: Cut the goat cheese into small portions.
Step 4: Mix the lamb's lettuce, bacon and goat cheese in a bowl. Add the vinaigrette of your choice and serve.

title: Kartoffelsalat (German Potato Salad, Without Mayonnaise)
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
Peel them and cut them into pieces.
Mix the potatoes with the chopped onion, chopped fresh parsley, vinegar and oil.

title: Niçoise Salad (Green Beans, Egg, Anchovies)
steps: Step 1: Cook the green beans until tender.
Step 2: Cut the boiled eggs into slices.
Step 3: Mix the green beans, eggs and anchovies on a plate.

title: Curry Chicken Salad
steps: Cook the chicken until golden and cooked.
Add the carrots and chopped garlic to the pan with the chicken.
Add the coconut milk and curry powder. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes.
Serve the curried chicken salad hot or cold.

title: Avocado And Prawn Salad
steps: Step 1: Cut the avocado into small pieces.
Step 2: Cook the prawns until they are well done.
Step 3: Mix the avocado and prawns in a bowl.

title: Tomato Salad With Sliced ​​Garlic
steps: Peel the garlic and chop it finely.
Wash the tomatoes and cut them into pieces.
Mix the tomatoes with the sliced ​​garlic in a bowl.
Serve the salad cold.

title: Lentil Salad With Rice
steps: Cook rice and lentils separately according to package instructions.
Finely chop the onion, garlic and red pepper.
Peel and chop the carrots into small pieces.
In a frying pan with hot oil, sauté the onion, garlic and pepper until golden.
Add the carrots to the pan and cook for a few more minutes.
Mix cooked rice, cooked lentils, the vegetable mixture and a little oil in a large bowl. Mix everything well.
Serve hot or cold.

title: Eel And Shrimp Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the eels and shrimp.
Step 2: Mix with the lettuce and season with olive oil.

title: Feta Cheese And Watermelon Salad
steps: Cut the lettuce into pieces.
Peel it and cut the watermelon into cubes.
Grate the feta cheese over the salad.

title: Curry Rice
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a frying pan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic.
Add the diced carrot and zucchini and cook until soft.
Add the curry powder and stir well.
Add the crushed tomatoes and let them cook over low heat for a few minutes.
Add 2 cups of water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Once it boils, add the cooked rice and mix everything well.
Let the rice absorb the liquid and serve hot.

title: Hasselback Potatoes
steps: Preheat the oven to 220°C.
Wash and peel the potatoes. Cut them into thin slices without reaching the end so that they remain united.
Place the potatoes in a baking dish, drizzle them with olive oil and season them with salt and pepper.
Bake for 45 minutes or until golden and crisp.

title: Brussels Sprouts With Ham
steps: Step 1: Steam the brussels sprouts until tender.
Step 2: In a hot pan, add the ham and cook until golden.
Step 3: Add the cooked brussels sprouts to the pan with the ham and mix everything.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Roasted Pumpkin With Spices
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Cut the pumpkin into pieces and place it in a bowl.
Add olive oil, sweet paprika, ground cumin and salt to the bowl. Mix until the pumpkin is well coated with the spices.
Place the pumpkin pieces on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes or until soft.

title: Moorish Carrots (Dressed)
steps: Peel and cut the carrots into slices.
Cook the carrots until they are tender.
Dress with olive oil, salt and pepper.

title: Roasted Peppers In Strips
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Wash and dry the peppers. Cut them into strips.
Put them in a bowl, add olive oil and mix so that they are well covered.
Place the pepper strips on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes or until soft.

title: Sanfaina (Fried Vegetables)
steps: Step 1: Cut the onion, peppers and zucchini into large pieces.
Step 2: Heat oil in a large skillet and add the vegetables.
Step 3: Cook over medium heat until soft and golden.

title: Pea Puree
steps: Step 1: Cook the peas until they are soft.
Step 2: Strain the peas and puree them until they are pureed.
Step 3: Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Mushrooms In Green Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large frying pan.
Step 2: Add the mushrooms and cook until golden.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the vinegar and let it reduce.
Step 5: Add the chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Cassava Cooked With Mojo
steps: Peel the cassava and cut it into pieces.
Cook the cassava until soft.
Mash the garlic with the sweet paprika and vinegar.
Heat the olive oil in a frying pan and add the garlic and paprika mixture.
Add the cooked yuca to the pan and stir to coat it with the mojo.

title: Rice And Fish Soup
steps: Step 1: Cook the rice until soft.
Step 2: Add the fish and cook until well done.

title: Crab Cream
steps: Cook the crabs in boiling water for a few minutes.
Peel the crabs and reserve the broth.
Chop the leek and potato and fry them in a saucepan with a little oil.
Add the peeled crabs to the casserole and cook everything together for a few minutes.
Add the reserved broth and let everything boil for a few more minutes.
Process the mixture in the blender until you obtain a smooth cream.

title: Miso Soup
steps: Step 1: Heat the chicken broth in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the miso, ginger, onion, garlic and leek to the pot.
Step 3: Cook over medium heat until the ingredients are soft.
Step 4: Add the chicken meat and cook until cooked.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Creamed Spinach
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot. Add the chopped onion and cook until soft.
Step 2: Add the chopped potatoes to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 3: Add the chopped spinach to the pot and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add the vegetable broth and boil everything for a few minutes.
Step 5: Remove from heat and blend everything in a food processor until smooth.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Galician Broth (Beans, Turnip Greens, Potatoes)
steps: Step 1: Cook the beans until they are soft.
Step 2: Add the turnip greens and the potato cut into pieces and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add enough water to cover the ingredients, salt to taste and let the broth boil for a few minutes.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Michelada
steps: Mix the egg white with the lemon juice and hot sauce.
Fill a glass with beer and add the prepared mixture.
Stir well until everything is combined.

title: Piña Colada
steps: Cut the pineapple into pieces and boil until soft.
Blend the pineapple with coconut milk until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Add rum to taste and mix well.
Serve over ice and garnish with a pineapple slice.

title: Carajillo De Rum
steps: Heat the coffee in a pot until it boils.
Add rum to taste and mix well.
Serve hot.

title: Honey And Mustard Vinaigrette Sauce
steps: Mix honey and mustard until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add vinegar and olive oil to taste.

title: Homemade Genoese Pesto
steps: Step 1: In a food processor, blend the minced garlic and fresh basil leaves until you obtain a paste.
Step 2: Add the pistachios and parmesan to the processor and mix until well incorporated.
Step 3: Add olive oil little by little while mixing in the processor until it reaches the desired consistency.

title: Fennel And Orange Salad
steps: Step 1: Wash and cut the fennel into small pieces.
Step 2: Peel the orange and separate the segments.

title: Tandoori Chicken
steps: Mix yogurt, garlic, ginger and spices in a bowl.
Add the chicken to the mixture and let marinate for at least an hour.
Cook the chicken in the oven preheated to 200 degrees Celsius until cooked.

title: Salmon Poke Bowl
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Cut the salmon into small pieces and season it with paprika.
Heat oil in a frying pan and add the chopped onion. Cook until transparent.
Add the salmon to the pan and cook until well done. Remove from heat.
In a bowl, mix the cooked rice with the soy sauce.
Assemble the ingredients in a bowl: first the rice, then the salmon and finally the onion.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Tuna Tataki
steps: Cut the tuna into thin fillets.
Heat a frying pan with olive oil over high heat.
Sear the tuna fillets for 30 seconds on each side.
Remove the fillets from the pan and let them cool.
Cut the tuna into thin slices and serve it with soy sauce.

title: Sea Bass Ceviche
steps: Cut the sea bass into small pieces and place it in a bowl.
Squeeze the lemons over the corvina and mix everything well.
Finely chop the onion and garlic, and add them to the bowl.
Add pepper to taste and mix everything again.
Let it rest in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.

title: Sirloin Stroganoff
steps: Cut the meat into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Brown the meat in a pan with a little oil.
Add the chopped onion and crushed garlic. Cook until golden.
Add the sweet paprika and mustard. Mix well.
Add the cooking cream. Let it reduce for a few minutes.
Serve hot with rice or potatoes as an accompaniment.

title: Hungarian Goulash
steps: Cut the beef into small pieces.
Peel and peel the garlic, peel and cut the onion into cubes.
Heat oil in a large pot and sauté the meat until golden brown on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and garlic to the pot and cook until soft.
Add the red peppers cut into strips and cook for a few more minutes.
Add the sweet paprika and stir well to combine with the meat and vegetable mixture.
Add the crushed tomato and cook over medium heat for about 20-25 minutes.
Add enough beef broth to cover the mixture and simmer for another 30 minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy your delicious Hungarian Goulash.

title: Chili Con Carne
steps: Cook the pork until it is cooked through.
Add the red peppers, onion and garlic. Cook until soft.
Add the canned tomatoes and kidney beans. Cook for a few more minutes.

title: Chicken And Lemon Tagine
steps: Heat oil in a saucepan.
Add the chicken cut into pieces and brown.
Add the chopped onion, crushed garlic and cut red peppers.
Cook until soft.
Add the lemon juice and a little water.
Cover the pot and let it cook over medium heat for about 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Huevos Rancheros
steps: Cook the eggs to taste.
Heat the ranch sauce and refried beans in a frying pan.
Heat the corn tortillas in another pan.

title: Shakshuka
steps: Cook the onion, pepper and garlic until golden.
Add the tomatoes and cook for a few minutes.
Make holes for the eggs in the tomato mixture and add the eggs.
Cover with a lid and cook until the eggs are cooked.

title: Spaghetti With Meatballs
steps: Step 1: Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions.
Step 2: Prepare the ground beef by mixing it with chopped onion, chopped garlic and fresh parsley.
Step 3: Make small balls with the meat mixture and fry them until golden brown on all sides.
Step 4: Add the tomato sauce to a pot and let it cook over medium heat for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add the fried meatballs to the tomato sauce and let them cook together for a few more minutes.
Step 6: Serve the hot spaghetti with the meatballs in tomato sauce on top.

title: Ham And Cheese Calzone
steps: Spread the pizza dough in a circular shape.
Add tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese to one half of the dough.
Place the cooked ham on the cheese.
Fold the other half of the dough over the filling and secure with a fork.
Bake at 200°C for 15 minutes or until golden.

title: Mixed Sandwich (Bikini)
steps: Cut the loaf bread in half horizontally.
Place a slice of cooked ham on each half of bread.
Add a slice of semi-cured cheese on top of the cooked ham.
Join the two halves of the bread and press so that they come together well.

title: Lentil Burger
steps: Cook the lentils according to the package instructions.
In a frying pan, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic until golden.
Mix the cooked lentils with the onion and garlic in a food processor until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Form the lentil mixture into balls and fry them in a pan until golden brown on all sides.
Toast the hamburger bun in a frying pan.

title: Sausages In Wine
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion and garlic in a frying pan with a little oil.
Step 2: Add the sausages and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add the red wine to the pan, stir well to deglaze and let the liquid reduce until you obtain a thick sauce.

title: Saxony Cutlets
steps: Season the pork chops with salt and pepper.
Mix chopped garlic and fresh parsley with breadcrumbs.
Dredge the chops in the breadcrumb mixture until completely coated.
Heat oil in a frying pan and fry the chops over medium heat for about 5 minutes on each side or until golden and cooked.
Serve hot and enjoy

title: Liver With Onions
steps: Cut the onion into small pieces and sauté in a pan with a little oil.
Add the beef liver cut into pieces and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add salt, pepper and cumin to taste. Cook for a few more minutes until the liver is cooked.

title: Kidneys With Sherry
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a frying pan and add the chopped onion.
Step 2: Add the cleaned kidneys and brown them on all sides.
Step 3: Add the sherry and let it reduce by half.
Step 4: Add water to cover the kidneys, cover the pan and cook for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add the chopped garlic and parsley, cook for a few more minutes.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Stewed Tongue
steps: Step 1: Clean the beef tongue and place it in a pot with boiling water.
Step 2: Add the chopped onion, the whole garlic, the sweet paprika, the vinegar, the bay leaves and let it cook for about two hours until the tongue is tender.
Step 3: Add the crushed tomato and let it cook for about 10 more minutes.

title: Pig'S Trotters In Sauce
steps: Step 1: Saute the pig's trotters until golden.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and parsley.
Step 3: Add the tomato and cook until it softens.
Step 4: Add the red wine and let it reduce until the sauce thickens.

title: Baked Picantones
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Clean and cut the picantones into pieces.
In a bowl, mix the sweet and spicy paprika with ground garlic and olive oil.
Spread the chicken pieces with the previous mixture.
Place the chicken pieces on a baking sheet.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden and cooked through.

title: Riojan-Style Cod
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod overnight.
Step 2: In a pan with olive oil, sauté the garlic and chopped red peppers until golden.
Step 3: Add the soaked and crumbled cod to the pan. Cook for a few minutes until well done.
Step 4: Add the sweet paprika and bay leaf. Mix everything well.
Step 5: Let it cook for a few more minutes, until the mixture is well integrated.

title: Monkfish In Green Sauce
steps: Step 1: Clean and cut the monkfish into pieces.
Step 2: In a frying pan with hot olive oil, brown the monkfish pieces until they are cooked.

title: Creamed Trout
steps: Step 1: Season the trout with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Heat a frying pan with oil and cook the trout on both sides until golden. Remove from heat and reserve.
Step 3: In the same pan, add the cream and let it heat over medium-low heat.
Step 4: Add the cooked trout to the cream and cook for a few more minutes until the cream is very hot. Serves Immediately.

title: Grilled Rooster
steps: Season the chicken with salt and pepper to taste.
Heat a frying pan over medium-high heat with a little oil.
Add the seasoned chicken to the pan and cook until golden brown and cooked through.

title: Sole Meuniere
steps: Season the sole fillets with salt and pepper.
Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook until golden.
Add the sole fillets to the pan and cook for about 3 minutes on each side or until cooked.
Add the chopped parsley to the pan and cook for another minute.
Serve the sole hot with the garlic and parsley butter.

title: Sea Bass In Salt
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Wash the sea bass and dry it with kitchen paper.
Season the sea bass inside and out with salt.
Place the sea bass in a baking dish.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the fish is cooked.

title: Escudella I Carn D'Olla
steps: Step 1: In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic until golden.
Step 2: Add the beef cut into large pieces and cook until sealed on all sides.
Step 3: Add the chopped potatoes, carrots, celery and leek. Cook everything for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the rice and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Cover the mixture with water and add the crushed tomato. Bring to a boil.
Step 6: Cook the escudella over medium heat for about two hours, until the meat is soft and the rice is cooked.
Step 7: Serve hot and enjoy this delicious traditional Catalan recipe.

title: Trinxat De La Cerdanya
steps: Peel and chop the potatoes and onion.
In a frying pan, fry the bacon until golden brown.
Add the chopped onion and fry until transparent.
Add the chopped potatoes and leeks, season with salt and pepper and cook everything together for about 10 minutes.
Once ready, lightly mash the trinxat with a fork or unafork to give it the characteristic texture.

title: Arepas Queen Pepiada (Chicken And Avocado)
steps: Step 1: Prepare the corn dough according to the package instructions.
Step 2: Cook the chicken until it is cooked through. Let cool and crumble.
Step 3: Peel and finely chop the onion, garlic and cilantro. Mix with paprika and salt to taste.
Step 4: Peel and finely chop the tomatoes. Mix with the onion, garlic and cilantro mixture.
Step 5: Add the shredded chicken to the previous mixture and mix well.
Step 6: Peel and cut the avocado into small pieces. Mix with chicken mixture and other ingredients.
Step 7: Form the arepas with the corn dough and fill them with the chicken and avocado mixture.
Step 8: Cook the arepas in a pan with hot oil until golden on both sides.

title: Duck Confit (Confit)
steps: Preheat the oven to 250°C.
Rub the salt all over the duck, including the interior cavities.
Place the duck in a baking dish and put it in the preheated oven for 3 hours.
Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.

title: Stuffed Cabbage Rolls (Sarma)
steps: Step 1: Wash and cook the cabbage until soft.
Step 2: Mix the ground meat with the cooked rice, chopped onion, chopped garlic, chopped parsley and salt to taste.
Step 3: Fill each cabbage leaf with the previous mixture.
Step 4: Roll the cabbage leaves to form the rolls.
Step 5: Place the rolls in a baking dish, add chopped tomato and cook at medium temperature for 20 minutes.

title: Lamb Couscous
steps: Step 1: Cut the lamb meat into small pieces.
Step 2: In a large pot, brown the lamb pieces in hot oil until well cooked on all sides.
Step 3: Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add the chopped pepper and crushed tomato to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Add the meat broth to the pot and let it boil. Add the couscous and cook for about 10 minutes until done.
Step 6: Serve the hot lamb couscous on individual plates.

title: French Tuna Omelet
steps: Beat the eggs and add the tuna. Cook in a non-stick pan until set on both sides.

title: Spinach And Cheese Crepes
steps: Step 1: Wash and chop the spinach.
Step 2: Mix the spinach with the grated cheese.
Step 3: Beat the eggs and add the spinach and cheese mixture.
Step 4: Add the flour and mix well.
Step 5: Heat a non-stick pan and pour a little of the mixture to make each crepe.
Step 6: Cook until golden on both sides.

title: Scotch Eggs
steps: Cut the bread into thin slices.
Toast the bread until golden.
Fry the eggs until they are ready.

title: Edamame With Salt
steps: Cook edamame according to package instructions.
Add salt to taste and serve hot.

title: Chicken Gyozas
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces and mix with the other ingredients.
Knead the flour dough until it forms a ball.
Stretch the dough and cut it into circles of the desired size.
Fill each circle with the chicken mixture and close the gyozas.
Fry the gyozas in hot oil until golden on both sides.

title: Bao Bread With Bacon
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Cut the bacon into small pieces and fry it until crispy.
Step 3: Open the bao breads in half, place the fried bacon inside and close them again.
Step 4: Place the bao buns on a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes until hot and golden.

title: Fuet Tartar
steps: Cut the fuet into small pieces and put it in a bowl.
Peel and finely chop the onion and garlic. Add them to the bowl along with the chopped cilantro.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the bowl and mix everything well.
Serve the fuet tartar on a platter and decorate with some coriander leaves.

title: Grilled Creole Chorizo
steps: Heat the grill to high temperature.
Cut the Creole chorizo ​​into 1 cm thick slices.
Place the chorizo ​​slices on the hot grill and cook until golden brown on both sides.
Mix the sweet and hot peppers with minced garlic and a little olive oil to form a paste.
Spread the pasta over the cooked chorizo ​​slices and serve.

title: Scrambled Blood Sausage And Pine Nuts
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a frying pan.
Step 2: Add the blood sausage and cook until golden brown.
Step 3: Add the pine nuts and stir everything together.

title: Gratin Portobello Mushrooms
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Wipe the portobello mushrooms with a damp cloth and remove the stem.
In a bowl, mix the breadcrumbs and Parmesan cheese.
Add minced garlic to the bowl and mix well.
Place the mushrooms on a baking sheet and cover each one with the breadcrumb and Parmesan cheese mixture.
Bake for 10 minutes or until golden and crispy.

title: Seafood Volovanes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Step 2: Finely chop the onion and garlic.
Step 3: In a frying pan with olive oil, sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Step 4: Add the chopped shrimp and prawns to the pan. Cook until well cooked.
Step 5: Add the chopped parsley to the seafood mixture.
Step 6: Fill the volovanes with the seafood mixture and close them carefully.
Step 7: Place the volovanes on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes or until golden.

title: Anchovy And Brie Cheese Toast
steps: Step 1: Spread brie cheese on a slice of bread.
Step 2: Place the anchovies on the cheese and heat in the oven until golden.

title: Valencian Esgarraet
steps: Peel the garlic and cut it into small pieces.
Heat the extra virgin olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped garlic to the pan and fry until golden.
Remove the pan from the heat and add the sweet paprika, stirring well to prevent it from burning.
Let the esgarraet cool before serving it.

title: Mullet Roe With Almonds
steps: Step 1...
Step 2...

title: Canarian Grilled Cheese With Mojo
steps: Cut the clown cheese into thick slices.
Peel the garlic and mash with a little salt.
Mix olive oil, sweet paprika and vinegar to make the mojo.
Heat a frying pan with olive oil and fry the cheese slices until golden.
Serve the cheese hot accompanied by the mojo on top.

title: Tostones (Plantain)
steps: Peel and cut the bananas into slices approximately 1 cm thick.
Heat oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the banana slices to the pan and fry them until golden on both sides.
Remove the banana slices from the pan and place them on kitchen paper to drain excess oil.
Lightly mash each slice with a fork or flat object to achieve a crispy texture.

detailedIngredients.name: oil
detailedIngredients.quantity: in enough quantity to cover the bananas in the pan

title: Baked Sweet Potato Sticks
steps: Peel the sweet potatoes and cut them into sticks. Beat the oil and spread the sticks. Bake at 200 degrees for 20 minutes or until golden.

title: Beet Hummus
steps: Step 1: Cook the chickpeas until they are soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked chickpeas with the cooked beet in a blender until obtaining a smooth texture.

title: Mussels A La Marinara
steps: Step 1: In a frying pan, sauté the chopped garlic.
Step 2: Add the mussels and cook until they open.
Step 3: Add the white wine and let it reduce.
Step 4: Add the chopped tomato and chopped parsley. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Gabardine Shrimp
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a frying pan.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and fry until golden.

title: Baba Ganoush (Eggplant Pâté)
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Place the eggplants on a baking sheet and bake for 45 minutes or until soft.
Let the eggplants cool, then peel them and remove the seeds.
In a food processor, combine the eggplants with two cloves of minced garlic, two tablespoons of olive oil, a teaspoon of sweet paprika and the juice of half a lemon.
Process until smooth. If necessary, add more olive oil to reach the desired consistency.
Transfer to a bowl and serve with toasted bread or raw vegetables.

title: Fried Camembert With Blueberries
steps: Take the camembert out of the refrigerator and cut it into slices.
Coat the slices in flour, then in beaten egg and finally in breadcrumbs.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Once the oil is hot, add the camembert slices and fry them until golden.
Remove the slices with a slotted spoon and place them on kitchen paper to drain excess oil.
Serve the fried camembert slices accompanied by fresh blueberries.

title: Red Velvet Cake
steps: Mix the dry ingredients.
Beat the butter with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the eggs one at a time.
Add the dry ingredients and alternative milk to the previous mixture.
Add red food coloring and white vinegar.
Pour the mixture into a buttered and floured cake pan.
Bake at 180 degrees for 30 minutes.

title: Oreo Cheesecake
steps: Grind the Oreo cookies into powder.
Mix the cream cheese, sugar and whipping cream until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Add the Oreo cookie mixture to the cream cheese and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a cheesecake mold and bake at low temperature for 45 minutes.
Let cool and serve.

title: Pumpkin Pie (Pumpkin Pie)
