steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Step 2: Prepare the cake dough and place it in a cake pan.

title: Apple Crumble
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Peel the apples and cut them into pieces. Toss the apple pieces with a little brown sugar in a baking pan.
In a bowl, mix the flour, the rest of the brown sugar and the margarine until a crumbly dough forms.
Spread the crumble mixture over the apples in the mold.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the crumble is golden.

title: Strawberry Mousse
steps: Step 1: Wash the strawberries and dry them.
Step 2: Beat the strawberries with sugar until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Step 3: Add water and continue beating.
Step 4: Melt the chocolate in a water bath.
Step 5: Mix the strawberry mixture with the melted chocolate.

title: Butter Cookies
steps: Mix the butter with the sugar until you obtain a creamy mixture.
Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Add the flour little by little and mix until there are no lumps.
Make balls with the dough and place them on a sheet of baking paper.
Bake the cookies for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
steps: Step 1: Mix the softened butter with the sugar until you get a creamy mixture.
Step 2: Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Step 3: Add the flour and mix until well incorporated.
Step 4: Add the chocolate chips and mix to distribute them evenly.
Step 5: Form dough balls with your hands and place them on a baking sheet.
Step 6: Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 10-12 minutes or until golden.
Step 7: Let the cookies cool on the tray for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.

title: American Pancakes (Pancakes)
steps: Mix the flour, eggs and milk in a bowl until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Heat a frying pan over medium-high heat and add a little oil.
Pour a little of the mixture over the pan to form each pancake.
Cook the pancakes until golden brown on both sides.
Serve hot with maple syrup or jam.

title: Chocolate Waffles
steps: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler.
Mix the flour with the eggs and add the melted chocolate.
Cook the waffles in a waffle iron until golden brown.

title: Pumpkin Fritters
steps: Cut the pumpkin into pieces and boil it until soft.
Mix the cooked pumpkin with the eggs, sugar and flour.
Form balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil until golden.

title: Pine Nut Panellets
steps: Grind the pine nuts until you obtain a flour texture.
Mix the rice flour with the sugar.
Add the ground pine nuts to the previous mixture and mix well.
Make balls with the dough obtained.
Place the balls on a baking sheet.

title: Coca De Llanda
steps: Mix the eggs with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the flour to the previous mixture and mix well.
Add the melted butter to the flour and egg mixture.
Pour the mixture into a llanda mold and bake for 30 minutes at 180 degrees.

title: Pastels De Belém (Cream)
steps: Step 1: Prepare the puff pastry.
Step 2: Prepare the pastry cream.
Step 3: Fill the molds with the dough and cream.
Step 4: Bake the cakes until golden.

title: Saint'S Bones
steps: Step 1: Beat the almonds until they form a paste.
Step 2: Add the icing sugar and mix well.
Step 3: Knead the mixture until you obtain a soft dough.
Step 4: Spread the dough on baking paper and cut with bone-shaped molds.
Step 5: Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes or until golden.

title: Fruits Of Aragon
steps: Select the fruits from Aragon that you prefer.
Wash the fruits.
Enjoy your fruits from Aragon.

title: Chicken And Pineapple Salad
steps: Cook the chicken and let it cool before cutting it into small pieces.
Cut the pineapple into small pieces.

title: Fig And Goat Cheese Salad
steps: Step 1: Wash and dry the spinach.
Step 2: Cut the figs into quarters.
Step 3: In a bowl, mix the spinach, figs and almonds.
Step 4: Add the crumbled goat cheese.

title: White Asparagus And Vinaigrette Salad
steps: Cook the white asparagus until tender.
Mix the lettuce and tomatoes cut into pieces with the asparagus.
Add the olive oil and vinegar to make the vinaigrette.

title: Wakame And Cucumber Salad
steps: Step 1: Soak the wakame in water for a few minutes until it softens.
Step 2: Wash and cut the cucumber into thin slices.
Step 3: Mix the drained wakame with the cucumber slices in a bowl.
Step 4: Add the vinaigrette of your choice and mix well.

title: Broccoli, Bacon And Raisin Salad
steps: Cook the bacon until crispy and set aside.
Cut the broccoli into small pieces and steam it until tender.
In a large bowl, mix the cooked broccoli with the raisins and the reserved bacon.
Add the vinaigrette of choice and mix everything well.

title: Green Bean And Potato Salad
steps: Cook the green beans and potatoes separately until they are tender.
Mix the green beans and potatoes in a bowl.
Add the dressing of your choice and serve.

title: Belly Belly Salad With Piquillo Peppers
steps: Step 1: Cut the belly into small pieces.
Step 2: Mix the belly with the chopped piquillo peppers.

title: Pasta Salad With Smoked Salmon
steps: Cook the pasta according to the instructions on the package.
Cut the smoked salmon into small pieces.
Finely chop the onion and garlic.
In a bowl, mix the cooked pasta, smoked salmon, onion and garlic.
Add olive oil and balsamic vinegar to taste.
Mix everything well until the ingredients are well incorporated.

title: Corn, Tomato And Fresh Cheese Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the corn until tender.
Step 2: Cut the tomato into cubes.
Step 3: Cut the fresh cheese into cubes.
Step 4: Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Tomato And Cucumber Salad
steps: Cut the tomatoes and cucumbers into pieces.
Mix the tomato and cucumber pieces in a bowl.
Add your favorite dressing (optional).

title: Basmati Rice With Cardamom
steps: Cook the basmati rice according to the package instructions.
Add the cardamom powder to the rice cooking water.
Cook over medium heat until the rice is cooked and the water has completely evaporated.

title: Sweet Potato Puree
steps: Peel and cut the sweet potato into pieces.
Cook the sweet potato pieces in water until they are soft.
Drain the water and mix the sweet potato pieces until you obtain a smooth puree.
Add salt and pepper to taste and serve hot.

detailedIngredients.name: water
detailedIngredients.quantity: enough to cover the sweet potato pieces

title: Grilled Zucchini
steps: Cut the zucchini into slices.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the zucchini slices and cook until golden on both sides.
Remove from heat and season to taste.

title: Vegetable Chips (Beet/Cassava)
steps: Peel the beets and cassava.
Cut the roots into thin slices with a mandoline or sharp knife.
Fry the sheets in hot oil until golden and crispy.
Drain on kitchen paper to remove excess fat.
Season with sea salt to taste.

title: Fried Banana
steps: Cut the bananas into slices.
Heat oil in a frying pan.
Add the banana slices and fry until golden brown on both sides.
Remove the fried slices and place them on kitchen paper to drain excess oil.

title: Wrinkled Potatoes With Mojo
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Boil the potatoes until soft.
Mix olive oil, minced garlic, paprika and vinegar to make the mojo.
Remove the potatoes from the hot water and fry them until golden brown.
Serve the potatoes with the mojo on top.

title: Refried Black Beans
steps: Cook the black beans until soft.
In a frying pan, heat the oil and add the chopped onion and chopped garlic. Cook until golden.
Add the cooked beans to the pan and mash them with a fork or blender until smooth.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.

title: Quinoa With Vegetables
steps: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Salt and pepper to taste.

title: Sautéed Tender Wheat
steps: Cook the young wheat until it is tender but still crispy.
Add oil and sauté for a few more minutes.

title: Fried Polenta
steps: 1. Mix the polenta with corn flour until it forms a compact dough.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan and fry the dough in the shape of balls until golden brown on all sides.
3. Remove the balls from the pan and place them on kitchen paper to drain the excess oil.

title: Julienne Vegetable Soup
steps: Step 1: Cut the vegetables into small pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the onion and garlic in a pot with oil until golden.
Step 3: Add the rest of the vegetables and cook over medium heat for about 10 minutes.
Step 4: Add water or vegetable broth to cover the vegetables and let simmer for 20 minutes.
Step 5: Once the vegetables are soft, puree the soup until you get a creamy texture.
Step 6: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Melon Soup With Ham
steps: Step 1: Cut the melon into pieces.
Step 2: Cook the melon pieces until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the ham and cook for a few more minutes.

title: Curried Cauliflower Cream
steps: Step 1: Cook the cauliflower until soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked cauliflower with the vegetable broth and curry powder until creamy.
Step 3: Serve hot.

title: Tomato Soup (Hot)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and paprika, cook for one more minute.
Step 3: Add the chopped tomatoes and bay leaf, cook for about 10 minutes.
Step 4: Blend the mixture until you obtain a thick soup.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Harira (Moroccan Soup)
steps: Cook the lentils until soft.
Peel and chop the onion and garlic, then fry in a pot with olive oil until golden.
Add the chopped tomatoes to the pot and cook for a few minutes.
Add the cooked lentils, chicken broth, salt and pepper to taste. Let everything boil together for about 20 minutes.
Grind the fresh parsley in a mortar or food processor until it forms a paste.

title: Chocolate Coffee
steps: Heat the milk in a saucepan until it is hot but not boiling.
Grind the coffee beans and prepare an amount suitable for two cups.

title: Beer White (With Lemon)
steps: Step 1: In a large jug, mix the light beer with the lemon juice.
Step 2: Add ice and stir well until cold.

title: Prepared Tomato Juice
steps: Step 1: Wash the tomatoes.
Step 2: Cut the tomatoes into pieces and place them in a blender or mixer.

title: Tartar Sauce
steps: Mix the mayonnaise and mustard in a bowl.
Finely chop the pickles and add them to the mixture.
Mix everything until there is a homogeneous sauce.

title: Chimichurri Sauce
steps: Grind the garlic and parsley in a food processor.
Add vinegar and olive oil to the food processor and blend until the mixture is well integrated.

title: Garden Chicken
steps: Step 1: Cut the chicken into pieces and brown it in a pan with oil.
Step 2: Add the chopped peppers, onion, tomato, garlic and carrots. Cook until soft.
Step 3: Add water and rice to the pan and cook until the rice is done.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Beans From La Granja
steps: Step 1: Soak the farm beans for at least 8 hours.
Step 2: In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic with a little oil.
Step 3: Add the sweet paprika and sauté for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the soaked beans, bay leaf and crushed tomato.
Step 5: Cook over medium heat until the beans are tender. Add water if necessary during cooking.

title: Chickpeas With Prawns
steps: Cook the chickpeas until they are tender.
In a frying pan, brown the prawns with a little oil.
Add the cooked chickpeas to the pan and mix everything.
Let it cook for a few minutes until the flavors integrate.
Serve hot.

title: Roman-Style Hake (Battered)
steps: Step 1: Dry the hake with kitchen paper.
Step 2: Dip the hake in beaten egg and then in breadcrumbs.
Step 3: Fry the hake in hot oil until golden on both sides.

title: Bonito With Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cut the tuna into small pieces.
Step 2: Wash and chop the tomatoes.
Step 3: Fry the tuna in a pan with a little oil until golden.
Step 4: Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan and cook for a few minutes until soft.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Zamora Style Rice
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the rice and sauté until transparent.
Step 3: Add the crushed tomato and cook over medium heat for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the paprika, stir well and add water (double the volume of rice).
Step 5: Cook until the rice is done and the broth has completely evaporated.
Step 6: Adjust the salt and serve hot.

title: Spaghetti A La Putaneca
steps: Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions.
In a frying pan, sauté the garlic and chopped pepper.
Add the anchovies and olives, cook until they dissolve.
Add the crushed tomatoes and let it cook over medium heat.
Once ready, mix the cooked spaghetti with the sauce.

title: Tuna Lasagna
steps: Cook the lasagna pasta according to the package instructions.
In a frying pan, brown the tuna in a little oil until it is cooked through. Add the tomato sauce and let it cook for a few minutes.
Assemble the lasagna in a baking dish. Start with a layer of lasagna pasta, followed by a layer of the tuna and tomato sauce mixture, and finish with a layer of mozzarella cheese.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 20 minutes or until the cheese is golden and bubbly.

title: Zucchini Stuffed With Meat
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Cut the zucchini in half and empty the pulp. Reserve.
In a frying pan, sauté the chopped onion until it is transparent.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the ground beef and cook until golden.
Add the crushed tomato and cook for 5 minutes.
Stuff the zucchini with the meat mixture and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes or until tender.

title: Tomatoes Stuffed With Rice And Meat
steps: Step 1: Cut the tomatoes in half and empty the pulp.
Step 2: Cook the rice and mix with the minced meat.

title: Entrecôte With Pepper
steps: Season the entrecote with ground black pepper.
Heat a frying pan over medium-high heat and add olive oil.
Add the seasoned entrecôte to the pan and cook for 4 minutes on each side to reach a medium-rare.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.

title: Cabrales Scallops
steps: Season the scallops with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a frying pan and add the scallops.
Cook until golden on both sides.
Add the grated Cabrales cheese to the pan and cook until melted.
Serve hot.

title: Rabbit In Salmorejo (Canarian)
steps: Step 1: Cut the rabbit into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Step 2: In a pot, sauté the chopped garlic with olive oil.
Step 3: Add the rabbit pieces and brown them on all sides.
Step 4: Add the crushed tomato and cook for 15 minutes.
Step 5: Add water to cover the rabbit pieces, sweet paprika and vinegar. Cook over low heat for 40 minutes or until the rabbit is tender.
Step 6: Remove from heat and let rest before serving.

title: Sirloin With Pedro Ximénez
steps: Heat the olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the pork tenderloin and brown it on all sides until cooked to the desired doneness.
Add the minced garlic cloves and cook for another minute.
Add the Pedro Ximénez wine to the pan, increase the heat and let the liquid reduce until it becomes a thick sauce.
Remove from the heat and serve the sirloin with the sauce on top.

title: Turkey Curry
steps: Cut the turkey into small pieces.
Sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Add the curry powder and stir.
Add the crushed tomato and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and let it cook over medium heat for 20 minutes.
Add the turkey pieces and cook until cooked through.

title: Chicken Enchiladas
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken and shred it.
Step 2: Heat the tortillas.
Step 3: Fill the tortillas with the chicken and roll them up.
Step 4: Cover the enchiladas with sauce and bake.

title: Prawn Pad Thai
steps: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Add the prawns to the pan and cook until pink.
Add the cooked rice noodles to the pan and mix with the fish sauce, tamarind and sweet paprika.
Cook for a few more minutes until everything is well combined.
Serve the Pad Thai on individual plates and sprinkle with fresh cilantro and limes.

title: Pork Ramen (Tonkotsu)
steps: Cook the pork with leek, onion and ginger until tender.
Add water and chicken broth to the cooked pork and bring to a boil.
Beat the mixture with a blender until you obtain a puree.
Cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions.
Serve the ramen in a bowl and add the cooked noodles.

title: Garden Meatballs
steps: Step 1: Mix the ground beef with chopped onion and garlic.
Step 2: Make balls with the mixture and fry them in a pan until golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan with the meatballs and cook for a few more minutes.

title: San Jacobos De Zucchini
steps: Cut the zucchini into thick slices.
Place a slice of mozzarella cheese on each slice of zucchini.
Pass the slices through flour, beaten egg and breadcrumbs.
Fry in hot oil until golden.
Drain on kitchen paper to remove excess fat.

title: Baked Eggs With Tomato And Chorizo
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Cut the tomatoes into slices and place them in a baking mold.
Add the raw eggs to the center of the mold, without them coming out of it.
Cut the chorizo ​​into thin slices and distribute them around the eggs.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the eggs are cooked.

title: Eggplant Omelette
steps: Step 1: Cut the eggplants into thin slices.
Step 2: Coat the eggplants in beaten egg and fry them until golden.
Step 3: Chop the onion and fry it in a pan until it is transparent.
Step 4: Mix the fried eggplants with the sautéed onion and put the mixture in a round mold.
Step 5: Beat the eggs and pour them over the eggplant and onion mixture. Cook until set.

title: Chorizo ​​Omelette
steps: Step 1: Fry the chorizo ​​until golden.
Step 2: Add the beaten eggs and cook until set.

title: Potato Stew With Cod
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Step 2: Cook the cod until tender.
Step 3: Mix the cooked potatoes with the shredded cod.

title: Baked Sea Bream
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Clean and dry the sea bream. Make some superficial cuts in the skin.
Season the sea bream inside with salt, pepper and a little lemon juice.
Put olive oil in a frying pan and heat over medium heat.
Add the chopped garlic and fresh parsley. Fry until golden brown.
Place the sea bream in the pan with the skin side down and cook for 5 minutes.
Turn the sea bream and cook for another 3 minutes.
Transfer the sea bream to a baking dish and put it in the preheated oven. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the fish is cooked.
Take it out of the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.

title: Pickled Mackerel
steps: Cut the mackerel into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a frying pan and fry the mackerel pieces until golden.
Remove the mackerel from the pan and reserve the oil.
In the same oil, sauté the chopped garlic until golden.
Add the vinegar and sweet paprika to the pan and mix well.
Add the fried mackerel back to the pan and stir so that it is well coated with the pickle.
Let cool and serve.

title: Galician-Style Hake (Ajada)
steps: Season the hake with salt and sweet paprika.
In a frying pan, heat the olive oil and add the chopped garlic.
Add the hake to the pan and cook until golden on both sides.
Remove the hake from the pan and serve with the fried garlic.

title: Squid With Onions
steps: Step 1: Cut the onion into thin rings.
Step 2: Fry the squid in a pan with oil until golden.
Step 3: Add the fried onion and cook until soft.
Step 4: Serve hot.

title: Grilled Octopus
steps: Preheat the grill or a large skillet until very hot.
Season the octopus with salt and sweet paprika.
Place the octopus on the hot grill or pan and cook for about 10 minutes on each side.
Add chopped garlic to the olive oil and pour over the octopus.
Serve hot with an additional pinch of salt if necessary.

title: Salmon En Papillote With Vegetables
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Wash and cut the vegetables into small pieces.
Place the salmon on aluminum foil, season with salt and pepper.
Add the vegetables around the salmon.
Close the aluminum foil forming a sealed package.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until salmon is cooked.

title: Tuna Burger
steps: Drain the canned tuna well.
Place a spoonful of tuna on each hamburger bun.
Add lettuce and tomato slices.
Close the burger and serve.

title: Vegetable Sandwich With Egg And Mayonnaise
steps: Cook the eggs until they are well cooked.
Toast whole wheat bread to your liking.
Spread the vegetarian mayonnaise on both slices of bread.
Place the iceberg lettuce leaves on one of the slices.
Add sliced ​​tomato and chopped onion on top of the lettuce.
Place the boiled eggs on the sandwich and cover with the other slice of bread.

title: Pepperoni Pizza
steps: Preheat the oven to 230°C.
Spread the pizza dough on a pizza pan.
Add the tomato sauce and distribute it evenly over the dough.
Add the mozzarella cheese and distribute it evenly over the dough.
Add the pepperoni over the mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 15 minutes or until pizza is golden.

title: Pinto Beans With Rice
steps: Step 1: Cook the pinto beans until they are soft.
Step 2: Cook the rice according to the package instructions.
Step 3: Mix the cooked pinto beans with the cooked rice and serve.

title: Chinese Noodles With Vegetables And Soy
steps: Heat oil in a large frying pan.
Add the chopped onion and garlic, cook until golden.
Add the peppers and broccoli cut into small pieces, cook until tender.
Add the noodles and soy sauce, mix well and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Cod Croquettes
steps: Step 1: Soak the cod for several hours.
Step 2: Crumble the soaked cod and mix it with the egg.
Step 3: Add the breadcrumbs and mix until a compact dough is formed.
Step 4: Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil.

title: Blue Cheese Croquettes
steps: Mix the blue cheese and flour
Make balls with the mixture

title: Eggs Stuffed With Meat Au Gratin
steps: Cook the ground beef until well done.
Mix the meat with chopped boiled eggs and breadcrumbs.
Fill the empty eggs with the meat mixture.
Place the stuffed eggs on a baking tray, sprinkle with more breadcrumbs and bake in the oven until golden brown.

title: Crab Salad (Surimi)
steps: Finely chop the surimi crab.
Peel and chop the red peppers.
Chop the onion into small pieces.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Add mayonnaise to taste and mix well.

title: Mussels In Spicy Sauce
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a frying pan.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and fry until golden.

title: Grilled Scallops
steps: Heat the iron over medium-high heat.
Add a splash of olive oil to the grill.
Place the scallops on the griddle.
Cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side or until they are open and golden.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Grilled Prawns With Coarse Salt
steps: 1. Clean the shrimp and season them with coarse salt.
2. Cook the grilled shrimp until they are pink.

title: Baked Prawns
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees.
Peel and clean the prawns.
Mix the prawns, chopped garlic, chopped fresh parsley and lemon juice in a bowl.
Place the prawns on a baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes or until lightly golden.

title: Octopus With Vinaigrette
steps: Step 1: Cook the octopus in water with salt and paprika until it is tender.
Step 2: Once cooked, cool the octopus in ice water so that it does not continue cooking. Cut it into pieces.
Step 3: Mix olive oil and vinegar to make the vinaigrette.
Step 4: Dress the octopus pieces with the vinaigrette and serve.

title: Fried Chopitos (Puntillitas)
steps: Step 1: Clean the poplars and dry them with kitchen paper.
Step 2: Dip the chopitos in flour and fry them in hot oil until golden.

title: Andalusian-Style Squid
steps: Step 1: Clean and cut the squid into rings.
Step 2: Flour the squid and fry them in hot oil until golden.
Step 3: Drain the fried squid on kitchen paper to remove excess fat.

title: Galician Tuna Empanada
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with water and salt until it forms a dough.
Step 2: Spread the dough and fill it with tuna mixed with sweet paprika, chopped garlic and olive oil.
Step 3: Close the empanada and paint it with a little oil.
Step 4: Bake at 180 degrees for about 25 minutes.

title: Meat Dumplings
steps: Step 1: Mix the ground meat with spices to taste.
Step 2: Fill the empanada dough with the meat mixture.
Step 3: Close the empanadas and bake until golden.

title: Homemade Chicken Nuggets
steps: Cut the chicken into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Dip the chicken pieces in beaten egg and then in breadcrumbs.
Fry the chicken nuggets in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Vegetable Tempura
steps: Cut the vegetables into large pieces.
Mix the flour with water until you obtain a thick dough.
Dip the vegetable pieces in the flour mixture and fry them in plenty of hot oil.
Drain excess oil and serve immediately.

title: Ham And Cheese Rolls (Cold)
steps: Spread a slice of ham on a flat surface.
Place a small portion of cheese on one end of the ham.
Roll the ham inwards to cover the cheese and form a roll.

title: Avocado Toast And Poached Egg
steps: Toast the bread.
Mash the avocado and spread it on the toast.
Poach the eggs and place them on the avocado toast.

title: Eel And Shrimp Toast
steps: Step 1: Cut the shrimp and eels into small pieces.
Step 2: Toast the bread until crispy.
Step 3: Mix the shrimp and eels with a little olive oil.
Step 4: Place the mixture on the toasted bread.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Open Battered Anchovies
steps: Step 1: Clean the anchovies and open them in half.
Step 2: Dip the anchovies in beaten egg and then in breadcrumbs.
Step 3: Fry the anchovies in hot oil until golden.
Step 4: Drain excess oil and serve hot.

title: Seafood Clams
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the clams and white wine. Cook until the clams open.
Step 3: Add the chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Pineapple Carpaccio (Dessert Or Starter)
steps: Cut the pineapple into thin slices.
Arrange the pineapple slices on a plate.
Add lemon juice and fresh chopped mint.
Serve immediately.

title: Hooded Eggs (Béchamel)
steps: Cook the eggs until they are almost hard-boiled. Cool them under running water.
Make a bechamel with the milk, flour and butter.
Peel the eggs and cut them in half.
Place the egg halves in an oven-safe container.
Cover the eggs with the bechamel and sprinkle with grated cheese.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 15 minutes or until the cheese is golden.

title: Parmesan Cheese Lollipops
steps: Step 1: Melt the Parmesan cheese in a saucepan over heat until it is liquid.
Step 2: With the help of a spoon, form small lollipops on a greased baking sheet.

title: Fried Cheese With Cranberry Sauce
steps: Cut the cheese into slices and fry them in a pan with hot oil until golden brown on both sides.
Meanwhile, prepare the cranberry sauce by mashing the cranberries and adding a little water and sugar to taste. Heat the mixture over medium heat until thickened.
Serve the fried cheese hot with the cranberry sauce on top.

title: Nachos With Guacamole (Without Meat)
steps: Chop the onion and cilantro finely.
Mix the avocado with the onion, cilantro, lemon juice and salt to taste.
Heat the nachos in a preheated oven at 180 degrees for a few minutes.
Serve the guacamole on the hot nachos and enjoy.

title: Cold Cheesecake (Without Oven)
steps: Mix the cream cheese, milk and sugar in a bowl.
Add the flour and mix until you obtain a soft dough.
Pour the mixture into a cake pan.
Let cool in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours before serving.

title: Coffee Flan
steps: Mix the milk with the instant coffee in a pot.
Add the sugar to the milk and coffee mixture.
Heat the mixture until the sugar dissolves completely.
Remove from the heat and add the beaten eggs.
Pour the mixture into flan molds and bake in a water bath for 45 minutes.

title: Cheese Flan
steps: Heat the oven to 180 degrees.
Mix the milk and eggs until well integrated.
Add the grated cheese to the previous mixture and stir until completely melted.
Pour the mixture into a flan mold and place in the preheated oven for 45 minutes or until firm.
Let cool before serving.

title: Bread Pudding (Use)
steps: Soak stale bread in milk for 30 minutes.
Beat the eggs and add them to the bowl of soaked bread.
Mix everything until you obtain a uniform mixture.
Pour the mixture into a pudding mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 45 minutes.

title: Yogurt Mousse
steps: Mix yogurt with sugar until smooth.
Add the milk little by little while mixing.
Pour the mixture into mousse molds and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Unmold and serve.

title: Homemade Chocolate Shake
steps: Step 1: Heat the milk.
Step 2: Add chocolate in pieces and mix until melted.

title: Pear Compote
steps: Peel and chop the pears.
Cook the pears in a pot with a little water until they are soft.
Grind the cooked pears until obtaining a smooth texture.

title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Melt the chocolate with the butter in a double boiler.
Mix the eggs with the sugar until fluffy.
Add the chocolate mixture to the eggs and mix well.
Add the flour little by little, mixing carefully to avoid lumps.
Pour the dough into a greased mold and bake at 180 degrees for about 30 minutes.

title: Carrot Cake (Without Cream)
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Grate the carrots and mix them with the eggs and sugar.
Add the flour and yeast to the previous mixture.
Pour the mixture into a cake pan.
Bake for 30 minutes or until cooked.

title: Oatmeal Cookies
steps: Mix the softened butter with the sugar until smooth.
Add the eggs and mix well.
Add the flour and oats, mix until well incorporated.
Roll the dough into balls and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 15 minutes or until golden.

title: Chocolate Palmetto
steps: Melt the butter together with the chocolate in a double boiler.
Add the flour and sugar to the chocolate and melted butter mixture. Mix well until forming a homogeneous mass.
Let the dough cool for a few minutes.
With your hands, form the dough into balls and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 180°C for about 15-20 minutes or until golden.

title: Puff Pastry Ties With Honey
steps: Roll out the puff pastry
Cut into desired shapes
Brush with melted honey
Bake at 180°C for 20 minutes

title: Lemon Donuts
steps: Mix the eggs with the sugar until you get a foamy mixture.
Grate the lemon peel and add it to the previous mixture.
Add the flour little by little while mixing everything well.
Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the donuts from the heat and let them cool on kitchen paper to remove excess oil.

title: Canarian Roast Milk
steps: Heat the milk until it is hot but not boiling.
Beat the eggs with the sugar until well mixed.
Add the hot milk to the eggs little by little, stirring continuously to prevent the eggs from curdling.
Pour the mixture into a mold and bake in a double boiler for about 45 minutes or until firm.
Remove from the oven and let cool. Sprinkle with cinnamon before serving.

title: Cream Millefeuille
steps: Stretch the puff pastry until it is thin.
Cut the dough into triangles.
Fill each triangle with pastry cream.
Roll the triangles on themselves, forming a kind of snail.
Place the millefeuille on a baking tray and paint them with beaten egg.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes.

title: Arugula, Pear And Walnut Salad
steps: Wash and dry the arugula.
Peel and finely chop the pear.
Toast the walnuts in a pan without oil until golden.
Mix the arugula, chopped pear and toasted walnuts in a bowl.

title: Red Pepper And Tuna Salad
steps: Cut the red peppers into strips.
Mix the tuna with the peppers.
Add the vinaigrette of your choice.

title: Tomato And Mozzarella Salad
steps: Cut the tomatoes into slices.
Cut the mozzarella into slices.
Alternate the tomato and mozzarella slices on a plate.
Dress with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.

title: Red Cabbage And Apple Salad
steps: Cut the red cabbage into small pieces.
Peel and chop the apple into small pieces.
Mix the red cabbage and apple in a bowl.

title: Fresh Spinach And Bacon Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the bacon until crispy and set it aside.
Step 2: Wash the fresh spinach and dry it carefully.
Step 3: Mix the spinach with the cooked bacon and serve.

title: Chicken And Apple Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is well done.
Step 2: Cut the apple and lettuce into small pieces.
Step 3: Mix the cooked chicken with the apple and lettuce.

title: Avocado And Tomato Salad
steps: Cut the avocado and tomato into pieces.
Mix the avocado and tomato pieces in a bowl.
Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Smoked Salmon And Avocado Salad
steps: Cut the avocado and onion into small pieces.
Wash the lettuce and cut it into pieces.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Serve Immediately.

title: Beet And Fresh Cheese Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the beets until soft.
Step 2: Peel and cut the beets into pieces.
Step 3: Mix the beets with the crumbled fresh cheese.

title: Citrus Salad (Orange And Grapefruit)
steps: Peel and cut the oranges and grapefruit into slices.
Arrange the slices on a plate decoratively.
Serve the salad immediately.

title: Cauliflower Puree
steps: Step 1: Cut the cauliflower into small pieces.
Step 2: Cook the cauliflower pieces until soft.
Step 3: Blend the cooked cauliflower until you obtain a puree.

title: Microwave Potatoes With Spices
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Place the potato pieces in a bowl with spices and mix until coated.
Place the bowl with the potatoes in the microwave for 5 minutes or until they are soft.

title: Fried Green Peppers
steps: Cut the green peppers into strips.
Mix the chickpea flour with water until you get a thick mixture.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan.
Dip the peppers in the flour mixture and fry them in the hot oil until golden.
Remove the fried peppers from the pan and place them on kitchen paper to drain excess oil.
Serve hot fried green peppers as a side dish.

title: Roasted Red Peppers
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Wash and dry the red peppers.
Place the peppers on a baking sheet.
Roast the peppers in the preheated oven for about 30 minutes or until soft.

title: Grilled Mushrooms (Without Ham)
steps: Heat a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the olive oil and wait until it is hot.
Add the washed mushrooms and cut into large pieces.
Cook the mushrooms for about 5 minutes or until golden.

title: Broccoli With Bechamel
steps: Cook the broccoli until tender.
Prepare the béchamel: melt the butter in a saucepan, add the flour and cook for a few minutes. Add the milk little by little and stir continuously until it thickens. Add the ground nutmeg.
Mix the cooked broccoli with the bechamel.

title: Boiled Carrots With Butter
steps: Peel the carrots and cut them into pieces.
Boil the carrots until they are soft.
Add butter to the hot pan and cook the carrots for a few minutes.
Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Rice With Vegetables (Vegetable Paella)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the peppers, carrots and garlic cut into small pieces.
Step 2: Add the rice and stir until lightly golden.
Step 3: Add the crushed tomato and peas. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add water or vegetable broth and cook over medium-high heat until the rice is cooked.

title: Crispy Fried Onion
steps: Step 1: Cut the onion into thin rings.
Step 2: Heat oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Step 3: Add the onion rings and fry until golden and crispy.
Step 4: Remove the fried onions from the pan with a spoon and place them on a paper towel to drain excess oil.

title: Sautéed Cherry Tomatoes
steps: Cut the cherry tomatoes in half.
Sauté them in a pan with a little oil until they are lightly golden.
Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Chicken Soup With Thin Noodles
steps: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, pepper and garlic and cook until soft.
Add the minced chicken and cook until cooked.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Add the fine noodles and cook until tender.
Serve hot.

title: Porrusalda (Leek And Potato Soup)
steps: Step 1: Cut the leeks into small pieces.
Step 2: Peel and cut the potatoes into cubes.
Step 3: Cook the leeks and potatoes together until they are soft.
Step 4: Add the vegetable broth and let it cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Cream Of Leeks (Hot)
steps: Step 1: Wash and chop the leeks, onion and potatoes.
Step 2: Sauté the leeks and onion in a pot with a little oil until they are soft.
Step 3: Add the chopped potatoes to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the vegetable broth and let everything boil together until the potatoes are soft.
Step 5: Beat the mixture with a mixer until you obtain a smooth and homogeneous cream.
Step 6: Heat the cream in the pot before serving it.

title: Carrot Cream
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the carrots into pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the leek until tender.
Step 3: Add the carrots to the leek and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add the vegetable broth and let it boil for a few minutes.
Step 5: Blend the mixture with a blender until you obtain a smooth cream.
Step 6: Add the cream and mix well. Heat the cream without letting it boil.

title: Garlic Soup With Egg (Castellana Con Egg)
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and cook until golden.
Step 3: Add water and salt to taste, let it boil.
Step 4: Beat the eggs in a separate bowl.
Step 5: Pour the beaten eggs into the pot while stirring continuously.
Step 6: Cook until the soup thickens and serve hot.

title: Cuban Mojito
steps: Grind the fresh mint leaves with the sugar in a mortar.
Add lemon juice and white rum to the mortar and mix well.
Serve over ice cubes in a tall glass.

title: Caipirinha
steps: Grind the sugar with a little lemon peel.
Add the cachaça and mix well.
Shake in a shaker with ice for a few seconds.
Strain and serve in a glass.

title: Strawberry Daiquiri
steps: Mix the washed and chopped strawberry with the lemon juice in a blender until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Add the white rum and orange juice, and mix well.
Serve over ice.

title: Homemade Aioli Sauce
steps: Peel the garlic and chop it finely.
Grind the garlic in a mortar with the olive oil until you obtain a smooth paste.

title: Green Sauce (Parsley And Garlic)
steps: Finely chop the parsley and garlic.
Mix both ingredients in a mortar or food processor until you obtain a paste.

title: Serranito (Loin, Pepper And Ham Sandwich)
steps: Cut the loin into thin slices.
Chop the peppers into small pieces.
Spread bread with olive oil.
Place the loin slices on the bread.
Add the pepper pieces on the loin.
Cover with slices of ham and close the sandwich.

title: Veal Nugget
steps: Step 1: Cut the beef into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Crush the garlic and parsley and mix it with the breadcrumbs.
Step 3: Dip the pieces of meat in the beaten egg and then in the breadcrumbs and spices mixture.
Step 4: Fry the pepitos in hot oil until golden.

title: Calamari Sandwich With Aioli
steps: 1. Fry the squid in hot oil until golden.
2. Mix garlic and oil to make the aioli.
3. Spread the aioli on the bread slices.
4. Place the fried squid on the bread with aioli.
5. Serve immediately.

title: Rice With Pork Ribs
steps: Step 1: Heat the oil in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the pork ribs and fry until golden brown on all sides.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
Step 4: Add the rice and stir to coat it with the oil and meat juices.
Step 5: Add enough water or chicken broth to cover the rice, bring to a boil and then reduce the heat to minimum.
Step 6: Cover the pot and let it cook for about 20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and has absorbed all the liquid.
Step 7: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Duck And Mushroom Fideuá
steps: Step 1: Cook the rice in a pot of boiling water until al dente.
Step 2: In a large skillet, cook the duck pieces until golden and crispy. Add the mushrooms and cook them together with the duck for a few more minutes.
Step 3: Add the cooked rice to the pan and mix everything so that the ingredients are well integrated.
Step 4: Cook the fideuá for a few more minutes until ready to serve.

title: Seafood Cannelloni
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a frying pan, sauté the onion and chopped garlic until golden.
Add the shrimp, mussels and clams to the pan and cook until cooked through.
Mix the crushed tomato with the seafood mixture and let it cook for a few more minutes.
Grate the cheese and mix it with the chopped parsley and breadcrumbs.
Fill the cannelloni with the seafood mixture and place a layer of cheese on each one.
Place the cannelloni on a baking sheet, sprinkle with more grated cheese and bake at medium-high temperature until golden.

title: Spinach And Pine Nut Lasagna
steps: Cook the spinach and chop it finely.
Mix the spinach with the pine nuts, salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the base of a baking dish with tomato sauce.
Place a layer of lasagna pasta in the dish.
Distribute the spinach and pine nut mixture over the pasta layer.
Add a generous layer of grated cheese over the spinach mixture.
Repeat steps 4 to 6 until the dish is completely covered, ending with a layer of grated cheese on top.
Bake at high temperature for 20 minutes or until the cheese is golden and bubbly.

title: Beef Burger To The Point
steps: Cook the beef to your liking.
Place the cooked meat on the hamburger bun.
Add chopped lettuce, tomato and onion.

title: Chicken With Almonds (Chinese Style)
steps: Cut the chicken into pieces and place in a wok with hot sesame oil.
Add the chopped garlic and sauté until golden.
Add the chicken and cook until almost cooked.
Add the almonds and cook until lightly toasted. Serve hot.

title: Pork With Blue Cheese Sauce
steps: Cook the pork until golden and cooked.
Add minced garlic and cook for a few more minutes.
Add cream and blue cheese, mix well until the cheese melts.
Let the sauce reduce a little before serving.

title: Marinated Ribs With Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Mix the ribs with spices and marinade.
Step 3: Add the peeled and coarsely chopped potatoes to a baking sheet.
Step 4: Place the marinated ribs on the potatoes.
Step 5: Bake for 45 minutes or until the ribs are golden brown and the potatoes are soft.

title: Rabbit In The Hunter
steps: Step 1: Cut the rabbit into pieces.
Step 2: Sauté the garlic and parsley in olive oil.
Step 3: Add the rabbit and brown it on all sides.
Step 4: Add the thyme and red wine, cook until the rabbit is tender.

title: Grilled Turkey With Vegetables
steps: Cut the turkey into pieces and season with salt, pepper and olive oil.
Heat a frying pan over medium-high heat and add the turkey pieces. Cook until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the turkey from the pan and set aside on a plate.
In the same pan, add the chopped onion and whole garlic (without peeling). Cook until golden.
Add the sliced ​​spinach and carrots to the pan. Cook until soft.
Add the turkey back to the pan and mix everything so that the flavors integrate.
Serve hot and enjoy your delicious grilled turkey with vegetables.

title: Beef With Peppers (Chinese Style)
steps: 1. Cut the beef into small pieces and marinate them with red wine vinegar for 30 minutes.
2. In a large frying pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the marinated beef pieces and cook until golden brown on all sides. Remove the meat from the pan and set aside.
3. In the same pan, add the chopped garlic and grated ginger. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Add the peppers cut into large pieces to the pan and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Return the meat to the pan and add the soy sauce and sugar. Mix well and cook for another 2 minutes.
6. Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Rioja-Style Loin
steps: Cut the pork loin into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Chop the garlic and sauté it in a pan with olive oil.
Add the red peppers cut into strips and sauté until soft.
Add the chopped tomato and cook for a few minutes.
Add the sautéed pork loin and sauté together with the vegetables.
Pour in the red wine and let it reduce until the sauce thickens.
Add the bay leaves and cook everything over low heat for about 20 minutes.

title: Fried Eggs With Ratatouille
steps: Heat a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add oil and wait until it is hot.
Beat the eggs in a separate bowl.
Pour the beaten eggs into the pan and cook until set.
Cook the ratatouille separately in another pan.
Once the eggs are ready, remove them from the pan and place them on a plate.

title: Prawn Omelette
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the shrimp.
Step 2: Beat the eggs in a bowl.
Step 3: Add the chopped shrimp to the beaten eggs.
Step 4: Pour the mixture into a hot pan with oil.
Step 5: Cook until both sides are golden brown.

title: Broad Bean Omelet
steps: Step 1: Soak the dried beans for at least 6 hours.
Step 2: Cook the soaked beans until they are soft.
Step 3: Sauté the chopped onion in olive oil until transparent.
Step 4: Add the fresh chopped parsley and cook for one more minute.
Step 5: Mix the cooked beans with the onion and parsley mixture.
Step 6: Place the mixture in a round mold and flatten it to form a tortilla.
Step 7: Cook the tortilla in the oven at medium temperature for about 20 minutes or until firm.

title: Scrambled Turnip Greens And Shrimp
steps: Step 1: Cook the turnip greens until tender.
Step 2: Add the shrimp and cook them until they are pink.

title: Sea Bass With Fennel
steps: 1. Season the sea bass with black pepper.
2. Heat olive oil in a frying pan and add the chopped garlic.
3. Add the chopped fennel and cook until golden.
4. Add the sea bass to the pan and cook for 5 minutes on each side.
5. Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Baked Sea Bream With Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Cut the potatoes into pieces and season them.
Step 3: Place the sea bream on baking paper along with the potatoes.
Step 4: Bake for 20 minutes or until the fish is cooked.

title: Grilled Tuna Belly
steps: Step 1: Season the tuna with salt and pepper.
Step 2: Heat a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Step 3: Add a little oil to the hot pan.
Step 4: Place the tuna belly in the pan and cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Stewed Cuttlefish With Potatoes
steps: Step 1: Cut the cuttlefish into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Step 2: In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion until transparent.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic and sauté for one minute.
Step 4: Add the cuttlefish pieces and brown them on all sides.
Step 5: Add the crushed tomato, sweet paprika, bay leaf and the peeled and quartered potatoes. Cook for about 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Step 6: Adjust the salt and serve hot.

title: Grilled Squid With Garlic And Parsley
steps: Step 1: Clean the squid by removing the skin and beak.
Step 2: In a hot pan with olive oil, sauté the chopped garlic until golden.
Step 3: Add the squid to the pan and cook for a few minutes on each side until lightly golden.
Step 4: Add the chopped parsley to the pan and mix everything well.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy your grilled squid with garlic and parsley.

title: Calamari In American Sauce
steps: Cut the onion and garlic into small pieces.
In a frying pan, heat oil and add the onion and garlic. Cook until golden.
Add the squid to the pan and cook for a few minutes until golden.
Add the tomato sauce and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Suquet De Peix (Catalan Fish Stew)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic and pepper in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the tomato, carrot, celery and bay leaves. Cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the fish cut into large pieces and cook over medium heat until almost done.
Step 4: Add water or fish broth to cover the ingredients, add the potato cut into large pieces and cook until the potato is tender.
Step 5: Add the vinegar and salt. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Chicken And Mushroom Crepes
steps: Step 1: Mix the eggs, milk and flour to make the crepe mixture.
Step 2: Cook the mushrooms in a pan until soft.
Step 3: Add the cooked chicken and mushrooms to the crepe mixture.
Step 4: Pour the mixture into a hot pan to make the crepes.
Step 5: Serve the crepes hot with your choice of accompaniment.

title: Pizza Carbonara
steps: Prepare the pizza dough according to the package instructions.
Cook the bacon until crispy and remove it from the heat.
Spread the pizza dough on a pizza pan.
Add the tomato sauce over the dough.
Add the mozzarella cheese over the tomato sauce.
Place the cooked bacon on the mozzarella cheese.
Cook the pizza in a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven for about 15-20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden.
Remove the pizza from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.

title: Vegetable Quiche
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees.
Spread the shortcrust pastry dough in a quiche mold.
Prick the dough with a fork and bake for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, sauté the onion and red pepper until soft.
Add the spinach to the soffrito and cook until wilted.
Mix the eggs and milk in a bowl.
Grate the cheese and add it to the egg and milk mixture.
Pour the mixture over the pre-cooked dough and add the vegetable filling.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden.

title: Chicken And Mayonnaise Sandwich
steps: Cut the bread in half.
Spread mayonnaise on both halves of the bread.
Add chicken slices to one of the halves of the bread.
Cover with the other half of the bread.

title: Beef Fajitas
steps: Cut the beef into thin strips.
Chop the onion and pepper.
Peel and chop the garlic.
Heat oil in a large frying pan.
Add the meat, onion, pepper and garlic to the pan.
Cook until the meat is browned on all sides.
Add the chopped tomato and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve the fajitas on individual plates with warm wheat tortillas.

title: Chicken Tacos (Tinga)
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is well done.
Step 2: Blend the tomatoes, onion, garlic and chilies to make the sauce.

title: Vegetable And Rice Burritos
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Heat the black beans in a pot until soft.
Roast the red peppers and onion in a frying pan until soft.
Add the chopped tomatoes to the pan and cook for a few more minutes.
Heat the corn tortillas in a skillet.

title: Various Sushi (Maki And Nigiri)
steps: Prepare rice for sushi.
Cut the raw fish into small pieces.
Place a sheet of nori seaweed on a mat.
Spread the rice on the seaweed leaf, leaving an uncovered space on top.
Place the pieces of raw fish on the rice.
Add wasabi and soy sauce to taste.
Carefully roll the seaweed leaf with the help of the mat to form a roll.
Cut the roll into individual portions.

title: Potatoes To The Importance
steps: Peel the potatoes and cut them into large pieces.
Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan.
Add the potatoes to the pan and fry until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the potatoes from the pan with a slotted spoon and drain them on kitchen paper to remove excess oil.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Sirloin And Brie Cheese Toast
steps: Cook the sirloin on the grill until it is well done.
Cut the bread into slices and toast them.
Grate the brie cheese over the toast.
Place a slice of cooked sirloin on each toast with cheese.
Serve hot.

title: Escalivada And Anchovies Toast
steps: Step 1: Prepare the escalivada.
Step 2: Place the anchovies on the toast.

title: Spinach And Pine Nut Croquettes
steps: Step 1: Cook the spinach until soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked spinach with the pine nuts and form croquettes.

title: Cooked Croquettes
steps: Step 1: Cook the beef and potatoes.
Step 2: Mash the cooked meat and potatoes.
Step 3: Mix the crushed meat with the chopped onion.
Step 4: Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil.

title: Squid Croquettes
steps: Clean the squid and cut them into small pieces.
Peel the onion and chop it finely.
In a frying pan with hot oil, brown the onion until transparent.
Add the squid to the pan and cook them until they are tender.
Remove from heat and add the chopped parsley.
Grind the squid with the onion in a food processor or blender until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add the flour and mix well to form a dough.
Make balls with the mixture, dip in beaten egg and then in breadcrumbs.
Fry the croquettes in plenty of hot oil until golden brown on all sides.
Drain on kitchen paper and serve hot.

title: Cheese Fritters
steps: Mix the flour with the water until it forms a dough.
Add the cheese to the dough and mix well.
Make balls with the cheese dough.
Fry the balls in hot oil until golden.

title: Vegetable Dips With Yogurt Sauce
steps: Step 1: Cut the red peppers, carrots and onion into small pieces.
Step 2: Mix natural yogurt with chopped garlic and fresh mint.
Step 3: Place the vegetables in a bowl and add the yogurt sauce.

title: Table Of Varied Pâtés
steps: Step 1: Prepare the ingredients.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients in a large bowl.
Step 3: Serve the pâtés on a board and decorate with fresh herbs.

title: Mushroom And Parmesan Carpaccio
steps: Clean the mushrooms and cut them into thin slices.
Arrange them on a plate, sprinkle with grated parmesan and serve.

title: Tomato And Avocado Tartar
steps: Step 1: Cut the tomatoes and avocados into small cubes.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Extremaduran Zorongollo (Pepper Salad)
steps: Chop the peppers and onion into small pieces.
Mix the peppers and onion with the olives.
Add olive oil and vinegar to taste.

title: Aliñás Potatoes From Cádiz
steps: Cook the potatoes in salted water until they are soft.
Once cooked, peel them and cut them into large pieces.
In a mortar, crush the peeled garlic cloves.
Add the extra virgin olive oil to the mortar and mix well with the garlic.
Add the cooked and seasoned potatoes to the garlic and oil mixture.
Mix everything until the potatoes are well covered with the mixture.

title: Eggplant Tempura Sticks
steps: Cut the eggplants into sticks.
Prepare the tempura by mixing flour and water.
Dip the eggplant sticks in the tempura mixture.
Fry the sticks in hot oil until golden.

title: Fried Pepper Rings
steps: Cut the peppers into rings and remove the seeds.
Dredge the pepper rings in flour.
Fry the rings in hot oil until golden.
Drain on kitchen paper to remove excess fat.

title: Cheese Stuffed Mushrooms
steps: Clean the mushrooms and cut the top to make a hole.
Grate the cheese and fill each mushroom with it.
Bake at 180 degrees for about 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted.

title: Creamy Mussels
steps: Step 1: Heat the butter in a large skillet until melted.
Step 2: Add the mussels and cook until they open.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic and heavy cream. Cook until the mixture thickens.
Step 4: Add the chopped parsley and serve hot.

title: Coquinas A La Marinera
steps: Step 1: In a frying pan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic in olive oil.
Step 2: Add the coquinas, sauté them until they open.
Step 3: Add the grated tomato, paprika and white wine. Cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Adjust the salt and serve hot.

title: Grilled Shrimp
steps: Step 1: Clean the shrimp and dry them with kitchen paper.
Step 2: Brush the shrimp with olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Step 3: Place the shrimp on a hot griddle and cook for about 3 minutes on each side or until lightly browned.

title: Fried Octopus
steps: Clean the octopus and cut it into small pieces.
Put the flour on a plate and season with salt and pepper.
Dredge the octopus pieces in the flour until they are completely covered.
Fry the octopus in hot oil for a few minutes until golden.
Drain excess oil and serve hot.

title: Fried Quail Eggs
steps: Heat a frying pan with a little oil.
Add the quail eggs and fry until golden on the outside but still liquid on the inside.
Remove from heat and serve hot.

title: Pomace Cake
steps: Mix the flour with the sugar and butter until you obtain a homogeneous dough.
Add the pomace to the mixture and knead well.
Spread the dough in a cake pan and bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes.

title: Chocolate Ice Cream
steps: Melt the dark chocolate in a double boiler.
Add the milk little by little while stirring with a spoon or mixer until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Let the mixture cool in the refrigerator for at least two hours.
Once the mixture is cold, put it in the refrigerator and follow the manufacturer's instructions to make the ice cream.

title: Nougat Ice Cream
steps: Melt the nougat in a bain-marie.
Add the liquid cream and mix well.
Add the milk little by little, stirring constantly.
Let cool in the refrigerator for several hours before serving.

title: Tangerine Sorbet
steps: Peel the tangerines and squeeze the juice.
Mix the tangerine juice with sugar until it dissolves.
Freeze the mixture in a container suitable for sorbet.

title: Tropical Fruit Salad
steps: Cut the strawberry, pineapple, kiwi and papaya into small pieces.
Mix all the fruits in a large bowl.
Serve the tropical fruit salad immediately.

title: Strawberry Carpaccio With Vinegar
steps: Wash the strawberries and cut them into thin slices.
Arrange the strawberry slices on a plate, without overlapping.
Drizzle with balsamic vinegar and sprinkle with sugar.

title: Flambéed Banana
steps: Peel the bananas and cut them into slices.
In a frying pan, heat some rum until it is hot but not boiling.
Add the banana slices to the pan and cook until golden on both sides.
Remove the bananas from the pan and serve them hot.

title: Apple Tarte Tatin
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Peel and cut the apples into quarters.
Place the apples in a pan with the honey and cook until soft.
Spread the pie dough in a pie pan.
Place the caramelized apples in the center of the mold, covering the dough.
Fold the edges of the dough inward to cover the apples.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the cake is golden brown.

title: White Chocolate Brownie
steps: Melt the white chocolate with the butter in a double boiler.
Add the sugar and mix until well incorporated.
Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Add the flour and mix until there are no lumps.
Pour the mixture into a brownie mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 25 minutes.

title: Musician'S Bonbons (Nuts And Chocolate)
steps: Melt the dark chocolate in a double boiler.
Mix the toasted nuts with the melted chocolate.
Make balls with the mixture and let them cool.

title: Almond Tiles
steps: Step 1: Soak the almonds in water for at least 4 hours.
Step 2: Drain the almonds and grind them until you obtain a paste.
Step 3: Mix the almond paste with the sugar until you obtain a homogeneous mass.
Step 4: Make balls with the dough and place them on a baking sheet.
Step 5: Bake at 180 degrees for about 20 minutes or until golden.

title: Butter Tea Pastes
steps: Mix the butter with the icing sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the flour little by little and mix well until it forms a dough.
Make balls with the dough and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake for 10 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

title: Banana Bread
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the ripe bananas with sugar until you obtain a smooth paste.
Add the eggs one by one and mix well after each addition.
Add the flour and baking powder little by little, mixing carefully.
Pour the dough into a greased and floured cake pan.
Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.

title: Wine Donuts
steps: Mix the flour with the red wine until you obtain a homogeneous dough.
Add the sugar to the mixture and knead for a few minutes.
Make balls with the dough and fry them in hot oil until golden.
Drain the donuts on kitchen paper and sprinkle them with sugar.

title: Oil Cakes
steps: Step 1: Mix the oil with the flour.
Step 2: Make balls with the mixture.

title: Pasta Salad With Pink Sauce
steps: Cook the pasta according to the instructions on the package.
Cut the tomatoes and onion into small pieces.
Mix the cooked pasta with the tomatoes, onion and olives.
Prepare the pink sauce and mix it with the salad.

title: Lentil And Feta Salad
steps: Cook the lentils according to the package instructions.
Cut the feta cheese into cubes.
Mix the cooked lentils with the feta cheese and other desired ingredients such as tomato, cucumber or lettuce.

title: Empedrat (White Beans And Cod)
steps: Step 1: Soak the white beans for at least 8 hours.
Step 2: Cook the beans until they are soft. Let cool.
Step 3: Desalt the cod if necessary. Break it into large pieces.
Step 4: Mix the beans and cod in a large bowl.
Step 5: Add olive oil, vinegar and chopped garlic to taste. Mix well.
Step 6: Let the salad rest in the refrigerator for at least an hour before serving.

title: Chickpea Salad With Cumin
steps: Cook the chickpeas according to the package instructions.
Chop the onion and red pepper.
In a bowl, mix the cooked chickpeas, the chopped onion, the chopped red pepper, the olives cut in half and the chopped garlic.
Add ground cumin to taste and mix all the ingredients well.
Serve the salad cold or at room temperature.

title: Tomato And Sardine Salad
steps: Step 1: Wash and cut the tomatoes into pieces.
Step 2: Open the can of sardines and drain the water. Mix with the tomatoes.

title: Mango And Prawn Salad
steps: Cut the mango into small pieces.
Cook the prawns and cool them before adding to the salad.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Rice Salad With Pineapple
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Cut the pineapple, carrot and pepper into small pieces.
Mix the cooked rice with the other ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil and vinegar to taste. Mix well.

title: Quinoa Tabbouleh
steps: Cook the quinoa according to the package instructions.
Cut the tomato, red pepper and onion into small pieces.
Wash and finely chop the mint.
In a large bowl, mix the cooked quinoa, tomato, red pepper, onion and mint.
Squeeze the lemon and add the juice along with the olive oil to the bowl. Mix all the ingredients well.

title: Raw Shredded Cauliflower Salad
steps: Grate the cauliflower and red peppers.
Peel and grate the carrots.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Add lemon juice, salt and pepper to taste.

title: Potato And Sausage Salad (German)
steps: Step 1: Cook the potatoes and sausages separately.
Step 2: Mix both ingredients in a bowl.

title: Butler Potatoes (Milk And Parsley)
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into pieces.
Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
In a frying pan, heat the milk and add the cooked potatoes. Cook over medium heat until a cream forms.
Add the chopped parsley and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Celeriac Puree
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the celery and turnips.
Step 2: Cook the celery and turnips in water until they are soft.
Step 3: Blend the cooked celery and turnips until you obtain a smooth puree.
Step 4: Add salt and pepper to taste.

title: Mushrooms In White Wine
steps: Step 1: Clean the mushrooms and cut them into quarters.
Step 2: In a large frying pan, heat a little oil and sauté the chopped garlic until golden.
Step 3: Add the mushrooms to the pan and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add the chopped carrot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Add the white wine and let it reduce by half.
Step 6: Add the chopped parsley and mix well. Serve hot.

title: Sautéed Peas With Mint
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a frying pan.
Step 2: Add peas and sauté until tender.
Step 3: Add chopped mint and salt.
Step 4: Mix well and serve.

title: Roasted Carrots With Cumin
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Peel and cut the carrots into slices.
Place the carrots in a bowl, add cumin and mix.
Arrange the carrots on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes or until soft.

title: Fried Pumpkin With Garlic
steps: Step 1: Cut the pumpkin into small pieces.
Step 2: Peel and chop the garlic.

title: Green Beans With Tomato
steps: Step 1: Cook the green beans until tender.
Step 2: Sauté the chopped tomatoes in a frying pan with a little oil.
Step 3: Add the cooked green beans to the pan and stir to mix well with the tomatoes.

title: Candied Peppers (Sweet)
steps: Preheat the oven to 150°C.
Wash and dry the red peppers.
Place the peppers on a baking sheet and add enough olive oil to cover them.
Bake for about two hours or until soft and the skin is soft.

title: Sautéed Rice With Garlic And Parsley
steps: Heat the oil in a large frying pan.
Add the rice and cook until lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for a few more minutes.
Add water or vegetable broth, salt to taste and cook until the rice is cooked.
Serve hot and sprinkle with chopped parsley.

title: Basic Green Salad (Lettuce And Chives)
steps: Wash and chop the lettuce.
Finely chop the onion.

title: Almond Soup (Sweet Or Savory)
steps: Step 1: Soak the almonds in water for at least 4 hours.
Step 2: Place the soaked almonds in a pot along with the water and salt to taste. If you want a sweet soup, also add sugar or sweetener.
Step 3: Cook over medium heat until the almonds are soft.
Step 4: Beat the mixture with a mixer until you obtain a creamy texture. If necessary, add more water to reach the desired consistency level.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Tapioca Soup
steps: Bring the water to a boil in a large pot.
Add the tapioca and let it cook until completely dissolved.
Add salt to taste.
Let the soup boil for a few more minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Pea Cream With Mint
steps: Step 1: Sauté the leek and onion until soft.
Step 2: Add the peas and cook for a few minutes.
Step 3: Add the vegetable broth and let it boil.
Step 4: Add the mint and let it cook along with the other ingredients.
Step 5: Blend the soup until you obtain a creamy texture.

title: Lentil Cream
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion and chopped garlic in oil until golden.
Step 2: Add the washed and dried lentils, stir to infuse them with the flavor of the onion and garlic.
Step 3: Add the vegetable broth and sweet paprika, bring to a boil and then lower the heat to cook for about 25 minutes or until the lentils are soft.
Step 4: Remove from heat and add salt to taste. Beat everything with a mixer until you obtain a smooth cream.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy this delicious vegan and gluten-free Lentil Cream.

title: Sherry Broth
steps: Step 1: Sauté the chopped onion in a pot with a little oil until it is transparent.
Step 2: Add the chopped chicken and brown it on all sides.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic, sweet paprika and bay leaf. Sauté for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add the sherry and let it reduce slightly.
Step 5: Add water to cover the ingredients and bring to a boil. Let cook for at least an hour.
Step 6: Remove from heat, strain the consommé and season with salt to taste.

title: Zurracapote (Wine Drink)
steps: Put the red wine and sugar in a pot.
Heat over medium heat until the sugar is completely dissolved.
Let cool and serve in glasses or glasses.

title: Barley Water
steps: Soak the barley overnight.
Drain and wash the barley.

title: Natural Apple Juice
steps: Peel the apples and cut them into pieces.
Place the apple pieces in a blender or juice extractor.
Blend or process until you obtain a smooth and uniform juice.
Serve the juice immediately.

title: Green Pepper Sauce
steps: Step 1: Peel and chop the garlic.
Step 2: Wash and finely chop the green peppers.

title: Blue Cheese Sauce
steps: Melt the blue cheese in a saucepan over medium heat
Add the milk and stir until you obtain a homogeneous mixture
Remove from heat and serve hot

title: Pizza Marinara (Tomato, Garlic, Oregano)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to high temperature.
Step 2: Mix the pizza dough with the necessary ingredients and spread it on a baking sheet.
Step 3: Add the tomato sauce and distribute evenly over the dough.
Step 4: Add the chopped garlic and oregano to the tomato sauce.
Step 5: Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until golden and cooked.

title: Pizza Prosciutto (Cooked Ham)
steps: Prepare the pizza dough according to the package instructions.
Spread the dough on a pizza pan and add tomato sauce.
Add the mozzarella cheese and the cooked prosciutto in thin strips.
Cook the pizza in a preheated 425 degrees Fahrenheit oven for about 15 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.

title: Fettuccine Alfredo
steps: Cook the fettuccine pasta according to package instructions.
In a frying pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the cream to the pan and mix until it is integrated with the butter.
Add the cooked pasta to the pan and mix well so that it is well covered with the Alfredo sauce.
Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Spaghetti With Genoese Pesto
steps: Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions.
In a bowl, mix the Genoese pesto with the cooked and hot spaghetti.

title: Chicken And Vegetable Lasagna
steps: Cook the chicken and vegetables in a pan until golden brown.
Mix the cooked pasta with the tomato sauce and melted cheese.
Place a layer of the pasta mixture in a baking dish, followed by a layer of chicken and vegetables.
Repeat the previous steps until you end up with a layer of pasta on top.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 20 minutes or until the lasagna is golden.

title: Tortellini In Brodo (In Broth)
steps: Cook the tortellini according to the package instructions.
Heat the chicken broth in a pot until it boils.
Add the cooked tortellini to the broth and serve.

title: Pumpkin And Gorgonzola Risotto
steps: Heat the butter in a frying pan and add the chopped onion. Cook until soft.
Add the rice and cook for a few minutes until lightly browned.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for another minute.
Pour in the white wine and cook until it has evaporated.
Add the vegetable broth little by little, stirring constantly. Continue adding broth until the rice is cooked.
Add the pumpkin cut into cubes and cook until soft.
Add the gorgonzola and mix well until it has completely melted.
Season with pepper to taste.

title: Lemon Chicken (Chinese Style)
steps: Marinate the chicken with lemon juice, garlic and ginger for 30 minutes.
Cook the chicken in a skillet until golden brown on all sides.
Add the soy sauce and cook for another 5 minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Beef With Broccoli And Oyster Sauce
steps: Step 1: Cook the beef until golden brown on all sides.
Step 2: Add the broccoli and cook until tender.
Step 3: Add the oysters and cook until they are well integrated into the sauce.

title: Peking Duck (With Pancakes)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Mix all the hoisin sauce ingredients and set aside.
Step 3: Flour and fry the duck until golden.
Step 4: Place the duck in a baking dish, add the hoisin sauce and bake for 20 minutes.
Step 5: Prepare the pancakes according to the package instructions.

title: Chicken Korma Curry (Mild With Almonds)
steps: Cook the onion, garlic and ginger in a pan until golden.
Add the chicken and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the mild curry powder and cook for another minute.
Add the milk and coconut cream. Mix everything well.
Cook over medium heat for about 20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked.
Add the almonds and fresh cilantro. Cook for one more minute.
Serve hot with rice.

title: Butter Chicken
steps: Cook the chicken until golden.
Add the butter and coconut cream.
Cook over low heat for 20 minutes.

title: Fish And Chips
steps: Step 1: Cut the potatoes into pieces and fry them until golden.
Step 2: Sauté the fish in a hot pan until cooked completely.

title: Shepherd'S Pie (Lamb Meat Pie)
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
In a frying pan, brown the lamb meat along with the onion and leeks.
Add the gluten-free flour and cook for a few minutes.
Add water or meat broth and let it reduce until you obtain a thick stew.
Place the meat mixture in a baking dish, add the peas and cover with the mashed potatoes.
Bake at 200°C for about 20 minutes or until the surface is golden.

title: Bangers And Mash
steps: Step 1: Cook the sausages until golden and cooked.
Step 2: Boil the potatoes until soft, then mash with a potato masher.
Step 3: Serve the sausages over the mashed potatoes.

title: Pork Schnitzel (Viennese Escalope)
steps: Season the pork pieces with salt and pepper.
Dip each piece of pork in beaten egg and then in breadcrumbs.
Fry the pork pieces in a pan with hot oil until golden and cooked.
Serve hot with salad or French fries.

title: Guinness Beef Stew
steps: Cook the beef in a pot until golden brown on all sides.
Add onion and chopped garlic, cook until soft.
Add Guinness and beef stock, bring to the boil.
Add potatoes cut into large pieces and cook until soft.
Thicken the sauce with flour dissolved in cold water.
Serve

title: Pulled Pork Burger
steps: Cook the pork until tender and crumbly.
Prepare the hamburger with the hamburger bun.
Add the shredded pork to the burger.

title: Roasted Beef Ribs (Short Ribs)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Step 2: Season the beef ribs with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Buffalo Chicken Wings (Spicy)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Step 2: Mix the chicken with the spicy buffalo sauce.
Step 3: Place the chicken wings on a baking sheet and cook for 25 minutes.

title: Macaroni And Cheese (American Mac & Cheese)
steps: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions.
Meanwhile, prepare a cheese sauce and mix with the cooked macaroni.

title: Jambalaya (Cajun Rice With Chicken And Shrimp)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic and peppers in oil until soft.
Step 2: Add the rice and fry it for a few minutes.
Step 3: Add the tomato and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the chicken and shrimp, and cook until almost done.
Step 5: Add the chicken broth and let it boil. Then, reduce the heat and let it cook for about 20 minutes or until the rice is done.

title: Prawn Fajitas
steps: Step 1: Cut the peppers and onion into thin strips.
Step 2: Peel and chop the garlic.
Step 3: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Step 4: Add the shrimp, peppers and onion to the pan. Cook until golden.
Step 5: Add the chopped garlic and cook for one more minute.
Step 6: Season with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Chiles En Nogada
steps: Step 1: Cook the green chilies until soft.
Step 2: Blend the nogada with milk and nutmeg.
Step 3: Sauté the onion, garlic and apple until golden.
Step 4: Add the piloncillo and vinegar to the sofrito mixture.
Step 5: Fill the chiles with the apple mixture and cover them with the nogada.
Step 6: Sprinkle breadcrumbs over the chiles before serving.

title: Chicken Tamales
steps: Cook the rice until soft.
Grind the chicken meat in a blender or food processor.
Mix the ground meat with the cooked rice, garlic and paprika.
Stuff the corn husks with the chicken and rice mixture.
Tie the tamales with kitchen twine.

title: Aztec Tortilla Soup (Main Course)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic and pepper until golden.
Step 2: Add the tomatoes and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 3: Add the chicken broth and let it boil.
Step 4: Cut the corn tortillas into strips and add them to the soup. Cook until soft.

title: Feijoada (Black Beans With Pork)
steps: Cook the black beans until soft.
Sauté the onion and garlic in hot oil.
Add the pork cut into small pieces and cook until golden.
Add the beans, sweet paprika, bay leaf and salt to taste. Cook everything together for a few more minutes.

title: Strip Roast (Grilled Rib)
steps: Preheat the grill to high temperature.
Season the beef strip with coarse salt and black pepper.
Place the meat on the grill and cook for about 10-15 minutes on each side.
Remove from heat and let rest before serving.

title: Neapolitan Milanese (Tomato And Cheese)
steps: Season the meat with salt and pepper.
Dip the meat in beaten egg and then in breadcrumbs.
Fry the meat in a pan with hot oil until golden.
Remove the meat from the pan and place it on a plate lined with kitchen paper to remove excess fat.
In the same pan, add chopped tomato and cook until the water is released.
Place the fried meat on a baking tray, cover it with the tomato sauce and sprinkle with grated cheese.
Bake at medium-high heat for a few minutes until the cheese is melted and golden.

title: Ají De Gallina
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until it is well cooked.
Step 2: Blend the yellow peppers with the onion, garlic and tomato.
Step 3: Add the cooked potato to the previous smoothie.
Step 4: In a large pot, fry the eggs until golden brown on both sides.
Step 5: Add the cooked chicken and chili smoothie to the pot with the fried eggs.
Step 6: Mix everything well and add milk until you obtain a creamy consistency.

title: Causa Limaña (Potato And Tuna)
steps: Cook the potatoes until soft.
Mix the cooked potatoes with the tuna.
Add other ingredients such as onion, chili and olive oil to taste.
Puree the mixture and let it cool in the refrigerator for a few hours.
Serve the cold cause.

title: Shredded Meat Arepas
steps: Cook the shredded meat until it is tender.
Grind the corn flour to obtain a soft dough.
Add water to the dough and knead until you obtain a uniform consistency.
Make balls with the dough and flatten them to form arepas.
Cook the arepas in a hot pan until golden on both sides.
Fill the arepas with the shredded meat and serve.

title: Bibimbap (Korean Rice With Meat And Egg)
steps: Cook the rice.
Cook the meat to taste and cut it into small pieces.
Beat the eggs and cook them in a pan.
Grate the carrots.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add the soy spirit and mix well.

title: Teriyaki Chicken
steps: Cut the chicken into pieces and mix them with the teriyaki sauce.
Fry them in a hot pan until golden brown on all sides.

title: Nasi Goreng (Indonesian Fried Rice)
steps: Cook the rice until tender.
Salt and pepper the chicken, then fry in a pan with hot oil until golden brown on all sides. Remove from heat and reserve.
In the same pan, add the chopped onion and crushed garlic, fry until golden.
Add the cooked rice to the pan with the onion and garlic, stir everything well so that it mixes with the oil in the pan.
Add the soy and fried chicken that we had reserved, stir everything together until well mixed.
Serve hot.

title: Tomato And Basil Bruschetta
steps: Cut the bread into thin slices and toast them.
Wash the tomatoes and cut them into small pieces.
Chop the fresh basil.
Mix the tomatoes with the chopped basil.
Once the slices of bread are toasted, rub a little garlic on them.
Place the tomato and basil mixture on the toasted bread.

title: Rosemary Focaccia
steps: Mix the flour and water until it forms a dough.
Add the yeast and mix well.
Let it rest in a warm place for 1 hour.
Add the rosemary and salt, knead again.
Spread the dough in a mold and bake at 200 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Cheese Arancini (Fried Rice Balls)
steps: Cook the rice and let it cool.
Mix the rice with the cheese and form balls.
Dip the balls in beaten egg and fry them in hot oil.

title: Bresaola Carpaccio And Arugula
steps: Freeze the bresaola for a few hours to make it easier to cut.
Cut the bresaola into thin slices and arrange them on a plate.
Wash and dry the arugula and arrange it on the bresaola slices.
Dress with olive oil, lemon juice and salt.

title: Vitello Tonnato (Beef With Tuna Sauce)
steps: Cook the beef until it is well done.
Grind the canned tuna with the mayonnaise and chopped onion.
Add the red peppers and capers to the tuna grinder.
