Cut the cooked beef into thin slices and serve with the tuna sauce on top.

title: Falafel (Chickpea Balls)
steps: Soak the chickpeas for several hours.
Cook the onion and garlic until soft.
Grind the chickpeas, onion and garlic in a food processor.
Add chickpea flour, parsley, cumin and paprika to the chickpea puree.
Form the mixture into balls and fry them in oil until golden.

title: Labneh (Lebanese Yogurt Cheese)
steps: Strain the yogurt in a strainer for several hours to remove as much liquid as possible.
Add salt to taste and mix well.
Serve cold with bread or vegetables.

title: Potato And Pea Samosas
steps: Peel and cook the potatoes until soft.
Mix the cooked potatoes with the peas, salt and pepper to taste.
Fill the samosa dough with the potato and pea mixture.
Close the samosas and fry them in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Vegetable Pakoras (Chickpea Flour)
steps: Grind the chickpeas until they form a paste.
Add the chopped paprika, garlic and onion.
Add the chopped parsley.
Form the mixture into balls and fry them in hot oil.

title: Summer Rolls With Shrimp (Rice Paper)
steps: Step 1: Cook the rice and let it cool.
Step 2: Mix the cooked rice with the chopped shrimp.

title: Chicken Satay With Peanut Sauce
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces and mix it with the soy sauce and curry.
Grind the peanuts until you get a paste.
Form the chicken satay and cook on a grill or in the oven.
Serve the satay accompanied by the peanut sauce.

title: Naan Bread With Garlic
steps: Mix the wheat flour, minced garlic and yeast in a bowl.
Add water to form a soft dough.
Let rise for 1 hour.
Divide the dough into portions and shape them into Naan bread.
Cook on a hot pan until golden brown.

title: Jalapenos Stuffed With Cheese (Poppers)
steps: Cut the jalapenos in half and remove the seeds.
Fill each half with cheese.
Dredge the stuffed jalapenos in breadcrumbs until coated.

title: Corn Dogs (Sausage In Corn Dough)
steps: Prepare the corn dough according to the package instructions.
Dip each sausage into the prepared batter.
Fry the sausages in hot oil until golden brown.

title: Melted Cheese With Chorizo ​​(Mexican)
steps: Heat the chorizo ​​in a frying pan until cooked. Remove from heat.
Add the cheese to the same pan and mix with the chorizo ​​until completely melted.

title: Shrimp Ceviche
steps: Clean and cut the shrimp into small pieces.
Squeeze the limes and mix the juice with the shrimp.
Cut the red onion and red pepper into small pieces and add to the shrimp bowl.
Add chopped cilantro and salt to taste.
Mix everything well and let it rest for 15 minutes before serving.

title: Chicken Tinga Toast
steps: Cook the chicken until well done.
Grind the chilies, onion and garlic in a blender.
Fry the mixture of chilies, onion and garlic in a pan with oil.
Add the crushed tomato to the pan and cook until reduced.
Shred the cooked chicken and add it to the pan.
Cook the scrambled eggs separately.

title: Creole Empanadas (Meat)
steps: Step 1: Mix the meat with the other ingredients.
Step 2: Knead the flour and water dough.
Step 3: Fill the empanadas with the meat mixture.

title: Cheese Bread (Brazilian Pao De Queijo)
steps: Mix the melted butter with the hot water.
Add the cassava flour and mix well to form a dough.
Add the grated cheese to the mixture and knead until well integrated.
Make balls with the dough and place them in a cupcake mold.
Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Provoleta With Oregano
steps: Cut the provolone into thin slices.
Place the provolone slices on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle fresh chopped oregano over the cheese.
Bake at 200 degrees Celsius for about 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted and golden.

title: New York Cheesecake (Oven)
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 170 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Mix the flour with the sugar in a bowl.
Step 3: Add the eggs and beat until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Step 4: Add the milk cream and mix well.
Step 5: Pour the mixture into a cheesecake mold and bake for 1 hour.
Step 6: Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.

title: Chocolate Muffins
steps: Melt the chocolate with the butter in a double boiler.
Mix the eggs with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the melted chocolate mixture to the eggs and sugar mixture.
Add the sifted flour along with the yeast.
Fill the muffin molds with the previous mixture.
Bake for 20 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

title: Classic Glazed Donuts
steps: Mix the flour, yeast and sugar in a bowl.
Add the eggs and butter and knead until you obtain a soft dough.
Let the dough rest for 1 hour.
Cut the dough into donut shapes and fry them in hot oil.
Remove the donuts from the oil and let them cool before glazing.

title: Cinnamon Rolls (Cinnamon Rolls)
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Spread the dough for cinnamon rolls on a floured surface.
Spread the butter on the dough.
Sprinkle the cinnamon and sugar over the dough.
Roll the dough carefully.

title: Blondie (White Chocolate Brownie)
steps: Melt the butter with the white chocolate in a bain-marie.
Add the sugar and mix until well integrated.
Add the flour and mix until you obtain a homogeneous dough.
Pour the mixture into a brownie mold and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 25 minutes.
Let cool before serving.

title: Key Lime Pie
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the butter with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the eggs one by one, mixing well after each addition.
Add the flour and mix until there is a homogeneous dough.
Pour the mixture into a cake pan and bake for 25 minutes.
Let cool before serving.

title: Red Fruit Pavlova
steps: Preheat the oven to 150 degrees Celsius.
Beat the egg whites until they form firm peaks.
Slowly add the sugar while continuing to beat.
Bake the mixture in a mold for an hour and a half.
Let cool and decorate with red fruits before serving.

title: Baklava (Puff Pastry And Pistachio)
steps: Roll out the puff pastry.
Cover the base of the mold with a layer of pistachios.
Cut the dough into triangles and place them on the pistachios.
Paint the surface with a little water and sugar.
Bake at 180°C for 30 minutes or until golden.
Once baked, bathe with a mixture of hot water and honey.

title: Sicilian Cannoli
steps: Prepare the cannoli dough according to the package instructions.
Fill the dough cylinders with the sweetened ricotta mixture and vanilla essence.
Dip the ends of each cannolo in ground pistachios.
Fry the cannoli in hot oil until golden.
Let cool on kitchen paper before serving.

title: Pistachio Gelato
steps: Step 1: Mix the pistachios with the milk in a blender until you obtain a smooth paste.
Step 2: Add the sugar to the mixture and beat again until completely dissolved.
Step 3: Pour the mixture into a container suitable for ice cream and freeze for at least 4 hours.
Step 4: Remove from the freezer, beat with a hand blender or a large spoon to break up any ice crystals that have formed.
Step 5: Put it back in the freezer and let it cool for another 2 hours before serving.

title: Churros With Dulce De Leche
steps: Mix the flour with the water and salt to form a dough.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan until very hot.
Form the churros using a pencil sharpener or a pastry bag.
Fry the churros in hot oil until golden.
Remove the churros from the oil and drain them on kitchen paper to remove excess oil.
Roll the churros in icing sugar.
Serve the churros with dulce de leche on one side.

title: Tres Leches Cake
steps: Mix the eggs and sugar until well incorporated.
Add the flour little by little and mix until you obtain a soft dough.
Bake the mixture in a cake pan for 20 minutes or until golden.
Mix the evaporated milk, the heavy cream and the condensed milk in a bowl.
Prick the cake with a fork and pour the tres leches mixture over the cake.
Let the cake cool before serving.

title: Frozen Mochi
steps: Boil glutinous rice with water until soft.
Add the rice flour and mix well.
Let the mixture cool in a mold.
Cut the cooled mochi into small portions.
Serve each serving of mochi with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

title: Gulab Jamun (Balls In Syrup)
steps: Mix the flour with the milk and butter until it forms a soft dough.
Make small balls with the dough.
Heat the sugar in water until it dissolves and add the rose water.
Fry the balls in hot oil until golden.
Dip the fried balls in the prepared syrup.

title: Hummingbird Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the flour, sugar, mashed bananas and vegetable oil in a large bowl.
Add the chopped walnuts and mix well.
Pour the mixture into an oiled cake pan.
Bake for 40 minutes or until an inserted toothpick comes out clean.

title: Cobb Salad (Chicken, Bacon, Egg, Blue Cheese)
steps: Cook the chicken and cut it into strips.
Fry the bacon until crispy.
Boil the eggs until hard and cool them before cutting them into halves.
In a large salad bowl, mix romaine lettuce, cherry tomatoes, scallion sticks, crumbled blue cheese, cooked chicken, crispy bacon and hard-boiled eggs cut in half.
To serve, place the salad mixture on individual plates and dress with the desired dressing.

title: Asian Coleslaw (Sesame)
steps: Cut the bok choy into small pieces and set aside.
Mix sesame seeds, soybeans and some minced garlic in a small bowl.
Add olive oil to the bowl and mix well to create the dressing.
In a large bowl, combine bok choy with dressing and toss until cabbage is well coated.

title: Fattoush (Lebanese Salad With Fried Bread)
steps: Cut the red peppers and tomatoes into small pieces.
Wash fresh mint and cut finely.
Heat a little olive oil in a frying pan and fry the pita bread slices until golden.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.

title: Larb Gai (Thai Chicken Salad)
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces and cook until cooked. Let cool.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add the cooked chicken to the ingredient mixture.
Stir everything to combine well.
Serve the salad cold.

title: Som Tam (Green Papaya Salad)
steps: Grate the green papaya and mix it with the chopped garlic, chopped red pepper and rice vinegar.
Add fish sauce to taste.

title: Shopska Salad (Bulgarian)
steps: Cut the tomatoes and peppers into large pieces.
Chop the onion finely.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Rice Noodle Salad (Cold)
steps: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
Cut the red peppers, carrots and onion into small pieces.
Mix the cooked noodles with the cut vegetables and olives.
Add vinegar and olive oil to taste to dress the salad.

title: Chinese Chicken Salad (Tangerine And Almonds)
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken and let it cool.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Corn And Bean Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the beans until soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked corn with the beans and serve.

title: Roasted Pumpkin And Feta Cheese Salad
steps: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Cut the pumpkin into pieces and roast it on a tray for 25 minutes or until soft.
In a large salad bowl, mix the spinach leaves with the roasted pumpkin pieces.
Add the crumbled feta cheese to the salad mixture.
Serve Immediately

title: Steamed Jasmine Rice
steps: Wash the jasmine rice until the water runs clear.
Place the rice in a pot with water (the amount of water will depend on the type of pot and the amount of rice) and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Cook over medium-high heat until the water begins to boil. At this point, reduce the heat to minimum and cover the pot.
Let it cook without stirring or uncovering the pot for 15 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let it rest for another 10 minutes.
Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Egg Fried Rice
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a frying pan, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
Add the eggs and stir until cooked.
Add the cooked rice to the pan with the eggs and mix well.
Cook for a few more minutes until everything is well mixed.

title: Kimchi (Korean Spicy Cabbage)
steps: 1. Cut the bok choy into small pieces and place in a large bowl.
2. Add the chopped leek, grated ginger, minced garlic, soy sauce, sugar and salt to the bowl with the bok choy.
3. Mix everything well so that the ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Cover the bowl with a lid or transparent film and let it ferment in a cool place for 2-3 days.

title: Pak Choi Stir-Fried With Garlic
steps: Step 1: Wash and cut the pak choi into small pieces.
Step 2: Peel and finely chop the garlic.
Step 3: Heat a little oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
Step 4: Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook until golden.
Step 5: Add the cut pak choi to the pan and stir-fry for a few minutes until tender.
Step 6: Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Sautéed Spinach With Garlic
steps: Heat oil in a large frying pan.
Add the chopped garlic cloves and cook until golden.
Add the washed and cut spinach to the pan.
Cook until the spinach is soft, stirring constantly.

title: Mashed Potatoes With Roasted Garlic
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into small pieces.
Boil the potatoes until soft.
In a frying pan, heat olive oil and add the whole peeled garlic. Fry them until golden brown.
Remove the garlic from the pan and mash in a mortar or food processor along with the cooked potatoes until you obtain a smooth puree.
Add the fried garlic and its oil to the potato mixture. Mix all the ingredients well.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Creamed Corn
steps: Step 1: Cook the corn until soft.
Step 2: Mix the cream with the cooked corn and cook over low heat until it thickens.

title: Cornbread
steps: Mix the ground corn, flour and eggs.
Add the milk and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a loaf pan.

title: Hush Puppies (Fried Corn Balls)
steps: Mix the ingredients in a bowl until it forms a thick dough.
Cover the dough balls with breadcrumbs.
Fry the balls in hot oil for a few minutes until golden.

title: Hash Browns (Potato Pancakes)
steps: Peel and grate the potatoes.
Remove excess water from the potato mixture.
Form pancakes with your hands or using a specific mold.
Fry in hot oil until golden brown on both sides.

title: Wonton Soup
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic and leek in a pot.
Step 2: Add the carrot and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Step 4: Add the wontons and cook until they float in the soup.
Step 5: Serve hot.

title: Hot And Sour Soup
steps: Step 1: Soak the dried red chilies in hot water for 30 minutes.
Step 2: Finely chop the onion, garlic and ginger.
Step 3: Heat oil in a large pot and add the chopped onion. Cook until transparent.
Step 4: Add the chopped garlic and cook for one more minute.
Step 5: Add the chopped ginger and cook for another minute.
Step 6: Add the soaked red chilies, along with the soaking water, to the oil and cook for a few minutes until they have softened.
Step 7: Add the rice vinegar and chicken broth. Bring to a boil and then reduce the heat to let the soup simmer for about 15 minutes.
Step 8: If desired, add some pieces of tofu or chicken meat to give more flavor and body to the soup. Cook until cooked.

title: Clam Chowder (Clam Chowder)
steps: Step 1: Cook the clams in a pot with water and a little salt for a few minutes until they open.
Step 2: Remove the clams from the heat and reserve the broth.
Step 3: In another pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic until golden.
Step 4: Add the potatoes cut into small pieces to the pot and cook them for a few minutes.
Step 5: Add the fish cut into small pieces to the pot and cook until done.
Step 6: Add the cream and clam broth to the pot and let everything mix well.
Step 7: Add the clams and bay leaf to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 8: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Vegetarian Borscht (Beet Soup)
steps: Peel and finely chop the onion, leek, carrot, beet and garlic.
In a large pot, heat a little oil and add the chopped vegetables. Cook over medium heat until soft.
Add the grated ginger and sweet paprika. Cook for a few more minutes.
Add the chopped potato and vegetable broth. Bring to the boil and cook for 20-25 minutes or until the potatoes are soft.
Remove from the heat and add the balsamic vinegar. Mix well.
Serve hot and enjoy your vegetarian beet soup.

title: Dhal Lentil Soup (India)
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, garlic and ginger in a pot with a little oil until golden.
Step 2: Add the spices (curry powder, ground cumin and sweet paprika) and cook for a few minutes.
Step 3: Add the lentils and crushed tomato. Cook everything together for about 20-25 minutes until the lentils are soft.
Step 4: Add enough water to cover the lentils, salt to taste and cook over medium heat for about 30 more minutes.

title: Margarita (Cocktail)
steps: Mix tequila, lime juice and Cointreau in a shaker with ice.
Shake well until cold.
Strain the mixture into a glass with salt on the rim.
Serve Immediately.

title: Mango Lassi
steps: Peel and cut the mangoes into pieces.
Place the mango pieces in a blender along with the yogurt and milk.
Blend until you obtain a smooth and creamy mixture.
Serve Immediately.

title: Matcha Latte
steps: Mix 1 teaspoon of matcha powder with a little warm water.
Heat the plant milk until it is hot but not boiling.
Pour the matcha mixture into a cup and then add the hot milk.

title: Homemade Barbecue Sauce (Bbq)
steps: Step 1: Peel and cut the tomatoes, onion and garlic.
Step 2: In a frying pan, sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Step 3: Add the tomatoes, sweet and spicy paprika, balsamic vinegar and honey. Cook over medium heat for about 15 minutes.
Step 4: Let the mixture cool and blend it until you obtain a smooth sauce.

title: Pico De Gallo
steps: Cut the tomatoes into small pieces.
Peel and peel the onion and cut it into small pieces.
Peel and peel the garlic and cut it into small pieces.
Wash the cilantro and cut it finely.
Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add salt to taste and squeeze the lemon juice over the mixture. Mix everything well.

title: Boeuf Bourguignon
steps: 1. Cut the beef into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan and brown the meat on all sides.
3. Remove the meat from the pan and add the chopped onion, garlic and leek.
4. Cook until soft.
5. Add the meat back to the pan along with the red wine, chopped carrot, grated ginger, bay leaf and thyme.
6. Cook over low heat for about 2 hours or until the meat is tender.
7. Serve hot.

title: Coq Au Vin (Chicken In Wine)
steps: 1. Sauté the onion, garlic and leek until golden.
2. Add the minced pork and cook until well done.
3. Add the chicken cut into pieces and cook until it is sealed on all sides.
4. Add the red wine and flour, mix well and let the liquid reduce.
5. Cover the saucepan and let it cook over medium-low heat for about 2 hours or until the chicken is tender.

title: Cassoulet (Bean And Duck Stew)
steps: Cook the beans until soft.
Fry the pork and duck until golden brown, add the chopped onion and fry until transparent.
Add the chopped garlic, crushed tomato and bay leaf. Cook for a few minutes.
Add the cooked beans and season with salt and pepper. Cook everything together for about 20 more minutes.

title: Moules-Frites (Mussels With Potatoes)
steps: Step 1: Heat the olive oil in a large pot. Add the chopped garlic and cook until golden.
Step 2: Add the mussels to the pot and cook until they open. Remove the mussels from the pot and set them aside.
Step 3: In the same pot, add the sliced ​​potatoes and cook them until golden. Add the white wine and cook until the alcohol evaporates.
Step 4: Add the mussels back to the pot and mix everything to combine flavors. Cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Hachis Parmentier (French Meatloaf)
steps: Step 1: Cook the ground beef with the chopped onion until golden.
Step 2: Add the meat broth and let it cook over medium heat for about 10 minutes.
Step 3: Peel and cook the potatoes until soft. Once cooked, mash them until you obtain a smooth texture.
Step 4: Mix the meat with the mashed potatoes and season to taste.
Step 5: Pour the mixture into a cake pan and sprinkle with breadcrumbs.
Step 6: Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 20 minutes or until the breadcrumbs are golden.

title: Chicken Souvlaki
steps: Cut the chicken into pieces and mix it with minced garlic, minced onion, olive oil and salt.
Wrap the chicken pieces on skewers and grill them on a grill or pan until golden brown.
Cut the tomatoes and peppers into pieces and add them to the pan with the chicken. Cook for a few minutes until soft.
Serve the hot chicken souvlaki accompanied by salad or rice.

title: Homemade Beef Doner Kebab
steps: Cut the beef into small pieces and mix with the other ingredients.
Leave it to marinate for at least 2 hours.
Cook the mixture in a pan until well done.
Serve hot with pita bread and your favorite accompaniments.

title: Lamb Kofta (Skewers)
steps: Step 1: Mix the minced lamb with the chopped onion, crushed garlic and fresh parsley.
Step 2: Add the eggs and breadcrumbs to the previous mixture. Mix all the ingredients well.
Step 3: Make balls with the mixture and stick each one on a toothpick to make the skewers.
Step 4: Cook the kofta on a grill or pan over medium heat until cooked through.

title: Lamb Tagine With Plums
steps: Heat oil in a pot and brown the lamb until well sealed.
Add the chopped onion and crushed garlic, cook until soft.
Add the sweet paprika and harissa, stir well.
Add the plums and meat broth. Bring to a boil and cook for 30 minutes.
Adjust seasoning and serve.

title: Real Couscous (Chicken, Lamb And Merguez)
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken and lamb until they are cooked.
Step 2: Add the merguez and cook until well done.

title: Pho Bo (Vietnamese Beef Soup)
steps: Cook the beef until soft.
Add the onion, ginger and garlic to the meat broth.
Add the rice noodles and cook until soft.
Serve the soup in a large bowl with chopped leek as garnish.

title: Banh Mi (Vietnamese Pork Snack)
steps: Cook the pork until it is well done and let it cool.
Cut the Vietnamese bread in half and lightly toast the slices.
Spread mayonnaise on both halves of the bread.
Place the cooked pork on one half of the bread.
Add paprika and minced garlic to the meat.
Add lettuce leaves and tomato slices to the sandwich.
Cover with the other half of the bread and cut into individual portions.

title: Pad See Ew (Soy Rice Noodles)
steps: Cook the rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until golden.
Add the soy and cook for a few minutes.
Add the cooked rice and the broccoli cut into small pieces.
Mix everything well and cook for a few more minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Thai Green Chicken Curry
steps: Step 1: Cook the chicken until golden.
Step 2: Add the Thai green curry paste and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 3: Add coconut milk and let it simmer for a few minutes.

title: Beef Rendang (Indonesian Stew)
steps: Cook the beef with the paprika and ginger until golden.
Add the coconuts and cilantro, cook over low heat until the meat is soft.

title: Kung Pao Chicken (With Peanuts)
steps: Step 1: Cut the chicken into small pieces.
Step 2: Fry the peanuts until golden and remove them.

title: Mapo Tofu (Spicy Tofu With Meat)
steps: 1. Cut the tofu into cubes and fry until golden. Remove from heat and reserve.
2. In a frying pan, heat oil and add the minced pork. Cook until well done.
3. Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan with the meat. Cook for a few minutes.
4. Add the fried tofu cubes to the pan, along with the paprika and soy sauce. Mix all the ingredients well.
5. Serve hot and accompany with rice or noodles.

title: Cantonese Roast Duck
steps: Step 1: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Step 2: Mix the soy, ginger and garlic in a bowl. Add the duck and marinate for 30 minutes.
Step 3: Place the duck in a baking dish and add vinegar to it.
Step 4: Bake for 1 hour or until the duck is well cooked. Remove from the oven and let rest before serving.

title: Tonkatsu (Japanese Breaded Pork)
steps: Cut the pork into thin steaks.
Bread the pork fillets with flour, egg and breadcrumbs.
Fry the breaded fillets in hot oil until golden brown.
Drain excess oil and serve with Worcestershire sauce and salad.

title: Katsudon (Tonkatsu With Egg On Rice)
steps: Cook rice.
Season the pork and bread it with breadcrumbs.
Fry the meat until golden brown on both sides.
Beat the eggs in a bowl and add a little tonkatsu sauce.
Place the cooked rice on a plate, put the fried meat on top and pour the beaten eggs over the meat.

title: Yaki Udon (Thick Stir-Fried Noodles)
steps: Cook the udon noodles according to the instructions on the package.
In a wok or large skillet, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until transparent.
Add the pieces of sweet paprika and cook for a few more minutes.
Add the soy and stir well. Add the cooked udon noodles and mix everything.
Cook for a few more minutes, until the noodles are well coated in sauce.

title: Shoyu Ramen (Soy Sauce)
steps: Cook the ramen pasta according to the package instructions.
In a saucepan, heat the chicken broth over medium heat until it boils.
Add the shoyu sauce to the broth and stir well.
In a frying pan, cook the pork until golden. Remove from heat and cut into small pieces.
In a large bowl, place the cooked pasta and add the broth with the shoyu sauce.
Add the pork pieces to each bowl.
Garnish with cucumber rinds and chopped green onion.

title: Croque Monsieur
steps: Spread two slices of bread with melted butter.
Place a generous layer of cooked ham on one of the slices.
Top the ham with a liberal amount of grated Gruyère cheese.
Place the other slice of bread on top of the cheese and put it in a preheated oven at 200 degrees Celsius until the cheese is melted and golden.

title: Cuban Sandwich (Pork, Ham, Cheese)
steps: Cook the pork until it is cooked through and browned.
Take two slices of Cuban bread or French bread, and spread them with butter on both sides.
Place a layer of pork on a slice of bread.
Add a layer of ham on top of the pork.
Add a generous layer of Swiss cheese on top of the ham.
Cover the sandwich with the other slice of bread.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Place the sandwich in the skillet and cook until both sides are golden brown and crispy. Repeat for the other side of the sandwich.

title: Philly Cheesesteak (Beef And Cheese Sandwich)
steps: Cut the beef into thin strips and cook until cooked through. Remove it from the heat.
In the same skillet, cook the onion and green peppers until soft.
Add the beef back to the pan with the onion and peppers.
Top the mixture with slices of Provolone cheese.
Place the bakery bread on a rack to lightly toast both sides.
Fill each half of the bread with the meat, onion and pepper mixture. Serve hot.

title: Lobster Roll (Lobster Sandwich)
steps: Cook the lobster and cut it into pieces.
Lightly toast the hamburger bun.
Stuff the bread with the lobster pieces.
Serve Immediately

title: Seafood And Sausage Gumbo
steps: Step 1: Sauté the onion, pepper and garlic until soft.
Step 2: Add the chopped sausage and cook until golden.
Step 3: Add the flour and stir well.
Step 4: Add water or chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Step 5: Add the seafood and cook until done.
Step 6: Serve hot.

title: Carnitas Tacos (Confit Pork)
steps: Cook the pork in oil until golden.
Add the garlic and tomatoes, cook for 10 more minutes.
Add cilantro and serve with corn tortillas.

title: Mole Poblano With Turkey
steps: Step 1: Toast the ancho and pasilla chiles until crispy.
Step 2: Process the roasted chilies with the almonds, pumpkin seeds and garlic to make a paste. Add a little water if necessary.

title: Swiss Enchiladas (Green Sauce And Cream)
steps: Cook the chicken until it is cooked through.
Heat the corn tortillas in a skillet.
Place a little chicken inside each tortilla and roll up.
In a pot, mix the green sauce with the cooking cream.
Place the Swiss enchiladas on a plate and cover with the prepared sauce.

title: Cheese Pupusas (El Salvador)
steps: Step 1: Prepare the corn dough according to the package instructions.
Step 2: Fill the dough with cheese and form a ball.
Step 3: Flatten the ball to form a pupusa.
Step 4: Cook the pupusa in a hot pan until golden brown on both sides.

title: Corn Cake (Corn And Meat)
steps: Step 1: Mix the ground corn with water and salt.
Step 2: Fry the ground meat with onion and garlic until golden.

title: Poor Loin (With Egg And Onion)
steps: Cut the pork loin into thin steaks.
Salt and pepper the fillets.
In a hot frying pan, add a little oil and brown the fillets on both sides until cooked.
Remove the fillets from the pan and reserve them on a plate.
In the same pan, add the chopped onion and cook until transparent.
Add the eggs to the pan with the onion and cook until they are done as desired.
Serve the pork loin with the eggs and onion.

title: Shrimp Moqueca (Brazilian Stew)
steps: Step 1: In a large pot, heat the oil and sauté the chopped onion until transparent.
Step 2: Add the chopped red peppers and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the chopped garlic and cook for one more minute.
Step 4: Add the shrimp and cook until pink.
Step 5: Add the white vinegar and cook for another two minutes.
Step 6: Add the chopped tomatoes and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 7: Add the grated coconut and cook until the moqueca is thick and well integrated.

title: Meatless Chili (Vegetarian)
steps: Step 1: Heat oil in a large pot and add the chopped red peppers, onion and garlic.
Step 2: Add chopped tomato and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add red beans and sweet corn. Cook for a few minutes.
Step 4: Add chopped zucchini and cook until tender.
Step 5: Add chopped green chilies and salt to taste.

title: Dolmadakia (Stuffed Grape Leaves)
steps: Step 1: Cook the grape leaves until soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked rice with the chopped onion, garlic and parsley.
Step 3: Fill each grape leaf with the rice mixture.
Step 4: Fold the stuffed grape leaves to form a sealed package.
Step 5: Heat oil in a frying pan and fry the stuffed grape leaves until golden.

title: Spanakopita (Spinach And Feta Puff Pastry)
steps: Step 1: Mix spinach and feta in a bowl.
Step 2: Spread the puff pastry and place the filling.
Step 3: Fold the dough to form the cakes.

title: Cheese Börek (Turkish Empanada)
steps: Spread the filo dough on a baking sheet.
Grate the feta cheese and spread it over the dough.
Brush the dough with melted butter.
Fold the dough in half and bake at 180 degrees for 20 minutes.

title: Kibbeh (Meat And Bulgur Croquettes)
steps: Step 1: Soak the bulgur in water for half an hour.
Step 2: Drain the bulgur well and mix with the ground beef, chopped onion and ground garlic.
Step 3: Knead everything until forming a homogeneous mixture.
Step 4: Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil.

title: Fresh Vietnamese Rolls (Goi Cuon)
steps: Cook the vermicelli according to the instructions on the package.
Wash and chop the fresh mint.
Peel and chop the garlic.
Fill each sheet of rice puff pastry with a portion of vermicelli, fresh mint and garlic.
Carefully roll each leaf to form rolls.
Serve with fish sauce.

title: Siu Mai (Pork Dim Sum)
steps: Step 1: Mix the minced pork with the chopped leek, ginger and green onion.
Step 2: Add wheat flour and mix well.
Step 3: Make balls with the mixture and cook in steam.

title: Ha Gao (Prawn Dim Sum)
steps: Step 1: Prepare the Ha Gao dough according to the package instructions.
Step 2: Mix the chopped shrimp with chopped green onion and season to taste.
Step 3: Fill the dough with the shrimp mixture and close the Ha Gao.
Step 4: Steam the Ha Gao for about 10 minutes.

title: Meat Baozi (Steamed Bread)
steps: Mix the minced meat with salt and pepper.
Dissolve the flour in water and form a dough.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
Cover each baozi with the flour and water dough.
Steam cook for 20 minutes.

title: Takoyaki (Octopus Balls)
steps: Step 1: Cut the octopus into small pieces.
Step 2: Mix the flour with water and beat until you get a smooth mixture.

title: Okonomiyaki (Japanese Omelet)
steps: Step 1: Mix the flour with water until you get a thick dough.
Step 2: Add the sweet paprika, chopped onion and angel hair to the dough.
Step 3: Heat oil in a large frying pan and add the previous mixture.
Step 4: Cook until both sides are golden and crispy.
Step 5: Serve hot with your favorite sauce.

title: Yakitori (Chicken Skewers)
steps: Cut the chicken into small pieces.
Mix the soy sauce with a little water and paint the chicken pieces.
Thread the chicken pieces onto the skewer and cook until golden brown.

title: Prawn And Vegetable Tempura
steps: Prepare the tempura mixture with flour and water.
Submerge the prawns and vegetables in the mixture.
Fry the ingredients submerged in hot oil until golden.
Drain excess oil and serve hot.

title: Spicy Edamame (With Garlic And Chili)
steps: Step 1: Soak the edamame for at least 2 hours.
Step 2: Peel and finely chop the garlic and chili.
Step 3: Cook the edamame in boiling water for 5 minutes.
Step 4: Drain the edamame and mix them with the chopped garlic and chili.
Step 5: Add salt to taste and serve hot.

title: Nachos With Chili Con Carne
steps: Step 1: Cook the pork with the chiles until tender.
Step 2: Add the sauce and let it reduce.
Step 3: Serve on the nachos.

title: Coxinhas (Brazilian Chicken Croquettes)
steps: Cook the chicken until it is cooked through. Get rid of the cooking water.
Mix the cooked chicken with the corn slurry and minced garlic in a food processor.
Add oil and salt to taste. Mix everything until you obtain a homogeneous mass.
Make balls with the mixture and fry them in hot oil until golden.

title: Argentine Meat Empanadas
steps: Cook the ground beef with onion and garlic until golden.
Add the cooked potatoes and mash them into the mixture.
Add salt to taste.
Fill the empanada dough with the meat mixture and form the empanadas.
Brush the edges of the empanadas with beaten egg and bake at medium temperature until golden.

title: Fried Arepitas With Cream
steps: Step 1: Prepare the arepa dough according to the package instructions.
Step 2: Fry the arepas in a pan with hot oil until golden and crispy.
Step 3: Serve the fried arepas hot with cream on top.

title: Anticuchos (Heart Skewers)
steps: Cut the beef heart into large pieces and place it in a marinade made with vinegar, ground yellow chili pepper, chopped onion and ground garlic.
Marinate for at least 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the heart pieces onto skewers and cook on the grill or in a hot pan until cooked through.
Serve with a tomato and onion salad.

title: Octopus Ceviche
steps: Clean and cut the octopus into small pieces.
Marinate the octopus pieces in lemon juice for 30 minutes.
Add the chopped onion, chopped red pepper and chopped cilantro to the marinated octopus.
Add salt to taste and mix all the ingredients.

title: Tuna Toast (Mexican Style)
steps: Cook the onion and tomato until soft.
Add the canned tuna, cilantro, lemon juice and salt to the pan. Mix everything.
Toast the corn tortillas in a hot skillet until golden brown.
Place a generous spoonful of the tuna mixture on each toast.
Garnish with more chopped cilantro and serve.

title: Chocolate Eclairs
steps: Prepare the choux dough according to the instructions on the package.
Fill the éclairs with the pastry cream.
Melt the dark chocolate and dip the éclairs in it.
Let cool and serve.

title: Truffle Profiteroles
steps: Melt the butter in a pot.
Add water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Add the flour and stir until a dough forms.
Let the dough cool before adding the eggs, one at a time.
Make balls with the mixture and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake at 200°C for 15 minutes.
Melt the dark chocolate and fill each profiterole with it.

title: Assorted Macarons
steps: Mix the almond flour with the icing sugar.
Add the egg whites and mix until it forms a paste.
Make small balls with the mixture and bake at 150°C for 20 minutes.

title: Lemon Madeleines
steps: Preheat the madeleine mold in the oven at 180 degrees.
Mix the melted butter with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the eggs one by one, mixing well after each addition.
Add the flour and mix carefully.
Add the lemon juice and zest and mix everything until well integrated.
Pour the batter into the preheated pan and bake for about 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Nutella And Banana Crepes
steps: Mix the flour, eggs and milk to make the crêpe batter.
Add melted butter to the mixture.
Cook each crêpe in a hot pan until both sides are golden brown.
Spread Nutella on each crêpe and add banana slices.
Roll up the crêpes and serve them accompanied with more Nutella and bananas if you wish.

title: Chocolate Soufflé
steps: Melt the dark chocolate in a double boiler.
Mix the unsalted butter with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Add the rice flour and mix until well integrated.
Pour the chocolate mixture into a soufflé mold greased with unsalted butter.
Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for 20-25 minutes or until firm in the center.

title: Black Forest Cake
steps: Mix the sugar, butter and eggs until you obtain a homogeneous mixture.
Add the flour and cocoa powder to the previous mixture.
Add the heavy cream and mix well.
Pour the mixture into a buttered cake tin and bake at 180 degrees for about 30 minutes.

title: Linzer Torte (Almond And Jam Cake)
steps: Grind the almonds until you obtain a fine powder.
Mix the flour, sugar and butter until it forms a dough.
Add the eggs to the previous mixture and mix well.
Add the almond powder to the dough and knead until well integrated.
Spread the dough in a cake pan and bake at 180 degrees Celsius for about 20 minutes or until golden.
Once cooked, let the cake cool and then spread with red fruit jam.

title: Sticky Toffee Pudding
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Mix the butter with the sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Add the flour and baking powder to the previous mixture.
Add the vanilla extract and mix everything until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a pudding mold and bake for 20-25 minutes or until firm.
Meanwhile, prepare the caramel with the brown sugar candy and water.
Once the pudding is cooked, remove it from the oven and pour the hot caramel over it.
Let cool before serving.

title: Victoria Sponge Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Beat the butter and sugar until you get a fluffy mixture.
Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Add the flour and baking powder, along with the vanilla essence.
Pour the dough into a buttered and floured cake pan.
Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted comes out clean.

title: Banoffee Pie
steps: Prepare the pie dough according to the package instructions.
Cover the cake pan with the prepared dough and bake at 180°C for 20 minutes or until golden. Let cool.
Mix the condensed milk with the mashed bananas in a bowl.
Pour the condensed milk and banana mixture over the cooled pie dough and spread it evenly.
Whip the heavy cream and cover the banana and condensed milk mixture with the whipped cream. Decorate with chocolate shavings if desired.

title: Scones With Cream And Jam
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Mix the flour, butter, milk, sugar, eggs and baking powder until it forms a dough.
Knead the dough on a floured surface and cut it into scones.
Place the scones on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Once baked, let the scones cool on a rack.
Spread with spreadable cream and add jam to taste before serving.

title: Suspiro A La Limeña
steps: Mix the eggs with the sugar until well integrated.
Add the corn flour and cinnamon powder to the previous mixture.
Add the milk little by little while continuing to stir.
Shake the mixture in a saucepan over medium heat until it thickens.
Remove from heat and add the cloves.
Let cool before serving.

title: Chocolate Alfajores
steps: Step 1: Mix the butter with the sugar until you obtain a fluffy mixture.
Step 2: Add the flour little by little while continuing to mix.
Step 3: Add the chocolate and mix well until there is a uniform mass.
Step 4: Make balls with the dough and bake over medium heat for about 15 minutes.

title: Brigadeiros (Brazilian Truffles)
steps: Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the condensed milk and mix until well incorporated.
Cook the mixture for about 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and let cool.
Once cooled, form balls with buttered hands.
Pass the balls through grated chocolate or cocoa powder.
Let them harden in the refrigerator before serving.

title: Orzo And Feta Salad
steps: Cook the orzo according to package instructions.
Mix the cooked orzo, the cherry tomatoes cut in half, the black olives and the green leaves in a bowl.
Add the crumbled feta to the bowl.
Dress with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.

title: Lentil And Salmon Salad
steps: Step 1: Cook the lentils until they are tender.
Step 2: Cut the salmon into small pieces.

title: Couscous And Pomegranate Salad
steps: Cook the couscous according to the package instructions.
Peel and cut the onion into small pieces.
Wash and cut the red peppers into thin strips.
In a bowl, mix the cooked couscous with the onion, red peppers and pomegranate juice.
Add olive oil to taste and mix all the ingredients.

title: Spinach And Mushroom Salad
steps: Wash and drain the spinach.
Clean the mushrooms and cut them into slices.
Mix spinach and mushrooms in a bowl.
Dress with olive oil, balsamic vinegar and salt to taste.
Serve immediately.

title: Pear And Gorgonzola Salad
steps: Cut the lettuce into small pieces.
Peel and cut the pear into thin slices.
Grate the gorgonzola.
Toast the walnuts in a pan until golden.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Apple And Yogurt Coleslaw
steps: Cut the apples and cabbages into small pieces.
Mix the yogurt with the lemon juice, chopped garlic and parsley.
Mix all ingredients.

title: Dill Potato Salad (Scandi)
steps: Cook the potatoes until they are soft.
Let the potatoes cool and then cut them into large pieces.
Mix chopped fresh dill with mayonnaise and mustard to make a sauce.
In a large bowl, mix the cut potatoes with the dill sauce.
Add the finely chopped onion and chopped parsley to the bowl and mix everything.

title: Wild Rice Salad
steps: Cook wild rice according to package directions.
Chop the red peppers, carrots and onion into small pieces.
Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
Add olive oil and balsamic vinegar to taste.

title: Red Quinoa And Vegetable Salad
steps: Cook the red quinoa according to the instructions on the package.
Cut the carrots, celery and red pepper into small pieces.
Wash and drain the spinach.
Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Add your favorite salad dressing.

title: Blue Tomato And Onion Salad
steps: Step 1: Cut the blue tomato and onion into pieces.
Step 2: Mix the ingredients in a bowl.

title: Coconut Rice
steps: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Add grated coconut while cooking the rice.

title: Charro Beans (With Bacon/Chorizo)
steps: Step 1: Heat the bacon in a frying pan until crispy.
Step 2: Add the chopped onion and garlic to the pan with the bacon and cook until soft.
Step 3: Add the chopped chilies and tomato to the pan and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the beans and cook everything together for a few minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Maduros (Sweet Fried Plantain)
steps: Peel the ripe bananas and cut them into slices.
Heat the oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the banana slices to the pan and fry until golden brown on both sides.
Remove the anchovies from the pan and place them on kitchen paper to drain excess oil.
Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Mashed Sweet Potato With Marshmallows
steps: Peel and cook the sweet potatoes until soft.
Mash the cooked sweet potatoes until you obtain a smooth puree.
Add the marshmallows and mix well until completely incorporated.
Serve hot as a garnish.

title: White Asparagus With Mayonnaise
steps: Cook the white asparagus until tender.
Serve the asparagus with mayonnaise.

title: Catalan Spinach (Pine Nuts And Raisins)
steps: Step 1: Heat olive oil in a large skillet.
Step 2: Add the chopped garlic and cook until golden.
Step 3: Add the spinach and cook until soft.
Step 4: Add the pine nuts and raisins, stir well and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 5: Serve hot as a garnish.

title: Gratin Dauphinois (Gratin Potatoes)
steps: Peel and cut the potatoes into thin slices.
Melt the butter in a frying pan and sauté the minced garlic until golden.
Add the potatoes to the pan and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour the cream into a baking dish and layer the potatoes, drizzling each layer with the butter and garlic mixture.
Bake at 180 degrees for 45 minutes or until the potatoes are soft.

title: Vegetable Tian
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Cut the eggplant and zucchini into thin slices.
Peel and finely chop the onion and garlic cloves.
In a frying pan, heat olive oil and sauté the onion and garlic until golden.
Add the red peppers cut into strips and cook for a few minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes and let them cook along with the other vegetables.
In a baking dish, alternate layers of eggplant, zucchini and the vegetable and tomato mixture.
Drizzle each layer with olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 30-40 minutes or until vegetables are tender.

title: Mexican Style Rice (Red)
steps: Cook the rice until soft.
In a frying pan, heat oil and add chopped onion and chopped garlic. Cook until golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and chopped chiles to the pan. Cook for a few minutes.
Add water and let it boil. Then, add the cooked rice and stir well.
Cook over medium-low heat until the rice is well hydrated and the mixture has a thick consistency.

title: Buttered Corn On The Cob
steps: Cook corn until soft.
Add butter and mix well.

title: Tom Yum Goong (Spicy Thai Soup)
steps: Step 1: Heat the chicken broth in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the chopped red chillies, ginger and garlic to the pot and cook for a few minutes until soft.
Step 3: Add the chopped leek and coconut milk to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Step 4: Add the minced chicken to the pot and cook until cooked through.
Step 5: Add fresh lime juice and chopped cilantro to the soup and serve hot.

title: Menudo (Mexican Tripe)
steps: Cook the beef tripe in salted water until soft.
In a pot, sauté the chopped onion and garlic until golden.
Add the clean and seeded ancho chiles to the pot and cook for a few more minutes.
Add the chopped tomatoes and green tomato to the pot and cook until soft.
Add the cooked beef tripe to the broth along with the cilantro and epazote.
Cook for a few more minutes until everything is well incorporated.
Serve hot.

title: Miso Soup With Clams
steps: Step 1: Heat the chicken broth in a large pot.
Step 2: Add the clams and cook until they open.
Step 3: Remove the clams from the pot and set them aside.

title: Cold Melon Soup With Mint
steps: Step 1: Cut the melon into pieces and put them in a blender.
Step 2: Add the fresh mint to the blender and blend until smooth.
Step 3: Strain the soup to remove the melon fibers.

title: Sweet Potato And Coconut Cream
steps: Step 1: Cook the sweet potatoes until soft.
Step 2: Mix the cooked sweet potatoes with the coconut in a food processor until you obtain a smooth cream.

title: Pisco Sour
steps: Mix the pisco, gum syrup and lemon juice in a shaker with ice.
Beat well for a few seconds until a foamy mixture forms.
Serve in a cocktail glass and garnish with a slice of lemon.

title: Argentine Mate
steps: Put the yerba mate in the porongo or pumpkin.
Heat water until it boils but does not boil.
Pour the hot water over the yerba mate.
Move the bulb to release the flavors.
Drink the mate with a straw.

title: Chai Masala Tea
steps: In a pot, heat the milk until it starts to bubble.
Add the black tea and spices (cinnamon powder, ginger powder and ground cloves).
Let it boil for a few minutes to allow the flavors to blend.
Add sugar to taste and stir until completely dissolved.
Serve hot and enjoy your chai masala tea.

title: Hollandaise Sauce
steps: Mix yogurt and mayonnaise until you obtain a smooth mixture.
Add mustard to taste.

title: Classic Bolognese Sauce (Alone)
steps: Cook the ground beef until golden.
Add the chopped onion and crushed garlic, cook until soft.
Add the chopped red peppers and cook for a few more minutes.
Add the crushed tomatoes and cook over medium-low heat for about 2 hours.
Adjust the seasoning and serve.
